[**June 25, 1835:** William A. Richardson, the founder of Yerba Buena (later San Francisco), established its initial residence—a tent dwelling. In October 1835, it was replaced by the city's first wooden house, and in 1836, Richardson constructed the notable adobe building called "Casa Grande."](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=fa3df43a39934f05a32630feb485477c&_e=98_PeRfTEtl95voWrOdMkojL6twEe24w0oyaYXAj6JTY8Fxj_YTHw56c1yIvEleOjAHKcAOIy26FTZI8su7-OS5A6LNrWfgZI3NdIiOyCuP1L3_wXmtkjc5vVcv3hswOkCShegvCxjQ5TTvw8I9SSzARh5IKjizDrIPrlrLhAxy0oVNdqxYm2lbIBMiYS2F_6sb7v6w1KhCI75E-N3X4n9ZYnC4j1oNw_-TwPQ9KZ8JxJfr3dzPgz7dr_HnssmwSIwhl2zPQAjVPTfiYq94gdLIfLIw0sazt0PrXtr8s-X8%3D) **Source -[rbra.ca.gov](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=fa3df43a39934f05a32630feb485477c&_e=98_PeRfTEtl95voWrOdMkojL6twEe24w0oyaYXAj6JTY8Fxj_YTHw56c1yIvEleOjAHKcAOIy26FTZI8su7-OS5A6LNrWfgZI3NdIiOyCuP1L3_wXmtkjc5vVcv3hswOJKZR5ia8R-3g3gCQse6SI91MQMX5NKwIVUHsDN-ZYCGd5FW3rqhLzNSPYLBXyQapZp6XbCQQr9OzaQVD5tgqbyTHzT4cWZeJ1XzGjG8WLqSomn--6k2cyEhzuTkSFcuIEmVYy4gK18DlEQT8GofPaOjzOr5-0XKb8I6yX1erJRo%3D)**

[**June 25, 1868:** Congress enacted a law on June 25, 1868, mandating an eight-hour workday for laborers and mechanics working under the Federal Government. Although President Andrew Johnson initially vetoed the law, it was overridden by Congress. While Johnson couldn't explicitly endorse an eight-hour day, he expressed his support for the concept of working the fewest possible hours that benefit everyone.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=fa3df43a39934f05a32630feb485477c&_e=98_PeRfTEtl95voWrOdMkojL6twEe24w0oyaYXAj6JT4C_VvQHjilipfqIV998wGmGWFyIZQz2A6cswHm1_AOhNrniyIT3nG-0SYuen-KwGSSdZMVXnD4SBNpTz9yrg_36gTG-m1eCoERBMYGMQcdXTOPLHQYjgc7BgdYKzPtLXrFXtTLi10PTLXV07meQgp67Mg6PLb6Pli6DcSFUEanE9lQGPqZsVqmklyX1TZd5rHzoJQc12jeK2ZNUcPZqZwTg0ARmVIeGxUCuL83FpXufU8JgrmfTmOUmv3u8bjFhRE-LnkQEgfVLxMh1XacGD9) **Source -[wikipedia.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=fa3df43a39934f05a32630feb485477c&_e=98_PeRfTEtl95voWrOdMkojL6twEe24w0oyaYXAj6JT4C_VvQHjilipfqIV998wGmGWFyIZQz2A6cswHm1_AOhNrniyIT3nG-0SYuen-KwGSSdZMVXnD4SBNpTz9yrg_36gTG-m1eCoERBMYGMQcdXTOPLHQYjgc7BgdYKzPtLWAhVUfUUvsAdrWlxWztXb0taz2mTejfWej8iq6f4nS6MxmGDXLCcfWsmHet5CX8OLPjyd52rb7oxWgePfaOm-iO1-lGF-f2j71O28jrVHwmSJe2UGxAPTAZKjY7u_UgA1ZNwHqHdradgteUdiDZmhm)**

[**June 25, 1951:** The first-ever commercial network television broadcast in color took place in the United States through the CBS field-sequential color television system. This historic event featured a musical variety special called "Premiere" and was aired on a network of five CBS affiliates on the East Coast.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=fa3df43a39934f05a32630feb485477c&_e=98_PeRfTEtl95voWrOdMkojL6twEe24w0oyaYXAj6JRpzF0MKiT59ooauZujj26dnUv9dAuD-Io_S4mab7Fe8PslnfQ7vwSqHCqGCZtBRjcr6Eu8694etA3900jaxOApbhVXYydqP-hB2A9JzjvPrngUg80CbH58REo_amPlsWJLPSdRCB_xev8yLn6PmZV7VdNBq2NpXZZy370Tq9K7FtrXdvZPjCO6HRH0SgkWkX3g2Sav-h7qrYSgr3n3-tZEQBGljJ_3IMkLlsYlYm5YxbtPMewmvOzje7guJkhYp1U%3D) **Source -[historyofinformation.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=fa3df43a39934f05a32630feb485477c&_e=98_PeRfTEtl95voWrOdMkojL6twEe24w0oyaYXAj6JRpzF0MKiT59ooauZujj26dnUv9dAuD-Io_S4mab7Fe8PslnfQ7vwSqHCqGCZtBRjcr6Eu8694etA3900jaxOApbhVXYydqP-hB2A9JzjvPrvh8QHvoYxoHkYiMKtPBF2XyASDsLiHWViFjJ2D2Op6VkXcfI4VONEAjKzJRWWPLHSd9Et4dwMAPEsNAd-MfjNE8gZ9DgcWAbEnZ5noryBr49eS6GaCo6bZecjDPhUcBU5o5oQURK2lluFx9fYED8Lg%3D)**

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: We need to prove them wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I've met with grassroots conservatives across America and never once experienced the kind of bigotry that I regularly see from the Left.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=a2262de2f5f94d9ba90696e9396b740b&_t=wpf4W54QYejm2hZrlsH4Ph6d5xozKhtaQ2M-2eK5MvZgA5ADjMRhXt0S1IgsP69Aba4fdzGIeTEWosj6PbOnDX4B1oBrb8SprR3NwUlclEk%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=a2262de2f5f94d9ba90696e9396b740b&_t=wpf4W54QYejm2hZrlsH4Ph6d5xozKhtaQ2M-2eK5MvZgA5ADjMRhXt0S1IgsP69Aba4fdzGIeTEWosj6PbOnDX4B1oBrb8SprR3NwUlclEk%3D)

|
The mainstream media thinks you are a racist, Fellow American.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a2262de2f5f94d9ba90696e9396b740b&_e=H-xm3o8cNi5su0-mBBCV0mlKvcZNop-UfuSj_XnmbraETCigWIkDvT4cZpMMS6ClOaPBNm_9wGbn0IwEgFWtkeAd5LvMlOOlmweUUfGrYIXICy1baN1PvMXGVEG3d5G7Yz32xTf-Xo2nBuD16AqX02KUEdQ7n7E3VEYzD6XrbvobfBElOVMwFgtewj6CAf9uinFxBmI_QAyZ6IBxQ_hk6_YGtPEdiKjLMFNNGcXu0KnP-VjgT_izPk_rRC3O3mLMSB3GYuuHXRQZRlie8iuCen1cXs5Q_eXQG83tlc9zzDV8CcCDPEpSekUBBYGLHjVqFttvR6YktlrMKwCL6vNvONjCBPirJNcxiyTacGEErrfAH48p8rvbtMq_ukUnjanA2voNa4HYu39iSM4zydGcfWAOoKTKs7LvvoVV_geyC50%3D)
They think you are a xenophobe.

They think any America First conservative is small-minded - but the Left should take a deeper look in the mirror.

I've been all over the country since announcing my campaign for President of the United States. I've met with grassroots conservatives across America and never *once* experienced the kind of bigotry that I regularly see from the Left.

_**It's shameful.**_

**[Fellow American, I am hoping you can help me prove the Left and the mainstream media wrong.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a2262de2f5f94d9ba90696e9396b740b&_e=H-xm3o8cNi5su0-mBBCV0mlKvcZNop-UfuSj_XnmbraETCigWIkDvT4cZpMMS6ClOaPBNm_9wGbn0IwEgFWtkeAd5LvMlOOlmweUUfGrYIXICy1baN1PvMXGVEG3d5G7Yz32xTf-Xo2nBuD16AqX02KUEdQ7n7E3VEYzD6XrbvobfBElOVMwFgtewj6CAf9uinFxBmI_QAyZ6IBxQ_hk6_YGtPEdiKjLMFNNGcXu0KnP-VjgT_izPk_rRC3O3mLMSB3GYuuHXRQZRlie8iuCep5vB5lWynu7tPVnO5gnNEWW1muJzplTB8CoJYVorl1h7R6U2LyI_udR2LUKNXhJjkj3ONoVv-rZvTSc6phuTS63dvYG3Zw37T-JRuMYYcKPS--eg7NKkj06uP6rp59qVoIvGGEY7XdhBAMYemukpOY%3D)**

That's why it's so important for me to secure a prominent spot on the debate stage this August. We need to prove to the mainstream media that their bias won't stop us from speaking the TRUTH.

**[In the next 30 minutes, will you chip in $1 or more?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a2262de2f5f94d9ba90696e9396b740b&_e=H-xm3o8cNi5su0-mBBCV0mlKvcZNop-UfuSj_XnmbraETCigWIkDvT4cZpMMS6ClOaPBNm_9wGbn0IwEgFWtkeAd5LvMlOOlmweUUfGrYIXICy1baN1PvMXGVEG3d5G7Yz32xTf-Xo2nBuD16AqX02KUEdQ7n7E3VEYzD6XrbvobfBElOVMwFgtewj6CAf9uinFxBmI_QAyZ6IBxQ_hk6_YGtPEdiKjLMFNNGcXu0KnP-VjgT_izPk_rRC3O3mLMSB3GYuuHXRQZRlie8iuCeuigyvr-m_b0UD0g5lbG3m3xiZCvAPLzXfgK52c7QiWX_PYNzcCXsIDLXnC3m8LuGpch0acrz3NaX-YTVkRHtARzry_KKVg-EGWsbacvvqXABa55pxy9SGNvVOjCMYcFmEJuLGUzkN_bqBOwN344UX8%3D)**

Thanks,

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a2262de2f5f94d9ba90696e9396b740b&_e=H-xm3o8cNi5su0-mBBCV0mlKvcZNop-UfuSj_XnmbraETCigWIkDvT4cZpMMS6ClOaPBNm_9wGbn0IwEgFWtkeAd5LvMlOOlmweUUfGrYIXICy1baN1PvMXGVEG3d5G7Yz32xTf-Xo2nBuD16AqX02KUEdQ7n7E3VEYzD6XrbvobfBElOVMwFgtewj6CAf9uinFxBmI_QAyZ6IBxQ_hk6_YGtPEdiKjLMFNNGcXu0KnP-VjgT_izPk_rRC3O3mLMSB3GYuuHXRQZRlie8iuCemSNhlcDQe2PVbI-0ZfD5ZfDvkt62Bk1aJaEqbFQNpLkjJT6lm1VqOYVWwDmz0yZaTwRXS6KAgKmkWL9OeotA9KD4UULV9rxfhdcjOzAydakjRBmu64RxUrIiWcF4QaANWoVO57UsKi6BAyTr4wafXw%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** STAND UP TO THE MAINSTREAM MEDIA ->**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a2262de2f5f94d9ba90696e9396b740b&_e=H-xm3o8cNi5su0-mBBCV0mlKvcZNop-UfuSj_XnmbraETCigWIkDvT4cZpMMS6ClOaPBNm_9wGbn0IwEgFWtkeAd5LvMlOOlmweUUfGrYIXICy1baN1PvMXGVEG3d5G7Yz32xTf-Xo2nBuD16AqX02KUEdQ7n7E3VEYzD6XrbvobfBElOVMwFgtewj6CAf9uinFxBmI_QAyZ6IBxQ_hk6_YGtPEdiKjLMFNNGcXu0KnP-VjgT_izPk_rRC3O3mLMSB3GYuuHXRQZRlie8iuCetfvEUtBdDvpuUt6_eYi89PGz2SOqQDHXZkTpCZbQLX9bnQ_2al7-b66wS5DGlb3hmPg36zVnuaqpxagppX5l6y5wItQjgT53hpcF7eviY8h-kS7r7ybXcr9IkKI1DFq3iQ76i_8CPg45838DA857oY%3D)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a2262de2f5f94d9ba90696e9396b740b&_e=H-xm3o8cNi5su0-mBBCV0mlKvcZNop-UfuSj_XnmbraETCigWIkDvT4cZpMMS6ClOaPBNm_9wGbn0IwEgFWtkeAd5LvMlOOlmweUUfGrYIXICy1baN1PvMXGVEG3d5G7Yz32xTf-Xo2nBuD16AqX02KUEdQ7n7E3VEYzD6XrbvobfBElOVMwFgtewj6CAf9uinFxBmI_QAyZ6IBxQ_hk6_YGtPEdiKjLMFNNGcXu0KnP-VjgT_izPk_rRC3O3mLMSB3GYuuHXRQZRlie8iuCemcZ5Y5p5DQv0b4mJxe9rz_mIXd9k143WLQb4aeE-IiDsnnKcHXQkhqWFljd3Z3dDBwkt5O_5rwIFMOM3DhzavhTQOlzMXLcsrxkXvpcVfuHZe6j_xiCc_2ovkTwX3kMbiKik270fj5K6YZ4W7nNNn8%3D)

When we took back Virginia in 2021, we sent shockwaves through the entire Democrat Party.

[**We proved the job can be done and now our Republican Senate candidates need your help to spread our winning formula to take back the Senate!**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0f2cd58621354d44a270d40431d351c7&_e=qNXI1Kf8UHZ0y2QMVaYyBn_jt7bySDGqvdAsrBTnQVY7CK6m9ST8wkXHOebyDtGT2H6wfe-1nxfnCpRcPV-DQobRaXuDonmUNCF9Cqfx7kMggZPPzs9ubeYNUqhxJAMHKjGrCFZPi6gsBPkaYzq4okWsj0OAdp73k2hJ4rwzVK067PbmKJs4DAq0jTpWs3778IPVqM1eWZwAqJD-GHbwTcQdGiuujLMMToyQQ_gpE0gg6y-56iLzaBsOEsLzhIQ7LRpbwl14IswevkkWFJ-gIvtSH4USatgh21yaZZv-fmXA5ldWbJ8aCIyufJD8sYU1fG7TDyt8i-4MzF2_yXbBKaJn72ycszkjDLtNhTUUpz_TUMz8THE7NFAVuwyb8DqPOWa1FfQJX0S0TmOZirEWrVHidy3FWgYrlo70SsGF1jFAst0rxLOyo3fzzLBUaPCww8OgDce-fwvqx_6A7dXrRg%3D%3D)

Our 2021 victory in Virginia was just the start. Every Democrat megadonor and special interest group will spend millions to stop us.

clean_body: When we took back Virginia in 2021, we sent shockwaves through the entire Democrat Party. | | Hi Fellow American, When we took back Virginia in 2021, we sent shockwaves through the entire Democrat Party. We showed every Leftist activist and megadonor we had a winning formula for taking back our Country and reaching deep into communities that have been long controlled by Democrats for generations. It’s easy for Republicans to win elections in red states. The real challenge is winning back blue states WITHOUT sacrificing your conservative values. We MUST connect with voters in EVERY STATE on the issues that matter most – the economy, putting power back in parents (not the government’s) hands. That’s how I won, and how we will win again in 2024. Our 2021 victory in Virginia was just the start. Every Democrat megadonor and special interest group will spend millions to stop us. We took back Virginia because we were powered by our grassroots supporters, not billionaire megadonors. Thank you, Winsome Earle-Sears Lieutenant Governor Commonwealth of Virginia | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. With the help of you and this grassroots team, we made history last November – flipping four chambers, adding three new Democratic trifectas, and defending every single majority. **But we can’t take our foot off the gas now – the stakes are too high.**
State Democrats are facing a slew of special elections over the next two months – and the Virginia House and Senate are in play this November.
**Electing Democratic leaders who will support President Biden’s agenda in statehouses across the country is _critical_ to building a better future in your state. But it’s up to grassroots supporters like you to own a piece of this fight and give state Democrats the resources they need to go toe-to-toe against their Republican opponents. **
As an official member, you’ll be at the forefront of the fight to defeat extremist state Republicans, helping elect Democrats who will work to secure a progressive future in your state. **So can we count you in?**

But we can’t take our foot off the gas now – the stakes are too high. State Democrats are facing a slew of special elections over the next two months – and the Virginia House and Senate are in play this November. Electing Democratic leaders who will support President Biden’s agenda in statehouses across the country is critical to building a better future in your state. But it’s up to grassroots supporters like you to own a piece of this fight and give state Democrats the resources they need to go toe-to-toe against their Republican opponents. As an official member, you’ll be at the forefront of the fight to defeat extremist state Republicans, helping elect Democrats who will work to secure a progressive future in your state. subject: We started a movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
When we took back Virginia in 2021, we sent shockwaves through the entire Democrat Party. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=79ccc8e3e7994cc2bfe5480c332451a2&_t=sgPMb5AXVzwZkjozjBQH6PalErd2se79rTGzuP8NDr-bZUwFmKQHsbF8AEFqLIYh5bdzDljZDKSpas5PDPqCYG8r40BjIf-iJVktACDdqoA%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=79ccc8e3e7994cc2bfe5480c332451a2&_t=sgPMb5AXVzwZkjozjBQH6PalErd2se79rTGzuP8NDr-bZUwFmKQHsbF8AEFqLIYh5bdzDljZDKSpas5PDPqCYG8r40BjIf-iJVktACDdqoA%3D)

Hi Fellow American,

When we took back Virginia in 2021, we sent shockwaves through the entire Democrat Party.

We showed every Leftist activist and megadonor we had a winning formula for taking back our Country and reaching deep into communities that have been long controlled by Democrats for generations.

[**That’s why I’m emailing you today, to ask for your support to help us retake the Senate majority in 2024.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=79ccc8e3e7994cc2bfe5480c332451a2&_e=eD5CuHYTqetQrTkmkLpvo4FtOSV9f-CIPYrTjt8XoVBl4MHbAyHVuFs1qVC1IMXHxl2NOjzFi1868Zzn72npoY-TUlIuIQ1QYUcuQvRO0iPQQ2QkPtBcNnnkKnOLve1pHgLjdg9KJOztdAtcC0o_4u4yV05E5jZiAwqv4NXBgkdMFIb3Ng0BL9Ek_-ViRg4oiscaM2G6PSLxOQNysr6aBLj_ZKk1G8inWcjKLANfhzbAvdGtLDC726BFvOrkCG-vgaYdf1tJ7yAga4bkBDGDO33sEsxdcMuuka9squ1A4m0WSn6nL5AKFOKdT0ytxKydU4mDIPjLG3JWjKYbt8fFWlFXfA5dkZHn_sBwTehfrzJuTyqTgz-E-3qUSMIuIQdrF7d98tcH_tB4labgIOArJSTDb2rf43tacRGTgxKS-ERcKpdkENrQiAIbszlIInMK)

[ **HELP TAKE BACK AMERICA**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=79ccc8e3e7994cc2bfe5480c332451a2&_e=eD5CuHYTqetQrTkmkLpvo4FtOSV9f-CIPYrTjt8XoVBl4MHbAyHVuFs1qVC1IMXHxl2NOjzFi1868Zzn72npoY-TUlIuIQ1QYUcuQvRO0iPQQ2QkPtBcNnnkKnOLve1pHgLjdg9KJOztdAtcC0o_4u4yV05E5jZiAwqv4NXBgkdMFIb3Ng0BL9Ek_-ViRg4oiscaM2G6PSLxOQNysr6aBLj_ZKk1G8inWcjKLANfhzbAvdGtLDC726BFvOrkCG-vgaYdf1tJ7yAga4bkBDGDO33sEsxdcMuuka9squ1A4m1kQ0z1q4reQh5xUts1zylTvog4gVgaMP0tqHZKA0BK0SpdDcJYXLCAB0EXVRtLCTBqE3DbYJuOkRY0NvfX1Njugi7EYkmkOywSo6cUeqYtMCdI64VErPvhdoIsleb0tc6ccQjF0RluthkonuuBu3FS)
It’s easy for Republicans to win elections in red states. The real challenge is winning back blue states WITHOUT sacrificing your conservative values. [**We proved the job can be done and now our Republican Senate candidates need your help to spread our winning formula to take back the Senate!**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=79ccc8e3e7994cc2bfe5480c332451a2&_e=eD5CuHYTqetQrTkmkLpvo4FtOSV9f-CIPYrTjt8XoVBl4MHbAyHVuFs1qVC1IMXHxl2NOjzFi1868Zzn72npoY-TUlIuIQ1QYUcuQvRO0iPQQ2QkPtBcNnnkKnOLve1pHgLjdg9KJOztdAtcC0o_4u4yV05E5jZiAwqv4NXBgkdMFIb3Ng0BL9Ek_-ViRg4oiscaM2G6PSLxOQNysr6aBLj_ZKk1G8inWcjKLANfhzbAvdGtLDC726BFvOrkCG-vgaYdf1tJ7yAga4bkBDGDO33sEsxdcMuuka9squ1A4m3SWna8w94hWbQ0WquxPbZ92c9i4biHch_LSErhgS3H8Zo_miap0G7jqXudYsuTBO22FVHJfQ4dgKGurQ9nIfoWaAML9rlOjJTV1F-x7GmyFDJOp29VTxMuOcRZ3drNE8Z3SFyR7C7euIE7TFKHEu-N)

We MUST connect with voters in EVERY STATE on the issues that matter most – the economy, putting power back in parents (not the government’s) hands. That’s how I won, _and how we will win again in 2024._

Our 2021 victory in Virginia was just the start. Every Democrat megadonor and special interest group will spend millions to stop us.

[ **HELP TAKE BACK AMERICA**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=79ccc8e3e7994cc2bfe5480c332451a2&_e=eD5CuHYTqetQrTkmkLpvo4FtOSV9f-CIPYrTjt8XoVBl4MHbAyHVuFs1qVC1IMXHxl2NOjzFi1868Zzn72npoY-TUlIuIQ1QYUcuQvRO0iPQQ2QkPtBcNnnkKnOLve1pHgLjdg9KJOztdAtcC0o_4u4yV05E5jZiAwqv4NXBgkdMFIb3Ng0BL9Ek_-ViRg4oiscaM2G6PSLxOQNysr6aBLj_ZKk1G8inWcjKLANfhzbAvdGtLDC726BFvOrkCG-vgaYdf1tJ7yAga4bkBDGDO33sEsxdcMuuka9squ1A4m3_zxbQK6JwGG1O73nzSV_AGAzvsO2XlNeZX8gm_Eh0SDczVh1_4QBRnePx2DAoCY-nnO2ONEo8_rpmElI3S9CqvvBCoZX5YZLTD2wiQH6t7Ynp5kgB5p9IrOIQMWXHcA737DzNy0QlIEgkci0aCSxk)
We took back Virginia because we were powered by our grassroots supporters, not billionaire megadonors. [**Now we’re relying on you to take back America. Are you with me?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=79ccc8e3e7994cc2bfe5480c332451a2&_e=eD5CuHYTqetQrTkmkLpvo4FtOSV9f-CIPYrTjt8XoVBl4MHbAyHVuFs1qVC1IMXHxl2NOjzFi1868Zzn72npoY-TUlIuIQ1QYUcuQvRO0iPQQ2QkPtBcNnnkKnOLve1pHgLjdg9KJOztdAtcC0o_4u4yV05E5jZiAwqv4NXBgkdMFIb3Ng0BL9Ek_-ViRg4oiscaM2G6PSLxOQNysr6aBLj_ZKk1G8inWcjKLANfhzbAvdGtLDC726BFvOrkCG-vgaYdf1tJ7yAga4bkBDGDO33sEsxdcMuuka9squ1A4m3L-KW49yl2sNpeBNF6bte0VaRXG3LTxoy6ZmiuuJ2NeGN4C2qVcJhSgMSjiiOe0fDc5OdsW3It9NLDWwd0i1zfEyroh13jZY2ZwS4lX7NjK2YHA_UeE1e2f9TLs4o8y6vXZvdgWFq3GfIzvgRHyWm2)

Thank you,
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=79ccc8e3e7994cc2bfe5480c332451a2&_e=eD5CuHYTqetQrTkmkLpvo4FtOSV9f-CIPYrTjt8XoVDGEnrrWnJ-jqV7QMzk-4Xippl5dD2GzdL-5duTIRhcRdb8eGboMOhft8COfdWEYfpitMjSfYpeuJdcHNZQ5xWCj-_6TXNfvtF7DKZx9DZ1QFaQhGuF-b7H1yY6Xom1EgIw9iS0UPoV2G-Xg2uYknXoGbngTzLDH61W8-69nKvYfjl-19bSV_Dz-Rvd968il1PJLk5iL8vx8HTW7volWtM0pzhogCLUJEYsqRVlPhO5qWe_OBEQbc3ojjMU0gSWzZGYNO7BCIj92RLqIBiYfr6iGpL669snJG7O54ahg7FcCH4FH8CzLAf0UJ2u0E_Nwqk1oDhesisnyDax9yTP2UDQQTW38guLBU49Ic_e55uCiToF6ZezZHKubHmaEGYQEb2vj91DgziMlA3SHP9D1CCv)

[Medal of Honor Monday: Army Maj. Carlos C. Ogden](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9gulha815hojrjjbprih9vk2c0u614cig6qbt48_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t46mqj4t5m6gpr2d9j6kprct9jmkrncst66uqrf8j0c9j6f833cuh66pt5mkoj8cdlkupjb85nmerr4td5mupr2d1kumi34tdkumir8cllkoq34sdnmpqqcdd7msojactnk8gq48bi4bh28or0stjmap72cphm49fg)
It takes a lot of bravery to move ahead in battle by yourself. That's what Army Maj. Carlos Carnes Ogden did when his unit was pinned down in the early days of the quest to liberate France during World War II. His dedication and leadership earned him the Medal of Honor.
[See It Here](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7s3betviimpvl7r441id0grls4llr8m7pu60vs8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t46mqj4t5m6gpr2d9j6kprct9jmkrncst66uqrf8j0c9j6f833cuh66pt5mkoj8cdlkupjb85nmerr4td5mupr2d1kumi34tdkumir8cllkoq34sdnmpqqcdd7msojactnk8gq48bi4bh28or0stjmap72cphm49fg)

clean_body: When we took back Virginia in 2021, we sent shockwaves through the entire Democrat Party. | | Hi Fellow American, When we took back Virginia in 2021, we sent shockwaves through the entire Democrat Party. We showed every Leftist activist and megadonor we had a winning formula for taking back our Country and reaching deep into communities that have been long controlled by Democrats for generations. It’s easy for Republicans to win elections in red states. The real challenge is winning back blue states WITHOUT sacrificing your conservative values. We MUST connect with voters in EVERY STATE on the issues that matter most – the economy, putting power back in parents (not the government’s) hands. That’s how I won, and how we will win again in 2024. Our 2021 victory in Virginia was just the start. Every Democrat megadonor and special interest group will spend millions to stop us. We took back Virginia because we were powered by our grassroots supporters, not billionaire megadonors. name: Will Hurd
subject: Hey, I learned something new...
body:
I'm neither of those things...
| | | [](https://hurdwwillhurd.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ztuyhkd-jhlkdhlhhk-r/)
---
| | [](https://hurdwwillhurd.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ztuyhkd-jhlkdhlhhk-y/)
---
It's been a great week for our team. Our supporters rallied around us as we launched this movement on Thursday. Thousands of folks across America have joined _**Team Hurd**_... and our list of supporters is still growing. When I announced my candidacy for President, I was attacked with FALSE claims by both Trump and the DNC. This means they’re petrified. Trump knows we’re a threat. Biden knows I’ll beat him. That’s why I’m the best candidate in this race.
---
| | [](https://hurdwwillhurd.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ztuyhkd-jhlkdhlhhk-j/)
---
| [](https://hurdwwillhurd.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ztuyhkd-jhlkdhlhhk-t/)
---
| | While the irony isn't lost on me, THIS is the problem I want to fix in America's political arena. Status quo politicians have the fringes of the parties controlling the narrative. _**I'm neither of those things.**_ I am a common sense, modern Republican who wants to build a better country and solve our complicated problems. If you are a part of the exhausted majority like me, let's do something different because we're better together. [**Donate $1 or more today and let's do this thing.**](https://hurdwwillhurd.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ztuyhkd-jhlkdhlhhk-i/) Thank you, **Will Hurd**

## Miracles Are Not Eough
---
This past WKND at [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=23149798.12865.1.5cb52b5413a3b252a3870cf4806999dc) OKC & Tulsa, I preached on a very interesting thought from our series on the **Book of Acts**. Sermon Title: [The Book of Acts Pt. 10 - Miracles Are NOT Enough](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=23149798.12866.1.367b8a7b1f4127d1fcd68a5fd2bb148c) Although, this message will provoke some controversy, I am confident it will bless you because I saw the results on Saturday night in OKC and Sunday morning in Tulsa. Watch it here: [https://youtube.com/live/JDtyxl9tKR8](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=23149798.12867.1.919e9e4687db2bdc90ef7988d9396620) Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=23149798.12868.1.e4174c5b0d09248dd7ff04a81458a556), GAB, [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=23149798.12869.1.f639961420eaacd1381cd9845e175ab2), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=23149798.12870.1.1336cdaf4e8d9d749bf64018315ff56f), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=23149798.12871.1.e1f5b1b0f638cfa7e90db8d0e283fa91), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=23149798.12872.1.eef99fbd2ac3e9632490e96f7808422f), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=23149798.12873.1.04c3201d4b7ce8f3a88a2085041ef1ef)). [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=23149798.12874.1.ca75d3b959e4a3a01e10d3b3851d26d0)
---
| | [ Partner w/Sheridan.Church ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=23149798.12875.1.4e1bfbbce678ddb3b48776c421b1074b)
---
---
## The Gay & Trans Agenda
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=23149798.12876.1.92462eb6259cb0c269db20fa95cf8d26)
---
On Friday, two weeks ago, I announced I was taking our church where few churches would dare to go by addressing the **Gay & Trans Agenda** in America.
Last night in **Tulsa** something like we have never seen took place.
Instead of a tornado coming through which carves a path of destruction in a town or city, the **entire** Tulsa Metro was hit with destructive **winds over 100mph** and the vast majority of the city lost power.
It was as if the enemy did not want a certain message being broadcast out from Tulsa...
Fortunately, we had power at [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=23149798.12877.1.d61addcc0fc1c8c3eba952543c7a2a7a) for both our 9 & 11am services even though the businesses around us did not. However, our internet service was _unavailable_ and our services were not streamed live.
Thankfully the services were recorded since we had power and the message is now available to be seen across America.
Here is last week's message: **[The Gay& Trans Agenda In America](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=23149798.12878.1.d828bfbaf55b60269d56af377bcc06f5)**
Watch here: [https://youtu.be/U-Rkn14_hGM](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=23149798.12879.1.cb135bcebffc337ab379967690cf865e)
---
## The Book Of Daniel
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=23149798.12880.1.4d3f933b2e99f53dd719e1bcc4134d5e)
---
We just launched a NEW mid-week series at [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=23149798.12881.1.e398d2d52a89d5d1bc89495574ba3da1) over the [Book of Daniel](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=23149798.12882.1.dd563933a50969ae23aeb82aa01ef637).
We will go **verse by verse** through Daniel every Wednesday at 7pm CT at our Tulsa campus.
Watch here: [Daniel Pt. 1 - The Key](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=23149798.12883.1.ba52622153ff8a79af29f3cef59b0337)

subject: If you agree with just one of these principles...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Somewhere along the way, America forgot it was founded on truth. The politicians and media don't want you to be reminded of thes
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z49f7tgsulrle5mbpqs8n4pr8dddej0pv6v3bsdo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tdk6kq66phjcpijep9j69rb5dhlm9hbep30eeqj9cr5coobedln6lrm0s5kepjjfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3collmkrrep366lgb6p9nm2qmash1k8gn48n24hhm1pr7c3gm2oj7c8iv0)

| [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z0quhdnv8gommga1ai025scluca8c221luso1iv0_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctge2ob2cth2bs)

Friend,

**TRUTH.** There's only one. Not yours, not mine. Just pure TRUTH. In today's bureaucratic political climate where spin is all the Administrative state knows how to do, we stand by cold-hard facts. I'm not afraid to say them:
|
**God** is real.
There are **two** genders.
Human flourishing requires **fossil fuels**.
**Reverse racism** is racism.
An open border is **no border**.
**Parents** determine the education of their children.
The **nuclear family** is the greatest form of governance known to mankind.
**Capitalism** lifts people up from poverty.
There are three branches of the U.S. government, **not four**.
The **U.S. Constitution** is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history. | [** CHIP IN IF YOU BELIEVE IN THE TRUTH **](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z8muh5d0ljuhc9hfajtc034vai93is8i2ri29bqg_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctge2ob2cth2bs)
---

America was founded on these truths that we find sacred and undeniable. **Without these truths, our standing as a nation would mean nothing.**

If you agree with these 10 TRUTHS, _**[I need you on my team.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z9i603cq1lmo7eu5dnh3eh47n17po4fdgf5d4llo_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctge2ob2cth2bs)**_

This is about more than a campaign. It is a movement to revive this great nation. **[Will you join me today by chipping in $1 or more?](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zqnq15j9bua3fi9lcbmvkm7ckbdqa8o2cl2mj93o_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctge2ob2cth2bs)**

Thanks,

[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zbb79udp7mcl6dv7215cbjqgm0m369mqs8tj91eo_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctge2ob2cth2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** STAND WITH THE TRUTH **](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zn287mdh7sc7bk4ebd9qrcgpsevotcfjdd1sbddg_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctge2ob2cth2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.
[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zm0ndn1qqan8tqsahkps721pclqgcbfpnggl0hog_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctge2ob2cth2bs)

---
| [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z20isv5bk6h67abd1m9r9gt18l6f5lueg7si77mg_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctge2ob2cth2bs) | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2za0jea2ude66b1sj4ka1077jejud9mfdh3va50a8_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctge2ob2cth2bs) | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zs4cc4kj4dimh6oi52ckam53gtg58ugjbvhe7k08_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctge2ob2cth2bs)
---|---|---

subject: Russian Mutiny Aftermath, America Gets Old, and a Man Flies 23 Million Miles
body:
An attempted armed mutiny against Russian military leaders reveals "real cracks" in President Putin's authority, Secretary of State Antony Blinken said this weekend, following a strange uprising by Russia's Wagner Group mercenaries.

| | | [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJydjrGOwjAQRL8m7ojWXjsJhYu7gg4aCkrLZ6-JwYlRYpD4eyykk664CmnKN2-GNO_6YeilBGBeByJByKIWIBCQK9hKxWUbgiOUCnvkCEPnGwnkY8lLe8lxLiOF9MwPWlqXJzbqoJzlFVaD66UCua12UATBehS8-2FJj6Xc1ga_GrGr-cdy2pu9jSnO54OdSJeQzW3JqwHccLURaI42FbMSeUNTBfNsXfSVITeSuxrOFn25XyklOzXi21Ow91Tq8V-i_VN7L5YPRl71WWnS)

# MONday, JUNE 26, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** Today marks the 75th anniversary of the massive Berlin airlift, organized by America to thwart a Russian blockade of Berlin. The airlift, dubbed "Operation Vittles," lasted a year until Moscow relented. It marked the beginning of the Cold War. In today's Flyover, we're discussing Russia's uncertain situation in the wake of mutiny, the median age in America hitting a record high, and a United Airlines flyer who's flown 23 million miles and made a lot of money doing it.

Have any suggestions? [Please send us a note](mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover)**** and let us know. We read every email and value your ideas! ## Putin Weakened in Coup Aftermath
An attempted armed mutiny against Russian military leaders reveals ["real cracks" in President Putin's ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7Fu7CAQAL8GOlvsAmtcULzmunttSsuG5Y4IG8smZ-Xvo0uddkYaaT7u033OJW-P__PKvqU6zaHlF0-KOqQO9YQy-sSMrCV7IDcMgzPayKenMICz46ghkIZFO6t1oIQppkWRHWX2qFArQlKjBet6BxZCUmPiaMCkKIzimFs9-s-at_bkVL7ri48-1FUW_2xtP4X-J_Am8HZdV78s4e0E3ja-zjesR4kdfx11545IgQED8vBxv3Ip-aRBGPVY51x-m-3vxZ8AAAD__5UUUI4)authority, Secretary of State Antony Blinken said this weekend, following a strange uprising by Russia's Wagner Group mercenaries.

The Wagner leader, Yevgeny Prigozhin, seized two Russian cities on his way to Moscow, where troops were posted on the streets. Putin then granted Prigozhin amnesty and let him leave the country.

The short-lived revolt [weakened Putin,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLtu4zAQAL9G6miQy6cKFte487VXCmtxKe2FlgSKtpB8feDUKQfTDObfbbwhF17nv_ig2PI24tT4RaN0ApwAPUKfYiYC0j1F5YL3Phht-iVaR2nAySpyUlkYEIz3SianBumVhp4jSNDSgZODVTZcgrJqynLIlIwyOXVGUuK21cv_jde2UC6f24vqZdoefYlLa_vR6T8dXDu44r7SebzVG2rjqVAH1_o8Dkbx_KjIK4kTqzhxXqmKvfK8fS28ijsVrM9DJMIinA9grE1pMqBNUO6e75B80iGkgAP2Nab95FL4cL4zcn4gl5-i9vug7wAAAP__Japl-A) global leaders say, and raises the question of how this affects the war in Ukraine. Neither Putin nor Prigozhin has spoken publicly since the amnesty deal was granted.
## Median Age in U.S. Hits Record High
The U.S. Census reported that the median age in America has now reached [nearly 40,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1u8yAUxvGrgY0IDh92BoZ38ZZ37WgRc4BTYRNhmqp3XzXq2OkZfsMj_d9u6y1QpSP_Dzv6kdoatkFPXKUT4AToFXj0CRFQc_TKzdM0zUYbXrzeJpQxqmt0SVkDyQZ1t0FqZY0xKXLyIEFLB05erbLzZVZWbUleE0ajTIrMSIw0Wr-8NzpGwVS_2hP7ZWs7r76M8TiZ_sdgYbCMgoVq_TEGy722fP6uuHfCREcWvb3QSKfdpMTHKXaMFA4RMopC4xQdt9ajKJSLoEOABGCw8O7j45NqpdNNzMi8B3o98fF3lO8AAAD__7GRYeg) compared to 35 in 2000 and 30 in 1980. And it's likely to keep going higher.

There are two reasons the median age is rising: Lower birth rates combined with longer lifespans mean more old folks and fewer young ones. The [median age is over 40 ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1u8yAUxvGrgY0IDh92BoZ38ZZ37WgRc4BTYRNhmqp3XzXq2OkZfsMj_d9u6y1QpSP_Dzv6kdoatkFPXKUT4AToFXj0CRFQc_TKzdM0zUYbXrzeJpQxqmt0SVkDyQZ1t0FqZY0xKXLyIEFLB05erbLzZVZWbUleE0ajTIrMSIw0Wr-8NzpGwVS_2hP7ZWs7r76M8TiZ_sdgYbCMgoVq_TEGy722fP6uuHfCREcWvb3QSKfdpMTHKXaMFA4RMopC4xQdt9ajKJSLoEOABGCw8O7j45NqpdNNzMi8B3o98fF3lO8AAAD__7GRYeg)already in 17 states.

The graying of America has significant implications for jobs, the economy, healthcare, and education. The aging population already keeps the labor market tight, creating generational friction.

_Flying together with our sponsor_ **How To Avoid Serious Dental Damage
**
Going to the dentist doesn't have to be scary, especially if you've taken the proper steps to protect your teeth. Brushing, flossing, and wearing a night guard are all great ways to prevent damage like plaque buildup, chipping, and cracking.

Not-so-fun fact: when you clench your jaw, you're putting pounds of pressure on your teeth. clean_body: An attempted armed mutiny against Russian military leaders reveals "real cracks" in President Putin's authority, Secretary of State Antony Blinken said this weekend, following a strange uprising by Russia's Wagner Group mercenaries. | | | | | | MONday, JUNE 26, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today marks the 75th anniversary of the massive Berlin airlift, organized by America to thwart a Russian blockade of Berlin. The airlift, dubbed "Operation Vittles," lasted a year until Moscow relented. It marked the beginning of the Cold War. In today's Flyover, we're discussing Russia's uncertain situation in the wake of mutiny, the median age in America hitting a record high, and a United Airlines flyer who's flown 23 million miles and made a lot of money doing it. Have any suggestions? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover** and let us know. We read every email and value your ideas! If this is your first time reading The Flyover , and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying the Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, . | Putin Weakened in Coup Aftermath An attempted armed mutiny against Russian military leaders reveals , Secretary of State Antony Blinken said this weekend, following a strange uprising by Russia's Wagner Group mercenaries. The Wagner leader, Yevgeny Prigozhin, seized two Russian cities on his way to Moscow, where troops were posted on the streets. Putin then granted Prigozhin amnesty and let him leave the country. The short-lived revolt global leaders say, and raises the question of how this affects the war in Ukraine. Neither Putin nor Prigozhin has spoken publicly since the amnesty deal was granted. Median Age in U.S. Hits Record High The U.S. Census reported that the median age in America has now reached compared to 35 in 2000 and 30 in 1980. And it's likely to keep going higher. There are two reasons the median age is rising: Lower birth rates combined with longer lifespans mean more old folks and fewer young ones. The in 17 states. The graying of America has significant implications for jobs, the economy, healthcare, and education. The aging population already keeps the labor market tight, creating generational friction. Doomed Sub Cost $1.2 Million to Find The rescue mission to find the Titan sub cost an , paid by the Coast Guard and other rescuers. A litany of potential has come to light in the wake of the sub's implosion. No lawsuits have been filed yet, but lawyers have taken to social media to say that iron-clad. Two passengers, a wealthy father and son from Pakistan, were on the Titan only because a the invitation. Billionaire Jay Bloom says he and his son Sean were invited but turned it down. subject: Stop Out-of-Control Executive Powers
body:
|

| | |
---
| We need your help! [Stop Out-of-Control Executive Powers](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/6L5H22x4YK6IgkWbPh9J2g)We all remember when, under the guise of "public health", government officials ruined businesses, closed churches, and tried to control your life. Our governor declared many small mom and pop businesses "non-essential", destroying their life's work and their lives.. Now we see the Uniform Law Commission (ULC) attempting to expand the power of government even more so that when they devise the next "emergency", government officials can take more control of your life.[Sign the Petition](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/6L5H22x4YK6IgkWbPh9J2g)The Mississippi Freedom Caucus has joined others across the nation in demanding this attempt be stopped! If government power is expanded across our nation, our constitutionally protected God-given rights will be lost. Governors and local politicians love the ability to control your life, but they must be stopped before it is too late.We need you to join us and put a swift end to this overt attempt to destroy the freedom and liberty that we enjoy. Below is a copy of the joint statement signed by 11 Freedom Caucus chairs across our nation. Add your name to this statement so we can deliver this to every Mississippi State Representative and Senator demanding they limit the emergency authority of the Governor and protect your rights.[Sign the Petition](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/6L5H22x4YK6IgkWbPh9J2g)|

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Stop Roundup from hurting monarchs
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1843338?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED:_Endangered monarchs_ are DYING while Bayer-Monsanto profits from pollinator-toxic pesticides!** Vibrant orange and black displays once filled the autumn air during monarch butterflies’ epic migration. But North American monarchs have seen a _**90% POPULATION CRASH**_ in just two decades! The few monarchs that still embark on this journey lay their eggs along the way. But milkweed plants -- **the only food source for young caterpillars and the only place where monarchs can lay their eggs** \-- are disappearing. In fact, over the past two decades, _**850 million milkweed plants have vanished!**_ **Pesticide giant Bayer-Monsanto sells toxic chemicals that KILL MILKWEED and drive monarch declines![Please, Friend, stand up to greedy Bayer-Monsanto and help SAVE endangered monarchs before it’s too late. Send your message by 11:59 pm TONIGHT!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1843339?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1843340?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Monarch butterflies are officially _**ENDANGERED**_ \-- meaning they are at a **“high risk of global extinction.”** If Bayer-Monsanto continues to sell pesticides like Roundup that kill milkweed, _**we might lose monarchs forever!**_
But it’s not just monarchs that are in danger. Roundup’s key ingredient has been linked to **cancer, reproductive harm, and other serious health risks** in humans, with **children being the most vulnerable.** That doesn’t stop Bayer-Monsanto from selling these dangerous chemicals.
Bayer-Monsanto has**MANIPULATED** science and **LIED** to the public about the **dangers of its pesticides** to evade regulations. It’s clear that they’ll do what it takes to keep the profits rolling in despite the devastating consequences to monarchs, other pollinators, and people. [**If just 1 of every 14 people reading this email takes action, we can hit our goal and fight toxic pesticides that hurt people, pollinators, and the planet. Act now!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1843341?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1843340?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Friends of the Earth**
|
##### Contact Us:
Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](foe.org/about-us/contact/)
---

[Click here to unsubscribe](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/subscribe?campaignpageurl=https%3A%2F%2Faction.foe.org%2Fpage%2F2555%2Fsubscriptions%2F1%3Fea.broadcast.id%3D244631&ea.campaigner.email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC)

name: Al Franken via Blue Amp Action
subject: Democrats have to take this seat to take back the House, and the first FEC reporting deadline is only FOUR DAYS away! Biden won this swing district by 4% in 2020 and I know Josh can win it in 2024 – with our help!
body:
first big deadline
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T52d6b285-fc03-4ad9-a237-7f0accec5858/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, I got a favor to ask you. [My friend and former Senate counsel Josh Riley is running for Congress in NY-19, and his first FEC deadline is just FOUR DAYS away. Will you join me right now by splitting a contribution of $20 or more between Josh Riley and Blue Amp Action?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T37e0db2a-faf2-446a-b6e9-e96ff0521a82/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfaf88f71-df9a-4d7c-98b4-fd9b6e9b0dcf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I can’t say enough good things about Josh. Josh is the hardest working person I know. Together we passed bills expanding rights for survivors of domestic abuse and providing new funding for addiction treatment and mental health programs. We also made a lot of Republican witnesses look very bad. Josh really cares about all the stuff I care about – and probably the stuff you care about too!
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9f4307e7-783f-4f1f-8212-b47e76a1485b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| If that isn’t enough to convince you, NY-19 is a must-win for Democrats to take back the House. Cook Political Report, Sabato’s Crystal Ball, and all the other smart people who know this stuff have already rated it a “toss-up.” It’s a true swing district, but Biden won it by 4% in 2020 and I know Josh can win it in 2024 – with our help! So this is pretty much the full package: a great candidate who will always do what’s right, and a big race we absolutely have to win. [Can Josh and I count on your support? The first big fundraising deadline of Josh’s campaign is coming up, and all eyes are on him. Please split a contribution between Blue Amp Action and Josh’s campaign today.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1ddf544d-0e7a-4aa3-9c88-bd955625482e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks, Al **[PS - As you may know, I always end with a P.S. that’s just an excuse for another ask. This is a super important deadline, so please chip in what you can!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T94c9b376-332b-45e5-8402-6065723811ec/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
| | |
---

| Ron DeSantis is the 46th Governor of Florida.

A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL
---
mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.

Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America's veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

---
| Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

In a major victory for Alabama voters and democracy, SCOTUS ruled in favor of plaintiffs supported by our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation, in _Allen v. Milligan._
**Join our National Volunteer Call tonight, as we discuss how these decisions will impact voters across the nation.[These decisions will shape our democracy and All On The Line wants to ensure you have all the information and know the next steps.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65421233/413368892/684926256?utm_campaign=20230626_AOTL_O_NatlVolJune_RedLiteXOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYxN2M5ZmY4LTE4MTQtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=K7JFrioYZB8epdXUZiV0ENocPGTu4dBzw3SKuuEf2pE=&emci=d48c72c2-e211-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=617c9ff8-1814-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=8431045)**

**We will also explore other redistricting news from across the country and provide updates on the Ohio "Vote No In August" ballot measure campaign.**

name: SmartAsset
subject: Average Retirement Savings By Age: Are You Normal?
body:
Many Americans worry they’re not saving enough for retirement, and rightfully so.

| | | |
---
|
# Average Retirement Savings By Age: Are You Normal?
---
| Research behind how much Americans save, and who feels most confident about their plan
---
| | |
---
| Many Americans worry they’re not saving enough for retirement, and rightfully so.

The National Institute of Retirement Security reports: Approximately 40 million households have no retirement savings.1

It’s never too late to get started. Although results are never guaranteed and risks are involved, [well-managed investments may potentially compound over time.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjqttn9mrpuv9ktnv0irub9lgkjopkfv9pikfjm0_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctieaoj4cjh2bs)

Fidelity reported in May 2022 that the average 401(k) balance for those who've been saving for over 10 years averaged over $380,000.2

[Find out the recommended savings for your age here.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrtaq4cqqnd71n3sfvv3k56dol56apqkun8id10o_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctieaoj4cjh2bs)

Of course, saving for retirement is different for everyone. If you feel like you're behind in savings, want to make sure you're on track, or want to find investment vehicles to help you save more, talking to an advisor can help you [set and execute a retirement plan.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9ivqgjtnaj5f8kftn0odnuh34fuvtsdk4qf56m8_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctieaoj4cjh2bs)

Not sure where to start? We created [a free quiz](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zg98bm32kbgj1dpcrkvs6sljmirh3b3o8i8mq3g0_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctieaoj4cjh2bs) to help Americans find vetted financial advisors who serve your area, obligated to work in your best interest. It's never too late to get your finances straight.

[Get your financial advisor matches today »](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkverct9pf83ppe8phgoi7o9cqdl7jq68g1pjj2o_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctieaoj4cjh2bs)

Get retirement ready. Take this no-cost quiz to get matched with up to 3 vetted financial advisors serving your area.

name: SmartAsset
subject: Average Retirement Savings By Age: Are You Normal?
body:
Many Americans worry they’re not saving enough for retirement, and rightfully so.

| | | |
---
|
# Average Retirement Savings By Age: Are You Normal?
---
| Research behind how much Americans save, and who feels most confident about their plan
---
| | |
---
| Many Americans worry they’re not saving enough for retirement, and rightfully so.

The National Institute of Retirement Security reports: Approximately 40 million households have no retirement savings.1

It’s never too late to get started. Although results are never guaranteed and risks are involved, [well-managed investments may potentially compound over time.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrp235fo5cirqbbqipocg6j1crqr5q9r1s6svqoo_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctieeo36cjh2bs)

Fidelity reported in May 2022 that the average 401(k) balance for those who've been saving for over 10 years averaged over $380,000.2

[Find out the recommended savings for your age here.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpot2a5octjedp76lqt8kp0nrm0kprkt7o2bvk3o_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctieeo36cjh2bs)

Of course, saving for retirement is different for everyone. If you feel like you're behind in savings, want to make sure you're on track, or want to find investment vehicles to help you save more, talking to an advisor can help you [set and execute a retirement plan.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zs2fapqgdue0fq37bplihhgv6u2ssbfl4gsul878_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctieeo36cjh2bs)

Not sure where to start? We created [a free quiz](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zc6cggvkihgcvf6h21blatjlsfkkkeo75pjo6tlo_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctieeo36cjh2bs) to help Americans find vetted financial advisors who serve your area, obligated to work in your best interest. It's never too late to get your finances straight.

[Get your financial advisor matches today »](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zf646ftrc5iflhccaf58tjq3ie66pe42eb1f43b0_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctieeo36cjh2bs)
---
|
---
| **Try SmartAsset's Financial Advisor Matching Tool**
Get retirement ready. Take this no-cost quiz to get matched with up to 3 vetted financial advisors serving your area.
---

2\. [Building Financial Futures", Fidelity (May 2022).](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znm6g59kebbui5nrmpck5uckcb352mo9jefc53pg_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctieeo36cjh2bs)

name: SmartAsset
subject: Average Retirement Savings By Age: Are You Normal?
body:
Many Americans worry they’re not saving enough for retirement, and rightfully so.

| | | |
---
|
# Average Retirement Savings By Age: Are You Normal?
---
| Research behind how much Americans save, and who feels most confident about their plan
---
| | |
---
| Many Americans worry they’re not saving enough for retirement, and rightfully so.

The National Institute of Retirement Security reports: Approximately 40 million households have no retirement savings.1

It’s never too late to get started. Although results are never guaranteed and risks are involved, [well-managed investments may potentially compound over time.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26413%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6bhkqeEJsYmN9gqvehw5Zw&sysid=1)

Fidelity reported in May 2022 that the average 401(k) balance for those who've been saving for over 10 years averaged over $380,000.2

[Find out the recommended savings for your age here.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26414%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CQT%2ftTuX8%2bytHzAI33A6jA&sysid=1)

Of course, saving for retirement is different for everyone. If you feel like you're behind in savings, want to make sure you're on track, or want to find investment vehicles to help you save more, talking to an advisor can help you [set and execute a retirement plan.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26425%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=d3I8FIENlZLvQ5C35B2MEw&sysid=1)

Not sure where to start? We created [a free quiz](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26426%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Zo30nPI%2bHf1TZzdjdEwrbw&sysid=1) to help Americans find vetted financial advisors who serve your area, obligated to work in your best interest. It's never too late to get your finances straight.

[Get your financial advisor matches today »](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26427%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=G3yAYPdvsYe%2fwnlpDUBRHw&sysid=1)

Get retirement ready. Take this no-cost quiz to get matched with up to 3 vetted financial advisors serving your area.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7b2ck5gjnv0jaac2afbk4q4tgbv67r4en7ffe98_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctie1o72cph2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2g588chf9ns0cp6hm09623sics7qt79n9ta0cb0_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctie1o72cph2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfphuvodr20qgr95q04hrjd3mj8q52ekbmcv9jgo_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctie1o72cph2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zulvdogd5ekfba2t9nujh8bjid7l1ua18p0f1ar0_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctie1o72cph2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

clean_body: There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried | | | | | Fellow American, There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. In addition to the passing of the Respect for Marriage Act , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed. This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life. Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith? Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America. Thank you for your consideration. Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens. | | Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. American Action News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

Red flag laws, or Extreme Risk Protection Orders (ERPO), require a person to temporarily surrender firearms after that person is found to be a danger to themselves, their families, or the community at large.
Extreme risk laws have been held to be constitutional time and time again and give the authorities the ability to mitigate harm before it happens.
We can’t keep using a constitutional scapegoat as an excuse to refrain from taking action on guns: we can and must step up to protect our communities from harm. [**Will you add your name as a community supporter of red flag laws?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65423924/413378183/-1680469574?refcode=AU_TNDP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230626_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjE5NTM5Yy0yMjE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pbHIEUhyM0zFCLu32cxSl_ZPwgZrl52AWXLMCWdy2bg=&emci=380d3731-3811-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=f619539c-2214-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=6362892)

name: Sue Altman
subject: building on your work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Altman for Congress
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/ZQJ7R5Kxn0-MEsDNXYCLTA2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ZQJ7R5Kxn0-MEsDNXYCLTA2]

Friend,

My name is Sue Altman. I'm a Democrat running for Congress in New Jersey's 7th District and I would be honored to continue to build on the work that Congressman Malinowski and grassroots supporters have done across the district. As a former professional basketball player, I'm not just running this campaign — I'm playing to win. I can tell you that our race will be one of the most competitive in the entire country.

Winning in swing districts like ours is the key to taking back the House for Democrats next year, which means we need to put in the work right now to make sure we're ready to compete with Republicans and their mega-donors.

NJ-07 is the ultimate swing district and a prime pickup opportunity for Democrats. In 2020, Joe Biden won our district by nearly 4 points, and in 2022, my Republican opponent won here by less than 3 points or just 9,000 votes.

Since getting to Congress, he has empowered Kevin McCarthy and the rest of the extremist Republicans as they ignore the gun violence crisis and attack Social Security, Medicare, abortion access, and more. In fact, he has a "nearly identical voting record to Marjorie Taylor Greene" according to local reporting.

These are not our Jersey values. I'm in this race to deliver for the communities that raised me. New Jersey deserves competent, honest, and tough leadership — not a career politician who enables the extremists in the Republican Party, from Marjorie Taylor Greene to Donald Trump.

This race is just gearing up, and I need your early input to make sure my campaign is focused on the most important issues. Hearing from supporters like you makes me a better candidate and strengthens our campaign as we prepare for a tough fight ahead.

We'll win this race if we have everyone's voice guiding our campaign, so will you tell me what's on your mind by completing our official Team Altman Priorities Survey today? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ZQJ7R5Kxn0-MEsDNXYCLTA2]

TAKE THE SURVEY [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ZQJ7R5Kxn0-MEsDNXYCLTA2]

Like I said, this will be a tough fight, But if there's one thing I learned from my years playing and coaching basketball, it's that nothing is more important than my team.

Thanks for being on our team from the very beginning. More soon,

Sue
Sue Altman is running for Congress to deliver competent leadership that shares our Jersey values. Help elect Sue and take back the House for Democrats by chipping in today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sa-nbi-footer?amount=10]
DONATE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sa-nbi-footer?amount=10]
Paid for by Altman for Congress
PO Box 267
Lambertville, NJ 08530
United States

Hey there Friend, Despite what the mainstream media and D.C. political class think of you, Troy knows you’re wise to Washington’s schemes. **That’s precisely why Troy loves having you as part of this TRUTH-TELLING TEAM.** The far-left Democrats want to divide us through fear and propaganda, narratives driven by Big Government Gimmicks driving radicalism, and unfortunately, fundraising dollars to fuel their far-left agenda. We take a different approach with our communications with you. Instead of guilt-tripping you into donating, we want to inspire you to take action through transparency and accountability. _Not one dollar_ you send to partner with our America First mission is wasted, nor misused for personal gain. **It’s your hard-earned support that Troy takes seriously to do the hard work in Washington. Period.** With that said, we do have big fundraising goals and deadlines coming up to prepare for the 2024 campaign cycle. As Texans, we’re known for being straight shooters, and our shared aim of keeping Texas free is our number one priority.
---

name: Tennessee Voter Project
subject: Tennessee Voter Project is full of PRIDE for Tennessee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TN Voter Project; Isaac Kimes, Esq
body:
https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject [https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject]
June 26, 2023
Dear friend,
As we approach the end of Pride Month, we want to celebrate the progress we have made and invite you to join us in the work ahead of us.
Tennessee Voter Project unequivocally supports our LGBTQ+ community and candidates who are committed to advocating for LGBTQ+ rights and protections in Tennessee.
TVP is proud to support candidates and members of the LGBTQ+ community like Representative Torrey Harris, one of Tennessee's first open LGBTQ+ lawmakers, and Knox City Council hopeful Cameron Brooks [votecameronbrooks.com] . We will continue to support electing more LGBTQ+ representation at every level of elected office.
HELP US ELECT LGBTQ+ CANDIDATES AND ADVOCATES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1]
Recent attacks on LGBTQ+ rights by the GOP in Tennessee highlight the urgency of our work to elect more LGBTQ+ candidates and advocates. Our endorsed candidates have fought tooth and nail against the efforts to keep LGBTQ+ representation and history out of our textbooks, ban healthcare for transgender youth, and codify discrimination into state law.
But they can't do this work alone. Please consider donating to TVP so we can elect more LGBTQ+ candidates and advocates into office. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1]
As we wrap this Pride Month, let us join together and recommit to making Tennessee an inclusive state that celebrates our diversity.
Thanks for your support,
Tennessee Voter Project Staff

clean_body: [] June 26, 2023 Dear friend, As we approach the end of Pride Month, we want to celebrate the progress we have made and invite you to join us in the work ahead of us. Tennessee Voter Project unequivocally supports our LGBTQ+ community and candidates who are committed to advocating for LGBTQ+ rights and protections in Tennessee. TVP is proud to support candidates and members of the LGBTQ+ community like Representative Torrey Harris, one of Tennessee's first open LGBTQ+ lawmakers, and Knox City Council hopeful Cameron Brooks [votecameronbrooks.com] . We will continue to support electing more LGBTQ+ representation at every level of elected office. HELP US ELECT LGBTQ+ CANDIDATES AND ADVOCATES [] Recent attacks on LGBTQ+ rights by the GOP in Tennessee highlight the urgency of our work to elect more LGBTQ+ candidates and advocates. Our endorsed candidates have fought tooth and nail against the efforts to keep LGBTQ+ representation and history out of our textbooks, ban healthcare for transgender youth, and codify discrimination into state law. But they can't do this work alone. Please consider donating to TVP so we can elect more LGBTQ+ candidates and advocates into office. [] As we wrap this Pride Month, let us join together and recommit to making Tennessee an inclusive state that celebrates our diversity. Thanks for your support, Tennessee Voter Project Staff If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Express Donate: $25 [] Express Donate: $50 [] Express Donate: $100 [] Express Donate: $250 [] Express Donate: $500 [] Express Donate: $1000 [] Or, donate another amount [] Visit Our Website [] Check Your Voter Registration Status [] Register to Vote [] [] [] Paid for by TN Voter Project; Isaac Kimes, Esq. body:

Fellow Conservative, This is our most important deadline in years. Our “Top Ten” U.S. Senate race here in Texas is heating up and we can’t afford to fall short. _**Right now, at this early stage, it’s a _5-POINT RACE_ between me and Colin Allred!**_ The clock is ticking and it’s vital that we raise the funds we need to ramp up our grassroots efforts across Texas this summer. This seat could make all the difference in our fight to **TAKE BACK THE SENATE** in 2024. [**_Rush your most generous possible donation to Keep Texas Red >>>_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zguct6954u2ghq6hencshd2j2718hv477aei3klg_rp22sh2s8i66o77c3g60or0c3h2bs)

Radical leftists across America are all-in behind Colin Allred. They’re flooding his campaign war chest with big checks to help him post strong numbers and build early momentum... and they’re just getting started. **I’m counting on YOU and patriots across America to show these radicals that WE WON’T LET UP in the fight to take back our country!** _If you have already pitched in this month, I’m asking you to donate again. _

_If you haven’t donated yet, I hope to hear from you and know that you’re on board._ The End-of-Quarter deadline is coming up fast THIS FRIDAY at midnight! name: Colin Allred
subject: we’re still short of our goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18981?t=1001&akid=3346%2E346206%2E6w5q20 ][IMG]

Hi, Peter, it's Colin, and I had to reach out one more time
before our end-of-quarter deadline – the first major public fundraising
goal of this campaign – because unfortunately, we're still short of our
$750,000 goal.

Our ability to defeat Ted Cruz depends on reaching critical fundraising
goals like this one. 2018 was the most expensive Senate race Texas has
ever seen, and Democrats came within 2.6% of defeating Ted Cruz.

And listen: A new poll says 14% of Texas voters are undecided – so we need
to be able to reach each and every voter to win this race.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18981?t=1002&akid=3346%2E346206%2E6w5q20 ]Please, Peter, I'm personally asking: Will you chip in $25,
or whatever you can spare, and split a donation between my campaign and
Charles Booker before my first public fundraising deadline on Friday?
Every dollar helps in our fight to defeat Ted Cruz.

Here's the best link to make your gift: [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18981?t=1003&akid=3346%2E346206%2E6w5q20 ]secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-ca

Thank you so much for believing in this campaign enough to support it. I
know we can win this race together.

Colin

Sent from my iPhone. Please excuse any typos.

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is serious.

| |
---
| | | I’m at my wits’ end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don’t do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.
**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump’s Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I’m also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**
But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.
**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL’s that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I’m one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can’t beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26438%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eBtN9%2bhCnaVIEAwFg06bZw&sysid=1)
---

So, I’m going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in just $5 right now,](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26439%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rzC1KHiMaDvZdc6CAx8UeA&sysid=1 "If you chip in just $5 right now,")** I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden’s plan to destroy our nation.

I’m humbly asking you, as a warrior who’s fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?

---
| | [DONATE TODAY](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26430%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cbKLwH0vjXtXFudKGANUeA&sysid=1)
---

You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

---
| | [DONATE TODAY](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26430%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cbKLwH0vjXtXFudKGANUeA&sysid=1)
---
| |
* * *
Ryan Zinke is a fifth generation Montanan who has dedicated his life to serving our great nation. Ryan is a decorated U.S. Navy SEAL officer who retired after 23 years of military service. After the military, Ryan served two terms as a State Senator, was twice elected as Montana’s Congressman, and served two years as U.S. Secretary of the Interior under President Trump. Now after a couple quiet years spent with his family, he is serving again in Congress to help save America from threats we face both foreign and domestic.

**[SUPPORT HIS FIGHT TODAY](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26431%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WnwiUr2p2%2bhbR%2bTP2ZxE%2fw&sysid=1 "SUPPORT HIS FIGHT TODAY")**

name: Sepi Shyne
subject: I’m running for Congress because it is our time to Shyne
body:
Hi there, and thank you so much for joining my campaign.

In February, I made the announcement that I'm running to represent California's 30th district because I believe that we need a new generation of leaders in Congress who are willing to fight for the rights of ALL people, **especially for the people who've been long-ignored and marginalized by our political system.**

Californians deserve a leader who is ready to listen and take action on behalf of the struggles of _all_ of their constituents: For immigrants, for the LGBTQ+ community, for the working class, for women, and people of color. CA-30 is ready for change, and **I'm ready to fight hard to deliver that change.**

I'm no stranger to struggle myself. Growing up, my family and I were forced to flee Iran after the revolution. At just five years old I understood what it meant to leave my homeland behind in the hopes of a better future. My family worked hard every day to contribute to our community, and their sacrifices taught me the true value of hard work, and the importance of listening to and fighting _for every person, not just the wealthy and well-connected._

**That's why I'm running for Congress: Whether you are the first generation in your family to build a life here (like me) or the tenth, our communities are the American Dream._And we all deserve the chance to build it._**

**[Will you help me right now by chipping in $5, $10, $100, or whatever you can to sustain my campaign through 2024?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65427268/413390847/-262033478?refcode=em23_23_ws1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM5MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzEwNzE3OWItMjYxNC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jMuCRxEeExxHCum5T5JeTLGBl4XLNp2N0aC51V5HzPY=)**

Income inequality, workers' rights, racial injustice, turning back the clock on women and LGBTQ+ rights, rising gun violence and hate crimes, mental health issues and homelessness, our rapidly heating planet, and the rising costs of living and healthcare demand a new generation of leaders in Congress.

I've spent more than two decades ensuring that our community was one where people felt welcome and safe to be themselves – and that every citizen had the same rights, **period**. Under my leadership homelessness has _dropped 60%_ , and we're just getting started. Whether it's serving on the City Council, LGBTQ+ Advisory Board, the city's Business License Commission, running two small businesses, or now as Mayor, I've always put equity and equality for each and every person at the center of my service. **And that's exactly what I'll do in Congress.**

**[If you're ready for a different kind of leader – one who stands with you – chip in $5, $10, $100, or whatever you can today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65427275/413390884/-262033478?refcode=em23_23_ws1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM5MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzEwNzE3OWItMjYxNC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jMuCRxEeExxHCum5T5JeTLGBl4XLNp2N0aC51V5HzPY=)**

Sepi Shyne
