| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

clean_body: It's time to prove our strength | | | | | | | | | | Friend, I am pledging to put our country on the path to American renewal. Over the next 18 months, Americans will face a choice to reverse the decline of our country or surrender our American ideals to woke ideology. I refuse to stand down and watch the work of our Founding Fathers fade into a form that is unrecognizable. I know that freedom is worth fighting for, and a leader always finds a way. We're going to make sure truth is the foundation of everything we do in this country, and we're going to make sure common sense is no longer an uncommon virtue. We are going to be strong, we are going to be energetic, and we're going to get things done. I am not going to lead merely with words. I am going to lead with deeds and I'm going to produce results. As we near the end of the FEC fundraising quarter--June 30th --I want to make it clear to the Left that we are waging a war on woke ideology and we are WINNING. This first end-of-quarter deadline means we have reached the point where our campaign fundraising is showcased and compared across the field. This is our opportunity to prove our strength. This is our opportunity to show Joe Biden how strong our movement is. This is our opportunity to produce historic results. I have the humility to know that I cannot do this alone. I am asking for your help to win this race for all of us. There is no substitute for victory, Friend. Let's get it done. "" Yours in Freedom, | Ron DeSantis | | | Meet Ron DeSantis | | | | | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, Protecting the unborn, Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, Expanding education freedom, Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, Lowering prescription drug costs, Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, Creating a universal school choice program, Delivering record-breaking tax relief, Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn't stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism." Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. body:
Trump cannot be trusted
#
Derek,
VoteVets just rolled out our newest ad: “Never Again.” It features Brigadier General (Ret.) Steven Anderson with some blunt language – Donald Trump is “a walking, talking National Security threat” who was right to be charged by special counsel Jack Smith, and should face trial.
Here’s why we made this ad: You already know how serious Trump’s mishandling of critical National Security secrets was. You know he put Troops’ lives, and our security at risk. We are going to make sure everyone else knows, too.
[**WATCH “NEVER AGAIN”](https://act.votevets.org/go/3042?c0=vv-pac-em-june23-na.Ds7qxC&refcode=em230626-1-15-full&t=1&akid=10118%2E3013755%2E1qENxA)**

This is what you can expect to see from VoteVets heading into 2024. Hard hitting, targeted, taking the fight to Trump and the radicals and sycophants who still back him.
Because we’re all Veterans here, and we all know the stakes. Trump endangered our Armed Forces and our National Security during and after his first term as president. He cannot be allowed to have a second. And those who say he should not be charged for his crimes are flat-out wrong.
[**So please, watch our new ad and chip in $3 so we can make sure it gets seen by as many people as possible.](https://act.votevets.org/go/3042?c0=vv-pac-em-june23-na.Ds7qxC&refcode=em230626-1-15-full&t=3&akid=10118%2E3013755%2E1qENxA)**

name: SmartAsset
subject: Average Retirement Savings By Age: Are You Normal?
body:
Many Americans worry they're not saving enough for retirement, and rightfully so.

| | | |
---
|
# Average Retirement Savings By Age: Are You Normal?
---
| Research behind how much Americans save, and who feels most confident about their plan
---
| | |
---
| Many Americans worry they're not saving enough for retirement, and rightfully so.

The National Institute of Retirement Security reports: Approximately 40 million households have no retirement savings.1

It's never too late to get started. Although results are never guaranteed and risks are involved, [well-managed investments may potentially compound over time.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=65ebdeaf2b7542ada6607a0f697d0f18&_e=uCUobMfGtOZ_8_hwqsh3950QchJJbKjsqo3fyKbtt3Lrp-yC7gy9utba8TAnOy8PqriSbzDPsDGkjIdu8lcgHAZFJw1NFsOQJtKJPAIBqSLH1hFsazL_ACD9EEpSoTUKLz5Od1b2piVfZJdY6XOrc4q4ZJ9Ukf6Drk5tUyPb6958dP8m51rRQivF0fL2m-pfiipnfQbVf9ISxODQ0K9BYUsfLFJtNzDylKu6pVT6SLduaoAk-SQxaNAH8NzardDk8j0jD9xzQLt2Yz4tkqeeex4MwtpwdSK7HzENBuvPfPuP9gxefj1rNMdQ147A9y0BP898iP-NE_fpKl2FbQ3pKvjfWjnQfiZG9lfk45m5GzDuSxDWlkuTUwfUJS0bzArzzberkE9LnZt2qUlwXdSG9og-I4qeN5DMEK4dBJFB6X6kfABk-gzALrTj9qlXElQaNnfyn_tB0aYRSRTgMzM0wA%3D%3D)

Fidelity reported in May 2022 that the average 401(k) balance for those who've been saving for over 10 years averaged over $380,000.2

[Find out the recommended savings for your age here.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=65ebdeaf2b7542ada6607a0f697d0f18&_e=uCUobMfGtOZ_8_hwqsh3950QchJJbKjsqo3fyKbtt3Lrp-yC7gy9utba8TAnOy8PqriSbzDPsDGkjIdu8lcgHAZFJw1NFsOQJtKJPAIBqSLH1hFsazL_ACD9EEpSoTUKLz5Od1b2piVfZJdY6XOrc4q4ZJ9Ukf6Drk5tUyPb6958dP8m51rRQivF0fL2m-pfiipnfQbVf9ISxODQ0K9BYUsfLFJtNzDylKu6pVT6SLduaoAk-SQxaNAH8NzardDk8j0jD9xzQLt2Yz4tkqeeex4MwtpwdSK7HzENBuvPfPuP9gxefj1rNMdQ147A9y0BBEBnId5XcDs02I2AL9L7Y87grkjoSq6f2rQJbtPd6FfiV5k-9CHT5Ldimrh-DG4nefvfW7SP-jtMYn4p0YDuuKklJxGAdgEmqU9fjan81dKjghCDp8NnOLVEoGXuzhd4acMKxsgaTyEx1rRmbd33Tg%3D%3D)

Of course, saving for retirement is different for everyone. subject: Thank you for you support!
body:
DP,

Thank you for volunteering to help me in my campaign to bring quality representation to Arizona's 4th Congressional District. I am currently gathering signatures and organizing for a solid launch for our campaign. We are planning a volunteer get together soon and I will keep you updated with those details. In the meantime, please feel free to share this link with as many people as you can so we can wrap up signature gathering early and focus solely on grassroots organization and meet & greets. This is going to be an exciting campaign to join, and we will work very hard for the people of this district and greater Arizona. I am looking forward to working with you!

| Semper Fi and God Bless,
---

name: Ret. SEAL Eli Crane
subject: Every spineless Republican is afraid to say it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Crane For Congress
body:
There are SERIOUS questions about Election integrity.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8v0nf7qjl3jj5tquahrfrl7rl9mb9mprjq76ts0_rp22sh2s8i66o77c3i60or2c3h2bs)
---

Every spineless Republican is afraid to say it, but I will:
**There are __SERIOUS__ questions about Election integrity. **
They'll call me a liar. They'll probably even try to _censor_ this email.

So what happens today will decide everything.

My name is Eli Crane - you might not know me, but I'm a Navy SEAL, a businessman, a husband, a father, and a humble servant of God.

I'm also the Pro-Trump, Pro-America conservative who represents AZ-02 - the biggest race on the map.

The Democrats hate me & want me silenced. Hell, many of the Republicans want me silenced too. **_The Establishment and anti-Trump haters will do ANYTHING to destroy me. There is no time left._**

They have all the power & resources they need, and that's why I'm humbly swallowing my pride to ask you for help today.

**[Will you stand with me and chip in just a few bucks by midnight?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0716tre7ajnd980cd4356l93pdbslds192hi76o_rp22sh2s8i66o77c3i60or2c3h2bs "Will you stand with me and chip in just a few bucks by midnight?")**

---

---

Look, I'm a Navy SEAL. I've been on 5 war-time deployments - I'm the last guy who normally asks for help, but if this text message doesn't work, it's over.

**[So, from the bottom of my heart - will you help out a Navy SEAL stand up to the radical Left& establishment?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr1e3kholv65hthuf18kqsecbkanuags3hilj1k0_rp22sh2s8i66o77c3i60or2c3h2bs "So, from the bottom of my heart - will you help out a Navy SEAL stand up to the radical Left & establishment?")**

Thank you for standing up for what's right.

God bless you. - Eli

name: Senator Chris Murphy
subject: Will you join me in supporting GIFFORDS PAC?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
In honor of one year since the passage of the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act, will you join me in supporting my friends at GIFFORDS PAC by making a $3 contribution today?
#

_“What are we doing?”_
That was my plea to my colleagues after I heard the horrific news of the mass shooting at Robb Elementary School in Uvalde, Texas last May. Memories of the 2012 shooting at Sandy Hook Elementary School in my home state of Connecticut flooded back to me. How could we let this happen again and again while Congress does nothing?
But something different happened last summer. My Senate colleagues heard me, and we quickly started working together to draft what would become the _Bipartisan Safer Communities Act_. Just weeks later, the legislation reached President Biden’s desk, and he signed it into law on June 25, 2022.
But our work is not done, and we can only keep making change and saving lives with your continued support.
[**In honor of one year since the passage of the _Bipartisan Safer Communities Act_ , will you join me in supporting my friends at GIFFORDS PAC by making a $3 contribution today? There’s no better moment to show your support than before Friday’s quarterly deadline.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jun23.dfqeaL&refcode=em230626-1-15&t=1&akid=6042%2E3935704%2EfYInze)
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jun23.dfqeaL&refcode=em230626-1-15&t=2&akid=6042%2E3935704%2EfYInze)**
So what changed? Why were we finally able to pass gun safety legislation last year, in the wake of Buffalo and Uvalde, when we couldn’t after Sandy Hook? The simple answer: because we built a movement. Over the course of a decade, we worked together to build a political movement that now rivals the gun lobby’s power in Washington. There’s no doubt in my mind that it would not have been possible without my dear friend Gabby and her organization GIFFORDS.
As Gabby always says, the fights worth having are rarely easy. And when it comes to our ongoing fight to end gun violence, this couldn’t be more true.
The NRA and gun lobby fought us every step of the way on the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act. Those weeks of negotiations were some of the longest and toughest times I’ve ever had in the Senate. There were moments I thought we’d come up short again.
But you kept fighting. You helped keep the pressure on my colleagues, and we won. We proved everyone who challenged and doubted us wrong.
We were able to get Republicans and Democrats to finally come together and do something meaningful on the federal level about our nation’s epidemic of gun violence for the first time in nearly 30 years.
But the fight isn’t over yet. There’s still so much more we must do to end the scourge of gun violence, and I’m glad I have the support of organizations like GIFFORDS to help us grow our power in Congress.
[**So please, if you’re able to, contribute $3 to GIFFORDS PAC today as we commemorate one year of the _Bipartisan Safer Communities Act_ and before the June 30 quarterly deadline.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jun23.dfqeaL&refcode=em230626-1-15&t=3&akid=6042%2E3935704%2EfYInze)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-jun23.jpif6I&amount=3&t=22&akid=6042%2E3935704%2EfYInze)**

clean_body: In honor of one year since the passage of the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act, will you join me in supporting my friends at GIFFORDS PAC by making a $3 contribution today? “What are we doing?” That was my plea to my colleagues after I heard the horrific news of the mass shooting at Robb Elementary School in Uvalde, Texas last May. Memories of the 2012 shooting at Sandy Hook Elementary School in my home state of Connecticut flooded back to me. How could we let this happen again and again while Congress does nothing? But something different happened last summer. My Senate colleagues heard me, and we quickly started working together to draft what would become the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act. Just weeks later, the legislation reached President Biden’s desk, and he signed it into law on June 25, 2022. But our work is not done, and we can only keep making change and saving lives with your continued support. So what changed? Why were we finally able to pass gun safety legislation last year, in the wake of Buffalo and Uvalde, when we couldn’t after Sandy Hook? The simple answer: because we built a movement. Over the course of a decade, we worked together to build a political movement that now rivals the gun lobby’s power in Washington. There’s no doubt in my mind that it would not have been possible without my dear friend Gabby and her organization GIFFORDS. As Gabby always says, the fights worth having are rarely easy. And when it comes to our ongoing fight to end gun violence, this couldn’t be more true. The NRA and gun lobby fought us every step of the way on the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act. Those weeks of negotiations were some of the longest and toughest times I’ve ever had in the Senate. There were moments I thought we’d come up short again. But you kept fighting. You helped keep the pressure on my colleagues, and we won. We proved everyone who challenged and doubted us wrong. We were able to get Republicans and Democrats to finally come together and do something meaningful on the federal level about our nation’s epidemic of gun violence for the first time in nearly 30 years. But the fight isn’t over yet. There’s still so much more we must do to end the scourge of gun violence, and I’m glad I have the support of organizations like GIFFORDS to help us grow our power in Congress. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Ending our nation’s gun violence epidemic will always be my top priority in the Senate, and I’m proud to work with organizations like GIFFORDS in this righteous fight. I want to thank you personally for being a part of this movement. None of our progress would be possible without you. Every best wish, Chris Murphy U.S. Senator, Connecticut Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

**ICYMI: Governor Christie’s Weekend Of Truth Telling**
Since he announced his run for president, Governor Christie has made it clear that leadership is not about telling people only what they want to hear, it is about telling the truth.
That is exactly what he did this weekend, beginning with his [remarks on Friday](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=c7663736e1&e=d0a9afa930) at the Faith and Freedom Coalition Conference.
He followed up his remarks on Friday with interviews on CNN with Dana Bash and appearances on two Sunday shows, This Week on ABC, and Media Buzz with Howard Kurtz on Fox News.
Governor Christie stressed the importance of electing a president of character, something that Donald Trump lacks.
Take a look at the highlights below:

**“Either He’s A Liar, Or He’s Stupid”**
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=d0355391a9&e=d0a9afa930)
**“Whether He Has The Character”**
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=cd25e6b631&e=d0a9afa930)
**“Mr. Big Tough Guy”**
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=1eeb53be0a&e=d0a9afa930)
**“I’m Inside His Head”**
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=6adc9264a7&e=d0a9afa930)
**More good news.**

Yesterday, a national NBC News poll was released showing Governor Christie in fourth place nationally, prompting [Politico](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=6b82d25334&e=d0a9afa930) to state that, _**“it seems undeniable that Chris Christie’s presidential campaign has gained some kind of traction.”**_
After less than a month as a candidate, the Governor is inching even closer to the required 40,000 donors and the the debate stage in August.
Help get him on stage, chip in $1: [https://bit.ly/42rUEku](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=ced94f0db4&e=d0a9afa930)

name: Ron Wyden
subject: Judge shopping is a dangerous game
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65438924/413437318/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjlhNGNkYi0zZDE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ay6tKQYvX4AlvEtOmwTKiVHuJxHVBtpLxLeVE-zdSVc=&emci=582ab1e2-1112-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=bf9a4cdb-3d14-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=9818364)
---

| | You may have heard of a sneaky tactic called "judge shopping." While this term probably isn't the topic of conversation at the dinner table for most Americans, it's an issue that impacts every one of us. Judge shopping is when special interest groups work to find partisan judges to hear their cases and sway legal outcomes in their favor. In short: these groups are funneling cases to judges they know will hand down their preferred ruling. **Judge shopping is a dangerous game, and it needs to stop.** One of the most egregious examples of this tactic happened just recently when an anti-abortion group went to a right-wing judge in Texas – hand-picked by Donald Trump – to limit access to the abortion medication mifepristone. Today it's mifepristone, and tomorrow, it could be contraception. The far-right's war on women and the constitutional right to privacy knows no bounds. That's why I have a plan to stop this practice of judge shopping. We must ensure that a ruling by one single judge doesn't impact every single American. Or that special interest groups can no longer play hopscotch with the American judicial system in search of a biased judge predisposed to rule in their favor. That's not justice. That's not democracy. **And that's why I'm leading the charge in the Senate to end judge shopping and stop the weaponization of the courts once and for all. I'm committed to seeing this through.** It's time we bring some real fairness into our courts. More soon, _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

body:
The last repeat Democratic candidate we had in Michigan's First District in 2010 made huge gains against the incumbent during a rematch. Gary McDowell's first run garnered him 40% of the vote. Unphased, he received 47% two years later, one point away from unseating incumbent Dan Benshiek. One point.With you, unseating Jack Bergman is very possible.

| | You hear from every politician that they're driven by "service," but it's critical we recognize what that means. For me, it's the same reason I got into medicine; helping others is my purpose.

| | | [**HELP ME HELP OTHERS**](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/efOZuMuky/c?w=CGLX2gE21FhfR11g33BC3USqtTv6TuadIVaq9uZztcM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2Fib3V0LWJvYiIsInIiOiIxMjk0MTg0NS1iNGQzLTRiMjItYmQwZi00MmQwODU5Yzc3NmQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIxODY2MjZkNS1jYTVlLTQ2MzMtODM0YS1lODgzZDBiZGRkNzUifQ)

| | I'm running for Congress because I believe in a government of the people and the goodness of a Nation that helps hardworking rural families succeed, like my own growing up. I've been surrounded by individuals who believed in the transformative power of service, from my father at the VFW to Eagle Scouts and the charitable work of our church. I was inspired to pursue a career in medicine after seeing the impact that my best friend's father, a family physician, had on his patients' lives. I remember his stories of helping people, how doctors heal, solve problems, complete puzzles, and fix things that are broken - and I knew I wanted to spend my life doing the same. Today, I'm driven by that same desire to help others. Being a representative is more than a job; it's a vocation. I believe in the goodness of effective and efficient government. My family was blessed to be a recipient of programs that helped me achieve the positions that empowered me to help others. America created opportunities throughout my life, now I want to help facilitate opportunities for the people of Michigan's 1st District; I am running for Congress to help rural Michigan thrive. I'm driven to serve because I love my country for its ability to be better and progress. I believe we can all make a difference in that journey, and I want to use my experience and qualifications to help citizens succeed. It's as simple as that. , I've shared with you my policies, my positions, our winning strategy, and how, together, we can create change. You are the greatest component of the campaign, and I'm seeking a boost before we close the books in this quarter. Can you chip in? -Dr. Bob Dr. Bob Lorinser, MD, MSW, MPHCandidate for US CongressNorthern Michigan & the UPDemocrat, MI01

clean_body: The last repeat Democratic candidate we had in Michigan's First District in 2010 made huge gains against the incumbent during a rematch. Gary McDowell's first run garnered him 40% of the vote. Unphased, he received 47% two years later, one point away from unseating incumbent Dan Benshiek. One point.With you, unseating Jack Bergman is very possible. | | Can't see this message? | | | | | As we approach our fundraising deadline in one of the most crucial quarters of the year, I wanted to , and tell you exactly why I'm running for Congress. | | "I just want to help people." | | | | You hear from every politician that they're driven by "service," but it's critical we recognize what that means. For me, it's the same reason I got into medicine; helping others is my purpose. | | | | | | | | I'm running for Congress because I believe in a government of the people and the goodness of a Nation that helps hardworking rural families succeed, like my own growing up. I've been surrounded by individuals who believed in the transformative power of service, from my father at the VFW to Eagle Scouts and the charitable work of our church. I was inspired to pursue a career in medicine after seeing the impact that my best friend's father, a family physician, had on his patients' lives. I remember his stories of helping people, how doctors heal, solve problems, complete puzzles, and fix things that are broken - and I knew I wanted to spend my life doing the same. Today, I'm driven by that same desire to help others. Being a representative is more than a job; it's a vocation. I believe in the goodness of effective and efficient government. My family was blessed to be a recipient of programs that helped me achieve the positions that empowered me to help others. America created opportunities throughout my life, now I want to help facilitate opportunities for the people of Michigan's 1st District; I am running for Congress to help rural Michigan thrive. I'm driven to serve because I love my country for its ability to be better and progress. I believe we can all make a difference in that journey, and I want to use my experience and qualifications to help citizens succeed. It's as simple as that. , I've shared with you my policies, my positions, our winning strategy, and how, together, we can create change. You are the greatest component of the campaign, and I'm seeking a boost before we close the books in this quarter. name: Max Ukropina
subject: RE: New CA-47 polling on Race a cause for alarm
body:
New internal polling of California’s 47th District released last week by
Democrat David Min’s campaign, which excluded Max Ukropina and only
included Scott Baugh, confirms our campaign’s assessment of the race and of
Republicans’ best path to victory next year.

The sad conclusion is that last year’s bruising and expensive race against
Katie Porter has left Scott Baugh in a damaged and defensive position as he
runs for Congress again, jeopardizing Republicans’ chances of winning the
47th District in 2024 if he were to be the nominee.

We see an alarming trend among the data that we feel duty-bound to share
with our core supporters and anyone hoping for a Republican win in the 47th
District next year, especially with the critical Q2 fundraising deadline
just days away.

There is a reason Dave Min chose to exclude Max and only include Baugh.
Three data points in particular are concerning:

-

Scott Baugh’s favorability among district voters is underwater by 11
points, a sign that the Democrats’ aggressive bombardment of negative
ads last year took a serious and persisting toll on Baugh’s image and put
him in a deep hole he will need to heavily spend his way out of.

-

Only 30% of voters in the district say they find Baugh’s biography
compelling, indicating Baugh will struggle to excite Republican and
independent voters, particularly low-turnout voters who Republicans need to
win.

-

65% of voters say they find negative information about Baugh a
“convincing” reason to vote against him, including nearly half (49%) who
say they find it “very convincing,” which means Democrats can expect to
deploy the same attacks from last time with the same devastating effects.

Most alarmingly, the poll finds that David Min would defeat Baugh by seven
points if the Democrats run the same playbook that they did last time. The
Democrats and their well-funded allies already know how to defeat Baugh -
the mailers, the TV ad scripts, and the message-tested attacks - and with
millions of dollars at their disposal they will clearly do it again.

It may be unfair, but the reality is that Republicans will have to spend a
considerable amount of resources just to dig ourselves out of the hole the
Democrats dug for us last year, let alone go on offense against the
Democrats, if Scott Baugh is the nominee.

Fortunately, Republicans have a new choice that the Democrats are doing
everything they can to avoid. That choice is Max Ukropina, a young,
energetic, fresh conservative voice. He is a local businessman with deep
connections to the 47th District.

Importantly, the Democrats will not be able to run the same playbook
against Max Ukropina as they could against Scott Baugh.

Our campaign’s message is already resonating with voters and donors in the
district who understand that a new strategy and fresh approach is needed to
win the 47th District in 2024.

To anyone who wants to see a Republican victory on election night 2024, we
urge you to give support and DONATE HERE
<https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/623poll>.

Sincerely,

The Team at Max Ukropina for Congress

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: STOP THE PRO-ABORTION AGENDA NOW!
body:
The radical left is launching an all-out attack on the unborn and we must act fast to stop them.

| [ ](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8c6hlqandcomg55n5us895fqobb005uhnaq1jgg_rp22sh2s8i66o77c3i68ob4cth2bs)
---
#
Friend,

The radical left is launching an all-out attack on the unborn and we must act fast to stop them. [**We need your support to fight back**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcujk6ehnp1sa4m43lgdnl1i55dfcokj52jge9so_rp22sh2s8i66o77c3i68ob4cth2bs) against the radicals' latest attempt to revive the long-expired Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) - an assault on mothers, babies, and the rule of law.

This dangerous and sweeping legal mandate for abortion on demand, funded with taxpayer dollars, would be enshrined in the U.S. Constitution indefinitely blocking state and federal legislation to protect the unborn and the consciences of Americans who do not wish to participate in abortion.

The Big Abortion Lobby and their radical allies are sparing no expense to make abortion on demand the law of the land, and even the late Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg agreed that the deadline to ratify the ERA has long since passed. But that hasn't stopped them from working with the Biden administration to legalize abortions at ANY point in pregnancy - up until the moment of birth and even after birth!

**[This is barbaric and we must fight back with everything we have.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4mmoskfdsi9g38pnpqla7is4n1k27ipesetdogo_rp22sh2s8i66o77c3i68ob4cth2bs)** The team at SBA Pro-Life America is committed to defending life and advocating for laws that protect innocent and vulnerable human life.

But we can't do this alone. We need your help to expand our policy research efforts, advance pro-life laws through direct lobbying and grassroots campaigns, and grow our voter education initiative to ensure pro-life Americans know where their lawmakers stand on protecting the unborn.

The abortion lobby is spending a record amount of dollars to bring about their radical agenda, but with your generous contribution today, we can fight back against their assault on the unborn and protect innocent lives from abortion on demand.

Please act now and make your gift using this secure link: **[https://secure.sbaprolife.org/stop-big-abortion-extremists](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z66f2fpfk5mp6dhhe62ajlkf7irfb4327h36kakg_rp22sh2s8i66o77c3i68ob4cth2bs)**

We cannot wait any longer - every moment counts!

For _LIFE_ ,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr., PO Box 803, Arlington, VA, 22206

American Defense News

subject: Hopeful 🤞

The _American Dream and Promise Act_ was introduced with support from both Democrats and Republicans in the House. The bill would provide a pathway to citizenship for hundreds of thousands undocumented people — including DACA recipients, TPS holders, and DED holders.
We’re encouraged to see Congress finally responding to this moment with urgency — but our demands can’t end here.
**Millions more who don’t qualify for DACA or temporary protections will continue living under the fear of detention and deportation without a pathway to citizenship.**
After working together to introduce this bipartisan legislation, we know both parties in Congress have what it takes to put politics aside and deliver protections that will change lives.
That’s why we are taking action to secure an expansive, inclusive pathway to citizenship that doesn’t leave anyone behind. _Can we count on your support in this fight?_

clean_body: I wanted to make sure you saw this promising news: | | | With DACA under attack in the courts, I wanted to make sure you saw this promising news, Peter: Congress introduced the American Dream and Promise Act — finally taking action to create a pathway to citizenship for DACA recipients and those with Temporary Protected Status or Deferred Enforced Departure. This should give us so much hope, Peter, but we can’t stop fighting until this bill becomes law — AND until we win permanent protections for all undocumented people, regardless of their citizenship status. Make a donation if you’re able to support our fight for permanent protections. This is a critical moment for our movement, so we have to build momentum to finally secure a pathway to citizenship. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | The American Dream and Promise Act was introduced with support from both Democrats and Republicans in the House. The bill would provide a pathway to citizenship for hundreds of thousands undocumented people — including DACA recipients, TPS holders, and DED holders. We’re encouraged to see Congress finally responding to this moment with urgency — but our demands can’t end here. Millions more who don’t qualify for DACA or temporary protections will continue living under the fear of detention and deportation without a pathway to citizenship. After working together to introduce this bipartisan legislation, we know both parties in Congress have what it takes to put politics aside and deliver protections that will change lives. That’s why we are taking action to secure an expansive, inclusive pathway to citizenship that doesn’t leave anyone behind. Can we count on your support in this fight? Add a donation today to help keep up our fight for permanent protections. We’re grateful for any amount you can give in support of our ongoing work to uplift immigrant communities. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you for your unwavering support, Juliana, United We Dream Action | Our most dedicated supporters are chipping in monthly to sustain our fight to secure a pathway to citizenship. Join them and help us win permanent protections in Congress by starting a recurring donation today: | |

name: Bill Spadea
subject: The government wants you to be poor
body:
Peter, The government wants you living paycheck to paycheck, at best. They want you so worried about the next bill that you
|
---
| Peter, The government wants you living paycheck to paycheck, at best. They want you so worried about the next bill that you don't have time to question their actions in Washington. This tactic is designed to keep your focus on just getting by, instead of on the financial freedom you could be building. To build wealth, to reach that American Dream that we all want, you need to change how you view your money... And once you've done that, you can make your dreams a reality.
My good friend and Financial Expert, Rob Gill is going LIVE THIS THURSDAY, June 29th at at 8PM Eastern for a Meeting on **“How To Protect Your Money From The Government & Achieve Your American Dream".** Rob has agreed to let our network in on this meeting FOR FREE.
---
| | [CLICK HERE TO SAVE YOUR SPOT FOR THIS THURSDAY EVENING NOW](https://xtz223.keap-link015.com/v2/click/941e3c2ff64c9540db137a219a31df89/eJyNkMsKwkAMRf8l62Jp1aLdiYiUVheiaxmmUYN1Gmai9UH_3fGBKwW3ycm53NxA0CgjWQkpnOUax10IwKImJjQyro0o_dzG_V7UjQKoyOyntj4ypLevxx_gMY6iJAlALoweWS5G4zybT9dFNs89ycr6jL88w_7go5nMRlkBbfvTiweSycmrHaRij_goVJIvJStbeX4nwi4Nw6ZpOsikN-TTNanKiVWCW0LX0fUhdKxKVF6omNGU72fkeHlp2zs_u2kL)

# Rob wants you to know that the American Dream is alive and well. All you need are strategies for building your wealth that have worked for so many people, including me.
# [Click here to register for the LIVE meeting now.](https://xtz223.keap-link015.com/v2/click/60a586ec78bd9080dfb705328fc0fca5/eJyNkMsKwkAMRf8l62JptaLdiYiUVheiaxmmUYN1Gmai9UH_3fGBKwW3ycm53NxA0CgjWQkpnOUax10IwKImJjQyro0o_dzGSS_qRgFUZPZTWx8Z0tvX4w_wGEdRvxeAXBg9slyMxnk2n66LbJ57kpX1GX95hsngo5nMRlkBbfvTiweSycmrHaRij_goVJIvJStbeX4nwi4Nw6ZpOsikN-TTNanKiVWCW0LX0fUhdKxKVF6omNGU72fkeHlp2zs-B2kJ)

| **The government doesn't want you to know how to escape the rat race.**
In fact, it's constantly looking for ways to keep people trapped in society's broken game plan, and I'm sick of seeing our fellow citizens get taken advantage of by government bureaucrats. For this reason, I've set out on a personal mission to use my voice to help spread the word of financial education. **If you'd like to learn the most effective ways to build your wealth in today's market so that you can turn your American Dream into a reality,** **[click here to register for the meeting now.](https://xtz223.keap-link015.com/v2/click/9cd5f55e478b4365313913f8213064a5/eJyNkMsKwkAMRf8l62JpfaDdiYiUVheiaxmmUYN1GmZS64P-u-MDVwpuk5NzubmBoFFG0gISOMs1jrsQgEVNTGhkUhlR-rmN-72oGwVQkjnMbFUzJLevxx_gMY6iQRyAXBg9slqOJ1m6mG3ydJF5kpX1GX95Rv3hRzOdj9Mc2vanF48k05NXO0jE1vgoVJAvJWtben4vwi4Jw6ZpOsikt-TTNanSiVWCO0LX0dUxdKwKVF6omNEU72dkeHlp2zs8U2kH)** To Your Success, Bill
---
| It’s time for Common Sense ideas and policies to dominate the landscape instead of the vicious and totally counter-productive partisan attacks that only serve to embolden the elite power brokers.You’re a part of the Common Sense Club because you know that we need RESULTS from our government, NOT RHETORIC. Many arrogant, elitist elected officials crushed our way of life during the misguided, unnecessary and deadly lockdowns. Now it’s time to hold them accountable for their actions, ignorance and negligence. The tide is turning, and today is only STEP ONE!

This year’s elections provide a can’t-miss opportunity to support small businesses and families with fiscally responsible policies, restore an education system that puts students and parents over the radical agenda of the NJEA elites, and protect and preserve our civil, economic, and medical liberty.
We believe that our government should serve the people and provide the expected services that we’re paying for! It’s time for government to function as a public service, not a propaganda tool for radicals.
We believe in REDUCING tax burdens on working families AND empowering the skilled trades and small businesses.
We believe our schools should reject Critical Race Theory and the sexualized curricula. It’s time to empower parents and stop the NJEA once and for all.
I hope you’ll join me TODAY as we discuss the results of this year’s critical elections.
If you want to stand with me against the out-of-touch career politicians who are taking New Jersey down the wrong path and help restore Common Sense, you’re in the right place!Please join me during my show tonight, call in to share your thoughts, and watch the results of this year’s elections live as they come in!
Together, we can keep working to restore Common Sense and save New Jersey and America.
Thank you,Bill Spadea
---
|
---
| [Unsubscribe](https://xtz223.infusionsoft.com/app/optOut/0/4fd6eb57577aacb0/10197406/aa7d3babc326f6c0) Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey 07701 United States

Peter, In four days, our fundraising numbers for our next end-of-quarter public filing deadline will be locked in for everyone (including Tate Reeves) to see. With Reeves spending over a million dollars on TV ads and spreading lies on the internet, we’ve set an ambitious goal of raising $50,000 online by June 30. This number wasn’t pulled out of thin air – it’s exactly what we have to raise to hire staff, train volunteers, mobilize voters, and win. [But it doesn’t take much to help us reach that goal, Peter. For just $5 – the price of your coffee this morning – you can help us build a winning campaign to take on Tate Reeves. With Reeves spending over a million dollars on TV ads and spreading lies on the internet, we’ve set an ambitious goal of raising $50,000 online by June 30. This number wasn’t pulled out of thin air – it’s exactly what we have to raise to hire staff, train volunteers, mobilize voters, and win. = | = Brandon’s coffee order? name: Ro Khanna
subject: Why I voted NO on the defense budget
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
I was the sole dissenting vote in the House Armed Services Committee on the 2024 defense budget.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65439740/413440416/-1645665386?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2UwNzcwM2MtNDExNC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=maiBc62IctNV5_5wAnrq48a8dbEhYdQ5KIuINCIR7n4=&emci=62e38f0d-3b14-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=3e07703c-4114-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=9848080)
---
Friend, Last Wednesday, I was the sole dissenting vote in the House Armed Services Committee on the 2024 National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA). My reasoning is simple: It doesn’t address the waste and fraud in the Pentagon budget and price gouging by defense contractors. At [$886 billion](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65439741/413440417/-786071024?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2UwNzcwM2MtNDExNC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=maiBc62IctNV5_5wAnrq48a8dbEhYdQ5KIuINCIR7n4=&emci=62e38f0d-3b14-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=3e07703c-4114-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=9848080), the proposed defense budget represents more than a 3 percent increase over last year’s total. Meanwhile, we are cutting relief for the poor, for students with loans, and for the working class. Republicans slashed these programs in the debt ceiling deal, saying we couldn’t afford it. We have a responsibility to use Americans’ tax dollars wisely. This defense budget fails to fulfill that promise. **[Will you stand with me in rejecting this wasteful defense spending increase?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65439742/413440418/1276739920?contactdata=M2CqO0D2XI8jP17mm0oFxAz4MASrczqpryfKPCKRfHlYZfvIO7zw3mfMFCMKs0POSdnhaGe4bkHgvaxqM16l7bX/R4vd68orQ3xtusDRhAc0rgUfUZSZux80sKwrnQxfwtJcPlLijkDZjmkqyT53UA==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2UwNzcwM2MtNDExNC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=maiBc62IctNV5_5wAnrq48a8dbEhYdQ5KIuINCIR7n4=&emci=62e38f0d-3b14-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=3e07703c-4114-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=9848080)**

The Beltway is not with me, but many Americans —particularly the young—want us to improve their lives. To truly invest in our future, we must prioritize: providing affordable healthcare, relieving student debt, creating good-paying jobs, and tackling the ever-growing climate crisis. **[Sign if you agree: Bloated defense spending is not the answer. We must put our tax dollars to help working Americans at home.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65439745/413440421/1276739920?contactdata=M2CqO0D2XI8jP17mm0oFxAz4MASrczqpryfKPCKRfHlYZfvIO7zw3mfMFCMKs0POSdnhaGe4bkHgvaxqM16l7bX/R4vd68orQ3xtusDRhAc0rgUfUZSZux80sKwrnQxfwtJcPlLijkDZjmkqyT53UA==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2UwNzcwM2MtNDExNC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=maiBc62IctNV5_5wAnrq48a8dbEhYdQ5KIuINCIR7n4=&emci=62e38f0d-3b14-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=3e07703c-4114-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=9848080)** Onward,Ro

name: Adam Schiff
subject: A quick note for Monday
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2716%2E5257348%2EP8Yze5 ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Happy Monday, Derek!

Before what I’m sure will be a busy week gets underway, [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20230626_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2716%2E5257348%2EP8Yze5 ]I want to ask
for your support to help hit our grassroots fundraising goal by Friday
night. Give me a moment to explain why.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1072?c0=jun2023_abs_em.0Agatv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20230626_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2716%2E5257348%2EP8Yze5 ]EXPRESS DONATE $3

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=jun2023_abs_em.9HINAX&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20230626_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=2716%2E5257348%2EP8Yze5 ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=jun2023_abs_em.5j4Bsc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20230626_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=2716%2E5257348%2EP8Yze5 ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=jun2023_abs_em.RWa6IA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20230626_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=2716%2E5257348%2EP8Yze5 ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=jun2023_abs_em.9Bj7kB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20230626_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=2716%2E5257348%2EP8Yze5 ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20230626_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=2716%2E5257348%2EP8Yze5 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

You see, after Friday’s end-of-quarter deadline, pundits and campaign
operatives will be poring over FEC reports.

These reports include information on how much campaigns have raised and
from how many donors. In short, they’re used as a barometer of how viable
a campaign is.

As we approach our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline at the end of this
week, many candidates across the country are busy dialing up donors to get
a last-minute rush of cash before June 30.

But because of your continued grassroots support, I don’t need to spend
hours on the phone.

Instead, I can focus on my work on the House Judiciary Committee. I can
meet voters across California. And I can respond to the attacks from MAGA
Republicans, who continue to go after me with full force.

That’s why I’m reaching out to you right now. I’m not taking a dime from
corporate PACs, so when we do have these fundraising deadlines (especially
Friday night’s quarterly deadline), I rely on this grassroots team to chip
in to this campaign.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20230626_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=2716%2E5257348%2EP8Yze5 ]Derek,
could you chip in $5 or any amount
you can spare so I can focus on the work ahead?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1072?c0=jun2023_abs_em.0Agatv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20230626_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=2716%2E5257348%2EP8Yze5 ]EXPRESS DONATE $3

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=jun2023_abs_em.9HINAX&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20230626_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=2716%2E5257348%2EP8Yze5 ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=jun2023_abs_em.5j4Bsc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20230626_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&akid=2716%2E5257348%2EP8Yze5 ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=jun2023_abs_em.RWa6IA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20230626_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1015&akid=2716%2E5257348%2EP8Yze5 ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=jun2023_abs_em.9Bj7kB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20230626_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1016&akid=2716%2E5257348%2EP8Yze5 ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20230626_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1017&akid=2716%2E5257348%2EP8Yze5 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

I’m so proud of the grassroots operation we’ve built,
Derek. Thanks for taking the
time to read and help out.

— Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20230626_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1018&akid=2716%2E5257348%2EP8Yze5 ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

name: Team Salud
subject: June 30 is tricky
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress
body:
As a political activist and supporter, you know by now that campaigns are required to post their fundraising totals every quarter.

Our current quarter closes on June 30, and, being in the middle of summer, I’m sure you can imagine that this is the trickiest deadline for us all year. Will you visit https://secure.ngpvan.com/5drELxd-oUq5a0w0cMnjSA2 to chip in and make this the most successful June 30 deadline we’ve ever had?

We’ve seen other campaigns hit a “summer slump”, especially in off-years, when the next election seems ages away. But we are hard at work over here at Team Carbajal!

As the race to the White House continues to heat up amid the 2024 GOP Presidential primary, Kevin McCarthy's lack of an endorsement for President Trump's re-election continues to be the elephant in the room.
Unsurprisingly, McCarthy had no problem using President Trump for his endorsement in January 2023 when McCarthy ran for Speaker of the House. Yet, even with President Trump's endorsement, McCarthy struggled to receive support for his bid for Speaker of the House, which took 15 separate votes on the floor of the House to make him Speaker since so many Republican representatives, including many who have endorsed President Trump for re-election in 2024, adamantly opposed McCarthy's Speakership.
## [EXCLUSIVE: Kevin McCarthy's Son Works For Anti-Trump Big Tech Investor Set To Host A Shadow DeSantis Fundraiser ](https://substack.com/redirect/f1f967f1-5928-4712-b8a6-a5e84576f374?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Laura Loomer](https://substack.com/profile/105171081-laura-loomer)| | *
---|---|---
| Apr 10
[](https://substack.com/redirect/f1f967f1-5928-4712-b8a6-a5e84576f374?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[NOTE: Please consider upgrading your subscription here for $7 month to help me keep this publication up and running. While everything here is free at the moment, your monthly financial subscription of $7 per month or $70 per year will help ensure that I can keep providing you and others with groundbreaking independent journalism and original political c...](https://substack.com/redirect/f1f967f1-5928-4712-b8a6-a5e84576f374?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/f1f967f1-5928-4712-b8a6-a5e84576f374?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
If you have been [reading my Substack,](https://substack.com/redirect/8d733044-61aa-4e16-ad8e-267c79918ce8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) you know that McCarthy's son Connor McCarthy works for an anti-Trump Big Tech investor named Joe Lonsdale, who has endorsed Ron DeSantis, and recently held fundraiser(s) for DeSantis's Presidential campaign.
Kevin McCarthy won't endorse President Trump for re-election, but I have learned that he is using his son, and his own donors by proxy as a way to help Ron DeSantis's Presidential campaign against President Trump.
Last week, DeSantis traveled to California where he held a fundraiser on June 19 at the Harris Ranch in Coalinga. The private fundraiser, which was closed to the media and not open to the public, was hosted by Coalinga rancher John Harris and Fresno developer Richard F. Spencer. Roughly 60 donors gathered to listen to DeSantis speak about his Presidential campaign, and each donor was required to pay $3,300 to attend the fundraiser.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b6b9e98f-f1d4-4d1b-91b2-daa6dab9b242?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
John Harris and Richard Spencer are considered to be two of the biggest GOP donors in California. According to FEC records, Harris has donated to Nikki Haley's Presidential campaign, as well as her PAC "Team Stand for America" this year, and he has been a longstanding donor to Kevin McCarthy.
In 2019, Gov. Gavin Newsom attended a fundraiser that was hosted in Coalinga at Harris Ranch, which is owned by Harris. While in attendance, Harris and Newsom posed for a photo together and discussed funding the proposed Temperance Flat and Sites reservoirs.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c1f362a4-d999-40b5-8c73-85d201091dc7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/844137ea-1451-431f-839f-38ad11e118d9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The second host of the fundraiser, Richard Spencer, owns Spencer Enterprises, a Fresno, California based construction company. FEC Records show Spencer donated $5,000 to California Governor Gavin Newsom's campaign on March 30, 2023.
In addition to donating to Newsom, Spencer is a large donor to Kevin McCarthy, McCarthy's various leadership PACS, and on March 31, 2023, just one day after he donated to Gavin Newsom, Spencer gave a maximum contribution to Randy Feenstra, a Congressman in Iowa.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3a5ece97-09fb-4be5-ae4a-7ef732debd11?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Less than two months later, DeSantis and his wife were campaigning for President in Iowa where they attended the 2023 Feenstra Family Picnic, hosted by the US House representative Randy Feenstra in Sioux Center. In 2020, with Kevin McCarthy's help, Feenstra successfully primaried pro-Trump, America First Congressman Steven King after then minority leader Kevin McCarthy stripped King of his committee assignments after the New York Times [falsely accused King of being a "White Supremacist". ](https://substack.com/redirect/2fdd4d29-51eb-4d40-b0b1-ecae98e30cf9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) King was arguably one of President Trump's strongest allies in Congress.
FEC records also show Harris and Spencer have both donated to California Republican Congressional candidate John Duarte, a pistachio farmer who was first elected to Congress in 2022.
During the Republican Primary in 2022, Duarte was challenged by David Giglio, a pro Trump GOP candidate for Congress. According to Giglio, McCarthy worked against his campaign, and even went as far as telling donors to only donate to candidates who were approved and liked by Kevin McCarthy.
Giglio provided this publication with an exclusive comment, adding,
> "I met with Richard Spencer in December of 2021 while running for California's 13th Congressional District about endorsing and donating to my campaign. We met for over an hour. He told me he really liked me. When I asked for an endorsement and a donation at the end of the meeting, Richard said "I can't do that until I speak with the leader (Kevin McCarthy)." Giglio added, "When I asked John Harris for a meeting about my Congressional race, he declined..
According to Giglio, Spencer told him that he only makes donations to candidates and only has fundraisers for candidates if it's approved by Kevin McCarthy, who is now the Republican Speaker of the House.
Giglio also said,
> "It is common knowledge in California's Central Valley that major GOP and McCarthy aligned donors like John Harris and Richard Spencer only donate to candidates at the behest of Kevin McCarthy. This pertains to all positions and elections, from County Supervisor, Congress, and even Presidential races."
In other words, instead of openly endorsing President Trump for re-election in 2024, McCarthy is subverting President Trump by telling his top donors who to support and donate to in 2024. In this case, it is Republican candidates for President who are challenging President Trump for the 2024 GOP nomination.
Following DeSantis's fundraiser at Harris Ranch, Granville Wire (GW), [a local Central Valley publication interviewed Spencer.](https://substack.com/redirect/38beaebc-b7d8-4795-9ac8-707e36512c55?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) In a statement to GW about why he and Harris hosted a max donation fundraiser for DeSantis's Presidential campaign in California, Spencer said,
> **" I think (former President Donald) Trump did a lot of really good things for us before he did some not-so-good things for us -- us being conservative Republicans. I would personally be delighted if he changed his mind ... and didn't run. But I doubt very much that that's going to happen. We think that this guy (DeSantis) is a real good guy and probably would make a really good president.** I also think that Tim Scott has a very positive message and needs to be brought, perhaps, and exposed to people here (in the Valley). Nikki Haley, I know, is John's (Harris) kind of first choice and she would be really good."
Granville Wire is owned by Iranian immigrant and California Developer [Darius Assemi,](https://substack.com/redirect/b8789e09-2565-49a3-bcdb-2c611c9afb63?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) whose [political contributions include donations to Kevin McCarthy, along with many anti-Trump candidates, including HAMAS sympathizer Rashida Tlaib, Nancy Pelosi, impeachment supporter Lisa Murkowski, Diane Feinstein, and John Duarte. ](https://substack.com/redirect/dc55cf4c-c828-44d6-941b-14f9039426f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a91bf651-92f6-4922-87fd-09b3ca416e88?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Along with being a big donor to Kevin McCarthy, Assemi also donated $29,200 to Gavin Newsom's Gubernatorial campaign.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/94f8417a-8fd0-4d17-9ad1-018eee4573af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It's rather ironic that Ron DeSantis spends his time attacking California Governor Gavin Newsom over what DeSantis calls "woke policies", and yet DeSantis is taking campaign donations from Kevin McCarthy donors who have a documented history of hosting fundraisers for and donating thousands of dollars to Gavin Newsom, as recently as March 2023.
It also begs the question...why are so many of McCarthy's max donation donors donating to Gavin Newsom, and why are these same donors donating to Ron DeSantis? If Ron DeSantis is truly such a threat to the RINO establishment and the Democrat Party, why is DeSantis getting campaign donations from California's biggest financiers of the RINO GOP Establishment and Gavin Newsom? If Kevin McCarthy is truly a Trump ally, how come none of his top GOP donors from California (who claim to only donate with McCarthy's approval) haven't yet donated to President Trump's 2024 re-election? And lastly, why are McCarthy's top California donors telling a California publication owned by a financier of McCarthy, radical Democrats, and pro-impeachment Republicans that they would "**personally be delighted if he [Donald Trump] changed his mind " **and didn't run for President in 2024?
Whether it's [McCarthy's son working with anti-Trump Big tech investor and McCarthy donor Joe Lonsdale](https://substack.com/redirect/8d733044-61aa-4e16-ad8e-267c79918ce8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), who has reportedly been getting his Silicon Valley colleagues and other Big Tech millionaires and billionaires (Peter Thiel, David Sacks, Elon Musk) to support Ron DeSantis's Presidential campaign, or whether it's McCarthy's top donors in California hosting high dollar fundraisers for Ron DeSantis and donating to other 2024 challengers to Trump, it is clear that Kevin McCarthy is green lighting a subversive donor class assault on President Trump's 2024 re-election.
It was always a mistake for President Trump to endorse Kevin McCarthy for Speaker of the House. Kevin McCarthy is a snake in the grass waiting to strike President Trump when the time is right in an effort to kill off President Trump's chances at re-election. However, President Trump continues to associate with McCarthy although he has always had the power to destroy McCarthy first.
When will President Trump finally wake up and realize that Kevin McCarthy is just another Paul Ryan? It's also no secret that Kevin McCarthy and Paul Ryan are best friends. Just like it's no secret that Paul Ryan, via his position on the board of Fox News, is serving as a media advisor to DeSantis's Presidential campaign. [Paul Ryan recently said that he will not attend the RNC convention if Donald Trump is the 2024 nominee. ](https://substack.com/redirect/219248f6-4c6e-4763-bd45-01287656adae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Perhaps President Trump needs to be reminded of the _Fables of Aesop_ , specifically the fable about "The Farmer and Snake".
# The Farmer & the Snake
> **A Farmer walked through his field one cold winter morning. On the ground lay a Snake, stiff and frozen with the cold. The Farmer knew how deadly the Snake could be, and yet he picked it up and put it in his bosom to warm it back to life.**
> **The Snake soon revived, and when it had enough strength, bit the man who had been so kind to it. The bite was deadly and the Farmer felt that he must die. As he drew his last breath, he said to those standing around:**
> _Learn from my fate not to take pity on a scoundrel._
Kevin McCarthy is a snake and a filthy scoundrel who deserves no pity.
Summer has officially arrived, which means the snake has thawed.
Will President Trump remain inside the den of poisonous vipers he has found himself within, or will he prevent Kevin McCarthy from being able to strike the MAGA and America First movement with his toxic venom ever again?
