clean_body: President Trump's decision to endorse Kevin McCarthy as Speaker of the House is having a negative impact on Trump's 2024 Presidential campaign for re-election. | | ---|---|--- | | | or ? ? President Trump's decision to endorse Kevin McCarthy as Speaker of the House is having a negative impact on Trump's 2024 Presidential campaign for re-election. | | | Jun 26 | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- NOTE: Please consider upgrading your subscription here for $7 month to help me keep this publication up and running. While everything here is free at the moment, your monthly financial subscription of $7 per month or $70 per year will help ensure that I can keep providing you and others with groundbreaking independent journalism and original political commentary. Your subscription for a nominal fee supports my journalistic efforts, and the expenses associated with my investigations. If you don 't want to miss any of my hard-hitting reports and commentary, please subscribe today! As the race to the White House continues to heat up amid the 2024 GOP Presidential primary, Kevin McCarthy's lack of an endorsement for President Trump's re-election continues to be the elephant in the room. Unsurprisingly, McCarthy had no problem using President Trump for his endorsement in January 2023 when McCarthy ran for Speaker of the House. Yet, even with President Trump's endorsement, McCarthy struggled to receive support for his bid for Speaker of the House, which took 15 separate votes on the floor of the House to make him Speaker since so many Republican representatives, including many who have endorsed President Trump for re-election in 2024, adamantly opposed McCarthy's Speakership. | | | | ---|---|--- | Apr 10 | If you have been you know that McCarthy's son Connor McCarthy works for an anti-Trump Big Tech investor named Joe Lonsdale, who has endorsed Ron DeSantis, and recently held fundraiser(s) for DeSantis's Presidential campaign. Kevin McCarthy won't endorse President Trump for re-election, but I have learned that he is using his son, and his own donors by proxy as a way to help Ron DeSantis's Presidential campaign against President Trump. Last week, DeSantis traveled to California where he held a fundraiser on June 19 at the Harris Ranch in Coalinga. The private fundraiser, which was closed to the media and not open to the public, was hosted by Coalinga rancher John Harris and Fresno developer Richard F. Spencer. Roughly 60 donors gathered to listen to DeSantis speak about his Presidential campaign, and each donor was required to pay $3,300 to attend the fundraiser. | | ---|---|--- John Harris and Richard Spencer are considered to be two of the biggest GOP donors in California. According to FEC records, Harris has donated to Nikki Haley's Presidential campaign, as well as her PAC "Team Stand for America" this year, and he has been a longstanding donor to Kevin McCarthy. In 2019, Gov. Gavin Newsom attended a fundraiser that was hosted in Coalinga at Harris Ranch, which is owned by Harris. While in attendance, Harris and Newsom posed for a photo together and discussed funding the proposed Temperance Flat and Sites reservoirs. | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- The second host of the fundraiser, Richard Spencer, owns Spencer Enterprises, a Fresno, California based construction company. FEC Records show Spencer donated $5,000 to California Governor Gavin Newsom's campaign on March 30, 2023. In addition to donating to Newsom, Spencer is a large donor to Kevin McCarthy, McCarthy's various leadership PACS, and on March 31, 2023, just one day after he donated to Gavin Newsom, Spencer gave a maximum contribution to Randy Feenstra, a Congressman in Iowa. | | ---|---|--- Less than two months later, DeSantis and his wife were campaigning for President in Iowa where they attended the 2023 Feenstra Family Picnic, hosted by the US House representative Randy Feenstra in Sioux Center. In 2020, with Kevin McCarthy's help, Feenstra successfully primaried pro-Trump, America First Congressman Steven King after then minority leader Kevin McCarthy stripped King of his committee assignments after the New York Times King was arguably one of President Trump's strongest allies in Congress. FEC records also show Harris and Spencer have both donated to California Republican Congressional candidate John Duarte, a pistachio farmer who was first elected to Congress in 2022. During the Republican Primary in 2022, Duarte was challenged by David Giglio, a pro Trump GOP candidate for Congress. According to Giglio, McCarthy worked against his campaign, and even went as far as telling donors to only donate to candidates who were approved and liked by Kevin McCarthy. Giglio provided this publication with an exclusive comment, adding, "I met with Richard Spencer in December of 2021 while running for California's 13th Congressional District about endorsing and donating to my campaign. We met for over an hour. He told me he really liked me. When I asked for an endorsement and a donation at the end of the meeting, Richard said "I can't do that until I speak with the leader (Kevin McCarthy)." Giglio added, "When I asked John Harris for a meeting about my Congressional race, he declined.. According to Giglio, Spencer told him that he only makes donations to candidates and only has fundraisers for candidates if it's approved by Kevin McCarthy, who is now the Republican Speaker of the House. Giglio also said, "It is common knowledge in California's Central Valley that major GOP and McCarthy aligned donors like John Harris and Richard Spencer only donate to candidates at the behest of Kevin McCarthy. This pertains to all positions and elections, from County Supervisor, Congress, and even Presidential races." In other words, instead of openly endorsing President Trump for re-election in 2024, McCarthy is subverting President Trump by telling his top donors who to support and donate to in 2024. In this case, it is Republican candidates for President who are challenging President Trump for the 2024 GOP nomination. Following DeSantis's fundraiser at Harris Ranch, Granville Wire (GW), In a statement to GW about why he and Harris hosted a max donation fundraiser for DeSantis's Presidential campaign in California, Spencer said, " I think (former President Donald) Trump did a lot of really good things for us before he did some not-so-good things for us -- us being conservative Republicans. I would personally be delighted if he changed his mind ... and didn't run. But I doubt very much that that's going to happen. We think that this guy (DeSantis) is a real good guy and probably would make a really good president. I also think that Tim Scott has a very positive message and needs to be brought, perhaps, and exposed to people here (in the Valley). Nikki Haley, I know, is John's (Harris) kind of first choice and she would be really good." Granville Wire is owned by Iranian immigrant and California Developer whose | | ---|---|--- Along with being a big donor to Kevin McCarthy, Assemi also donated $29,200 to Gavin Newsom's Gubernatorial campaign. | | ---|---|--- It's rather ironic that Ron DeSantis spends his time attacking California Governor Gavin Newsom over what DeSantis calls "woke policies", and yet DeSantis is taking campaign donations from Kevin McCarthy donors who have a documented history of hosting fundraisers for and donating thousands of dollars to Gavin Newsom, as recently as March 2023. It also begs the question...why are so many of McCarthy's max donation donors donating to Gavin Newsom, and why are these same donors donating to Ron DeSantis? If Ron DeSantis is truly such a threat to the RINO establishment and the Democrat Party, why is DeSantis getting campaign donations from California's biggest financiers of the RINO GOP Establishment and Gavin Newsom? If Kevin McCarthy is truly a Trump ally, how come none of his top GOP donors from California (who claim to only donate with McCarthy's approval) haven't yet donated to President Trump's 2024 re-election? And lastly, why are McCarthy's top California donors telling a California publication owned by a financier of McCarthy, radical Democrats, and pro-impeachment Republicans that they would "personally be delighted if he [Donald Trump] changed his mind " and didn't run for President in 2024? Whether it's , who has reportedly been getting his Silicon Valley colleagues and other Big Tech millionaires and billionaires (Peter Thiel, David Sacks, Elon Musk) to support Ron DeSantis's Presidential campaign, or whether it's McCarthy's top donors in California hosting high dollar fundraisers for Ron DeSantis and donating to other 2024 challengers to Trump, it is clear that Kevin McCarthy is green lighting a subversive donor class assault on President Trump's 2024 re-election. It was always a mistake for President Trump to endorse Kevin McCarthy for Speaker of the House. Kevin McCarthy is a snake in the grass waiting to strike President Trump when the time is right in an effort to kill off President Trump's chances at re-election. However, President Trump continues to associate with McCarthy although he has always had the power to destroy McCarthy first. When will President Trump finally wake up and realize that Kevin McCarthy is just another Paul Ryan? It's also no secret that Kevin McCarthy and Paul Ryan are best friends. Just like it's no secret that Paul Ryan, via his position on the board of Fox News, is serving as a media advisor to DeSantis's Presidential campaign. Perhaps President Trump needs to be reminded of the Fables of Aesop , specifically the fable about "The Farmer and Snake". The Farmer & the Snake A Farmer walked through his field one cold winter morning. On the ground lay a Snake, stiff and frozen with the cold. The Farmer knew how deadly the Snake could be, and yet he picked it up and put it in his bosom to warm it back to life. The Snake soon revived, and when it had enough strength, bit the man who had been so kind to it. The bite was deadly and the Farmer felt that he must die. As he drew his last breath, he said to those standing around:** Learn from my fate not to take pity on a scoundrel. Kevin McCarthy is a snake and a filthy scoundrel who deserves no pity. Summer has officially arrived, which means the snake has thawed. Will President Trump remain inside the den of poisonous vipers he has found himself within, or will he prevent Kevin McCarthy from being able to strike the MAGA and America First movement with his toxic venom ever again? name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: Do you remember June 26, 2018?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Alexandria knocked on doors and wore down her shoes until rainwater came through.
#
Five years ago today, Alexandria shocked the world by winning her primary election against a 20-year incumbent who outspent her 10-1. Everybody counted our movement out, saying that we could never beat the establishment.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230626.ipPxxP&refcode=em20230626-4534-P_FND_ANO_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4534%2E2526796%2EMzQXmp)_Photo by José A. Alvarado Jr._
[Everything we have done is only possible because of the grassroots supporters who fuel this movement with grassroots contributions. Can you support Alexandria today with a $3 donation to help us continue to build this movement?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230626.ipPxxP&refcode=em20230626-4534-P_FND_ANO_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4534%2E2526796%2EMzQXmp)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230626.ipPxxP&refcode=em20230626-4534-P_FND_ANO_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4534%2E2526796%2EMzQXmp)**
Alexandria launched her campaign for Congress in 2017 and won the primary election on June 26, 2018. She won by building a grassroots movement, meeting people where they were, and doing the hard work of canvassing and knocking on every door she could — Alexandria knocked on doors and wore down her shoes until rainwater came through.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230626.ipPxxP&refcode=em20230626-4534-P_FND_ANO_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=4534%2E2526796%2EMzQXmp)
Today, we are still proving the naysayers wrong.
We have built a strong multi-generational, multi-ethnic coalition fighting for livable wages, universal health care, and a green future, and accomplished more together than anyone ever expected.
**Your support has allowed us to build a different kind of campaign.** A campaign that truly centers community organizing and building relationships year-round — not just before elections. Alexandria still doesn’t curry favor with billionaires or host fancy cocktail party fundraisers. This is still a people-powered operation that relies on thousands of small contributions.
[→ On the fifth anniversary of AOC’s primary win, will you donate $3 right now to help Alexandria continue to fight for a brighter future for all? ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230626.ipPxxP&refcode=em20230626-4534-P_FND_ANO_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=4534%2E2526796%2EMzQXmp)
Thank you for being a part of this movement. Together we will continue to fight for racial, social, economic, and environmental justice.
Pa’lante,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230626?refcode=em20230626-4534-P_FND_ANO_GOL&t=24&refcode2=4534_2526796_MzQXmp&akid=4534%2E2526796%2EMzQXmp)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230626-4534-P_FND_ANO_GOL&t=25&akid=4534%2E2526796%2EMzQXmp)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=26&akid=4534%2E2526796%2EMzQXmp) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=27&akid=4534%2E2526796%2EMzQXmp) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=28&akid=4534%2E2526796%2EMzQXmp)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=29&akid=4534%2E2526796%2EMzQXmp)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=30&akid=4534%2E2526796%2EMzQXmp)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: Kevin McCarthy hints at impeachment inquiry into AG Merrick Garland

name: Dr. Brian Williams
subject: Becoming the first trauma surgeon in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
This team has the opportunity to make history

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65441624/413447079/1633369994?refcode=EM_FR_230626History_DBW_7_Actives_logo&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzE3N2E4ZDMtNDQxNC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7JZWXXL9lTHJoo_NGVe4JxFiKwKp6PCCmiTCwwXCYu8=)
Peter,

Our campaign is in a unique position to make history in 2024. There has never been a trauma surgeon elected to serve in Congress. And there’s never been a Black doctor who could vote in Congress. These perspectives are both vital to our efforts as Democrats to make life-saving change for our country.

As a trauma surgeon, I know the real impact of gun violence and lack of access to healthcare on everyday Americans. I’ve seen it in emergency departments across the country and in my home community of Dallas. The preventable deaths of so many children and adults at the hands of both of these crises have driven my work outside of the hospital for years. I’m running because I want to put trauma surgeons like myself out of work– but that’s not possible unless we have trauma surgeons like me at the decision-making table in Washington.

With your support, I can take my two decades of frontline experience to Washington and through legislation, create life-saving change nationwide.

Right now, we’re closing in on our campaign’s very first quarterly filing deadline, after which our fundraising numbers will be made public. The strong fundraising total we report will signal to national groups and donors that our campaign has what it takes to win. But right now, we only have a few days left to give it everything we can, and I’m hoping I can count on your support in this historic race.

[Will you help send the very first trauma surgeon to Congress by contributing $32, $50, or whatever you can today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65441625/413447080/1633369994?refcode=EM_FR_230626History_DBW_7_Actives_l1&amount=32&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzE3N2E4ZDMtNDQxNC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7JZWXXL9lTHJoo_NGVe4JxFiKwKp6PCCmiTCwwXCYu8=)

clean_body: This team has the opportunity to make history = Peter, Our campaign is in a unique position to make history in 2024. There has never been a trauma surgeon elected to serve in Congress. And there’s never been a Black doctor who could vote in Congress. These perspectives are both vital to our efforts as Democrats to make life-saving change for our country. As a trauma surgeon, I know the real impact of gun violence and lack of access to healthcare on everyday Americans. I’ve seen it in emergency departments across the country and in my home community of Dallas. The preventable deaths of so many children and adults at the hands of both of these crises have driven my work outside of the hospital for years. I’m running because I want to put trauma surgeons like myself out of work– but that’s not possible unless we have trauma surgeons like me at the decision-making table in Washington. With your support, I can take my two decades of frontline experience to Washington and through legislation, create life-saving change nationwide. Right now, we’re closing in on our campaign’s very first quarterly filing deadline, after which our fundraising numbers will be made public. The strong fundraising total we report will signal to national groups and donors that our campaign has what it takes to win. But right now, we only have a few days left to give it everything we can, and I’m hoping I can count on your support in this historic race. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | = = = = = I’m so grateful for your support. Together, we’ll make history in my home district of TX-32. Onward, = – Brian Dr. Brian Williams is an Air Force Academy graduate, a Harvard-trained surgeon, a former congressional health policy advisor, and a nationally recognized leader at the intersection of public policy and structural racism, gun violence, and health equity. name: ESG Survey via Heritage Action
subject: Will you help Heritage Action fight ESG by taking our survey?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Heritage Action for America |
body:
With it being the “wokest” month of the year, Heritage Action thought it would be a perfect time to conduct our...

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zndnliasrov3es6k5afrfc87l33i43iofgeeome0_rp22sh2s8i66o77c3i62p34cjh2bs)
---
| | Fellow conservative, Now that it’s “pride” month, many companies will be coming out of the woodwork to show their allegiance to the “social” part of the ESG agenda. (ESG stands for Environmental, Social, Governance—and it’s the Left’s latest way to grade companies and pressure them to support the Left’s socialist agenda). name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is serious.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| |
---
| | | I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.
**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**
But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.
**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---
| [](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyUkbGO3CAQhp8Gd1gwcLAULiKdnOpSRCddiTDMelFsbMF475Snj7xJqjS5euab_9c3by_-JeQll_lbWHGgSr42T3f_M5cfyONRKeTSPAhQXBgOxqsuDdpCUqbDQZqLvUgQTnS3wSYbUYMN1zTZZC8aBIAzMDmQAWLs8nDeEQaMtNJJ3UvtlAFlJuHk1anItAgLVmo93bDifkxLjqEQhrWP29otw41ob0x9YTAyGBvGo2L_nkvFdG4wGH83v26Vx63MFVtjMAJvWNIJqbGeUM1lZuqZ6oEMzEGrj2HdQ54LU89_Wir_9pW_fn-FXgolnPUk1dOTFpaDuEgGBj885fQJ4JGzFcJCZ_idUyX-1wkD83GU-7-Drg5pf8_LkpuxTIt5DXl5-KD_-9ivAAAA__-6b5Pr)

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?

---

Ryan Zinke

name: Team Baldwin
subject: What if we told you…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| This is shaping up to be Tammy’s most competitive reelection yet.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=458%2E35263%2EzHH7rP)
Peter, is there anything we can say to convince you to **[make a donation to our campaign before Friday’s end-of-quarter public filing deadline](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jun23.CtqEq3&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20230626_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=458%2E35263%2EzHH7rP)**? What if we said that Tammy’s seat is one of the most vulnerable Senate seats in the country? Or what if we told you that Wisconsin Senate races are historically close (Republican Ron Johnson won Wisconsin's other Senate seat by just _1 point_ last year!) — and that a recent poll shows Tammy’s race is a statistical tie? And what if we said that one of Tammy’s potential Republican opponents is ready to spend _$20 million of his own personal fortune_ to defeat her? This is shaping up to be Tammy’s most competitive reelection yet, so all eyes will be on Wisconsin in 2024. That’s why we need your help NOW to build a winning campaign that can withstand whatever attacks the GOP throws Tammy’s way. **[If we fall short of our end-of-quarter goal before the upcoming FEC deadline, Republicans will see that as a sign of weakness and potential opponents will start lining up to challenge Tammy. Peter, will you pitch in today to help reach our goal and reelect Tammy?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jun23.CtqEq3&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20230626_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=458%2E35263%2EzHH7rP)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-jun23.0mNvpg&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20230626_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=458%2E35263%2EzHH7rP)

name: Fetterman HQ
subject: A real person is writing these emails
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
A major source of what we need.
#
Derek,
With our end-of-quarter deadline in less than a week, we wanted to acknowledge that you’ve probably been getting a lot of emails, including from us.
We felt it was only appropriate to take a minute or two to explain why these emails are so important, and why donating to our people-powered campaign today would make a major impact. **[If you’re ready to chip in, you can use this link!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230626-1?refcode=em20230626-1-8426&refcode2=8426_434096_3pryPp&akid=8426%2E434096%2E3pryPp)**
**Our email program is a major source of the donations our campaign needs to function.** As a people-powered campaign, we rely on supporters like you chipping in $5, $25, or even $50 at a time to keep up our work. We don’t have billionaire benefactors, millions of dollars to self-fund, or corporate PAC funders.
There are real people who set our fundraising goals, write these emails (hi! 👋), and track our progress. And we know you are a real person, too. This is why we’ll never resort to the-sky-is-falling tactics to try and scare you into contributing.
**[So we’re just gonna ask honestly: Can you chip in $5 or any amount today so we can keep powering John’s work in the Senate? We’re grateful for your support, and we’ll always put in the honest work to earn it.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230626-1?refcode=em20230626-1-8426&refcode2=8426_434096_3pryPp&akid=8426%2E434096%2E3pryPp)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230626-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230626-8426&refcode2=8426_434096_3pryPp&akid=8426%2E434096%2E3pryPp)**
Building real relationships with you and your fellow supporters is so important. Thank you for your support, Derek — it means the world.
—Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230626-8426-footer&t=1&refcode2=8426_434096_3pryPp&akid=8426%2E434096%2E3pryPp)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8426%2E434096%2E3pryPp)

clean_body: A major source of what we need. Derek, With our end-of-quarter deadline in less than a week, we wanted to acknowledge that you’ve probably been getting a lot of emails, including from us. We felt it was only appropriate to take a minute or two to explain why these emails are so important, and why donating to our people-powered campaign today would make a major impact. Our email program is a major source of the donations our campaign needs to function. As a people-powered campaign, we rely on supporters like you chipping in $5, $25, or even $50 at a time to keep up our work. We don’t have billionaire benefactors, millions of dollars to self-fund, or corporate PAC funders. There are real people who set our fundraising goals, write these emails (hi! 👋), and track our progress. And we know you are a real person, too. This is why we’ll never resort to the-sky-is-falling tactics to try and scare you into contributing. Building real relationships with you and your fellow supporters is so important. Thank you for your support, Derek — it means the world. —Fetterman HQ | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

And this is the last chance for grassroots donors like you to show Adam Frisch that you are 100% in and behind him to help him defeat Lauren Boebert next November.
We’re about to be under a microscope like we’ve never been before, so we need a show of financial strength unlike any we’ve ever had.
That’s why we’ve set our biggest goal ever: **Raising $1.5 million online from grassroots donors before this critical FEC deadline to show reporters, Boebert’s Super PACs, and the entire Republican and Democratic establishment that we’re all-in to defeat Lauren Boebert in 2024.**
It’s a big goal, but that’s how important things are accomplished: By setting big goals and working together to hit them. **We’re so close to hitting this goal, and with your support now, we’ll be able to show everyone the strength of our campaign and help Adam Frisch defeat Lauren Boebert next November.**
Adam isn’t taking money from corporate PACs like Boebert is. Instead, he’s building a people-powered campaign funded by grassroots donors like you. People from all over the country who read emails like this one and give what they can, when they can.

name: Lizzie Pannill Fletcher
subject: Will you help me and Colin Allred before the FEC deadline?
body:
He has what it takes—and what we need. |
---

| | | | I want to talk to you again about my friend Colin Allred’s Senate race here in Texas. Recent polls are close, showing Colin within single digits of Ted Cruz. I know Colin has what it takes to defeat Cruz. How do I know? Because he’s done it before. In 2018, Colin and I made history by defeating long-time Republican incumbents and helping Democrats take back control of the House of Representatives. [_**We can do it again in 2024—but it’ll take all of us working at it together. Will you help us do it by making a contribution that will be split between Colin’s campaign and mine?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65442046/413448678/-760365000?refcode=folf230626split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWEyOGMwZS00NjE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r_wLblp4_mAqigcQs-PCW-ufi5t2zsOzC8R9YUjDxGE=) I know Colin will deliver better, stronger leadership for Texans in the Senate—the same kind of leadership he’s delivered in the House. Colin is focused on thoughtful policy solutions that will make a meaningful difference in the lives of Texans and all Americans, like creating good-paying jobs, lowering prescription drug costs, and supporting veterans. Our team has worked to win our race here in TX-07 and also to support candidates up and down the ballot and across the state—and in 2024, that will include Colin’s campaign. [_**We are approaching the first FEC deadline since Colin launched his Senate campaign, and I want us to give him a strong boost of support. You can help our end-of-quarter efforts by contributing here.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65442049/413448679/-760365000?refcode=folf230626split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWEyOGMwZS00NjE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r_wLblp4_mAqigcQs-PCW-ufi5t2zsOzC8R9YUjDxGE=) Together, we can do anything,

name: Joe Kent
subject: Please help!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund
body:
Dear Peter,
My filing deadline is coming up at Midnight on June 30th - less than a week away! Can you please help my campaign with a contribution today?
Show your support at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/C1mj763KCuy52Zjn7c0XHBXg/pgZb5IgyLbGNvKkfCZmzoA).
Last election, I lost by less than **one percentage point.** My campaign was outspent 6-to-1 in the General Election by Marie Perez, a radical Democrat with financial support from major establishment donors.
You can help ensure we are not outspent this cycle by donating today at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/C1mj763KCuy52Zjn7c0XHBXg/pgZb5IgyLbGNvKkfCZmzoA).
Marie voted **_against_** protecting women's sports, stabilizing braces for disabled veterans, and deregulating the fishing and timber industries. She is no different from the rest of the Democratic Party.
The Republican Party is unified in its support for me as the 2024 nominee. I already have four county party endorsements, and my campaign is working hard to get the truth about Marie Perez out to the district.
But the mission can only succeed if we are able to raise the money to go on offense! Please contribute at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/C1mj763KCuy52Zjn7c0XHBXg/pgZb5IgyLbGNvKkfCZmzoA) to help us hit our goal before the month ends!
Respectfully,
Joe Kent
P.S. - Marie Perez is no moderate. She voted against protecting women's and girl's sports from biological males. Take action by donating today at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/C1mj763KCuy52Zjn7c0XHBXg/pgZb5IgyLbGNvKkfCZmzoA).

we have the DREAM TEAM!

If you open this email, your day is about to get brighter.

Why?

Because America has NEVER had a more dynamic, principled, and qualified team working together to preserve the American Dream for future generations. Larry Kudlow, former Director of the National Economic Council under President Trump,

Chad Wolf, former Acting Secretary of Homeland Security in the Trump Administration,

Kellyanne Conway, Senior Counselor to President Trump,

Bobby Jindal, former Governor of Louisiana,

Rick Perry, former Governor of Texas and former Secretary of Energy under President Trump,

Lt. General (ret.) Keith Kellogg, former Executive Secretary and Chief of Staff of the National Security Council in the Trump Administration,

And many more America First leaders, all UNDER THE SAME ROOF, fighting for an America First Future at the America First Policy Institute (AFPI)!

Now, friends, the only person we’re waiting on to join the team is YOU! Would you consider chipping in a tax-deductible donation of $25 or more today to join the America First Dream Team? But without your support, we’re running on borrowed time.

Every spineless Republican is afraid to say it, but I will:
**There are __SERIOUS__ questions about Election integrity. **
They'll call me a liar. They'll probably even try to _censor_ this email.

So what happens today will decide everything.

My name is Eli Crane - you might not know me, but I'm a Navy SEAL, a businessman, a husband, a father, and a humble servant of God.

I'm also the Pro-Trump, Pro-America conservative who represents AZ-02 - the biggest race on the map.

The Democrats hate me & want me silenced. Hell, many of the Republicans want me silenced too. **_The Establishment and anti-Trump haters will do ANYTHING to destroy me. There is no time left._**

They have all the power & resources they need, and that's why I'm humbly swallowing my pride to ask you for help today.

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: The mainstream media is dropping the ball
body:
National media organizations are putting ratings and ad revenue ahead of their duty to inform the public.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1161%2E120351%2Em7Gvmd)
Did you see this, Peter?
**It’s no secret that national news organizations have been dropping the ball when it comes to their coverage of Donald Trump**. And it’s clear that their priorities are chasing ratings and ads revenue — _not_ informing the public.
As the 2024 election ramps up, our newsrooms in 8 battleground states are committed to providing reliable, fact-based reporting on local stories that the mainstream media ignores in favor of wall-to-wall coverage of Trump.
[**Take a minute to read more below and, if you can, pitch in $5 today to fund this important work. It takes a lot of resources to support**** _eight_****local newsrooms and we’re counting on your support to keep going.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230626?refcode=em20230626&refcode2=1161_120351_m7Gvmd&akid=1161%2E120351%2Em7Gvmd)
— The Courier Newsroom Team
* * *
The media coverage leading up to Donald Trump’s first election in 2016 was abysmal, Peter.
TV news channels aired countless hours of his rallies, his speeches, and even his plane idling on the tarmac. Meanwhile, even print publications uncritically parroted his wild claims and conspiracy theories, failing repeatedly to provide the context that would have made it clear such musings were untethered from reality.
**Unfortunately, it’s clear that this time around will be no different. Despite the media’s duty to inform the public, too many news organizations are already giving Trump wall-to-wall coverage in an attempt to drive profits and boost their ratings.**
[**Will you chip in $5 today to help us fight back against this kind of sensationalized, profit-driven coverage? Courier Newsroom is committed to providing reliable, in-depth reporting for audiences in ‘news deserts’ across 8 battleground states, but we can’t do it without your support.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230626?refcode=em20230626&refcode2=1161_120351_m7Gvmd&akid=1161%2E120351%2Em7Gvmd)
**Just take a look at the front page of _The_ _New York Times_ from last Wednesday:**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230626?refcode=em20230626&refcode2=1161_120351_m7Gvmd&akid=1161%2E120351%2Em7Gvmd)
**The fact that 185 million Americans say they don’t trust the news should be a wake-up call for mainstream media organizations who continue to put ratings and profit ahead of informative coverage and our democracy.**
But rather than focusing on the 37 charges brought against Trump by the Justice Department or the widespread misinformation campaign he’s pursuing, the _Times_ chooses to center the fact that he pled not guilty, calling it a “momentous scene.”
As the presidential race ramps up, this kind of coverage is only going to help Trump in the long run — just as it did in 2016. **And that’s why we’re dedicated to doing things differently.**
At Courier Newsroom, we’re focused on providing informative, fact-based coverage of local events in 8 battleground states. We serve audiences in ‘news deserts’ that lack other reliable sources of local reporting, and our journalists pick up the national media’s slack by calling misinformation out for what it is.
[**But this work takes resources, Peter, and we rely on the generous support of people like you to help fund our efforts. So if you’re tired of the media constantly putting profits ahead of informative coverage, will you chip in $5 today and help us keep bringing the facts to communities that need it?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230626?refcode=em20230626&refcode2=1161_120351_m7Gvmd&akid=1161%2E120351%2Em7Gvmd)

clean_body: National media organizations are putting ratings and ad revenue ahead of their duty to inform the public. Did you see this, Peter? It’s no secret that national news organizations have been dropping the ball when it comes to their coverage of Donald Trump. And it’s clear that their priorities are chasing ratings and ads revenue — not informing the public. As the 2024 election ramps up, our newsrooms in 8 battleground states are committed to providing reliable, fact-based reporting on local stories that the mainstream media ignores in favor of wall-to-wall coverage of Trump. — The Courier Newsroom Team The media coverage leading up to Donald Trump’s first election in 2016 was abysmal, Peter. TV news channels aired countless hours of his rallies, his speeches, and even his plane idling on the tarmac. Meanwhile, even print publications uncritically parroted his wild claims and conspiracy theories, failing repeatedly to provide the context that would have made it clear such musings were untethered from reality. Unfortunately, it’s clear that this time around will be no different. Despite the media’s duty to inform the public, too many news organizations are already giving Trump wall-to-wall coverage in an attempt to drive profits and boost their ratings. Just take a look at the front page of The New York Times from last Wednesday: The fact that 185 million Americans say they don’t trust the news should be a wake-up call for mainstream media organizations who continue to put ratings and profit ahead of informative coverage and our democracy. But rather than focusing on the 37 charges brought against Trump by the Justice Department or the widespread misinformation campaign he’s pursuing, the Times chooses to center the fact that he pled not guilty, calling it a “momentous scene.” As the presidential race ramps up, this kind of coverage is only going to help Trump in the long run — just as it did in 2016. And that’s why we’re dedicated to doing things differently. At Courier Newsroom, we’re focused on providing informative, fact-based coverage of local events in 8 battleground states. We serve audiences in ‘news deserts’ that lack other reliable sources of local reporting, and our journalists pick up the national media’s slack by calling misinformation out for what it is. Thanks for supporting us in our mission, The Courier Newsroom Team Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

body:
Hi, friend, it's Colin, and I had to reach out one more time before our end-of-quarter deadline – the first major public fundraising goal of this campaign – because unfortunately, we're still short of our $750,000 goal.
Our ability to defeat Ted Cruz depends on reaching critical fundraising goals like this one. 2018 was the most expensive Senate race Texas has ever seen, and Democrats came within 2.6% of defeating Ted Cruz.
And listen: A new poll says 14% of Texas voters are undecided – so we need to be able to reach each and every voter to win this race.
Please, friend, I'm personally asking: Will you chip in $25, or whatever you can spare, and split a donation between my campaign and Serve America before my first public fundraising deadline on Friday? Every dollar helps in our fight to defeat Ted Cruz. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]

**[My name is Laura Friedman, and I’m running for Congress in CA-30 the critical Democratic seat Rep. Adam Schiff is vacating. I’m a lifelong public servant, but my favorite title is “mom” to my daughter Rachel.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65442853/413451717/62647395?refcode=em-6.26.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDE5MjEyYTEtNDgxNC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=o37M9rTcY2sBBYXTJxyBm1Doce0IGpODPxLn6hDYdu8=) **When I think about why I’m running to become the first woman to ever represent California’s 30th district in Congress, I think about my daughter.**

It’s because of her that I fight the big fights: To address climate change, protect reproductive freedoms, reform our health care system, defend civil & voting rights, keep our communities safe, and so much more.

**We have a lot of work ahead to secure our future, team. But I know together, we can make real change. It’s what I’ve done as a California Assemblymember, as well as the Mayor of Glendale.**

During my time as a legislator, I’ve gotten results: From championing healthcare access, to banning toxic chemicals in our environment, to increasing funding for mass transit, to fighting to improve tenant protections in California, I’m proud of my progressive track record. I know that our community deserves a leader who can build upon Rep. Schiff’s legacy and fight for our values in Washington.

This is a critical seat for the future of Los Angeles. I’m committed to winning this fight so we can have a brighter future for our children free of extremism, hatred, and intolerance.

name: Cori Bush
subject: Black and Palestinian liberation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
End U.S. complicity in Israel’s human rights abuses. | |
---
Peter, Have you seen Rashida Tlaib’s email? Yesterday, she wrote about our shared push for Black and Palestinian liberation in Congress. I first started learning about the Israeli government’s human rights abuses against Palestinians while protesting police brutality in the Ferguson Uprising. Palestinians in St. Louis showed up in support of Black lives. Protestors met with a Palestinian delegation who visited us and shared tips on how to defend ourselves from militarized police brutality. I’m proud to work alongside Rashida, the only Palestinian-American in Congress, to end U.S. complicity in Israel’s human rights abuses and to redirect funding away from militarization and into our communities instead. [**Can you split a donation today between my campaign and Rep. Peter,

I am pledging to put our country on the path to American renewal. Over the next 18 months, Americans will face a choice to reverse the decline of our country or surrender our American ideals to woke ideology. I refuse to stand down and watch the work of our Founding Fathers fade into a form that is unrecognizable. I know that freedom is worth fighting for, and a leader **always** finds a way. We're going to make sure truth is the foundation of everything we do in this country, Peter, and we're going to make sure common sense is no longer an uncommon virtue. We are going to be strong, we are going to be energetic, and we're going to get things done. **_I am not going to lead merely with words. I am going to lead with deeds and I'm going to produce results._** As we near the end of the FEC fundraising quarter--**June 30th** --I want to make it clear to the Left that we are waging a war on woke ideology and we are WINNING. This first end-of-quarter deadline means we have reached the point where our campaign fundraising is showcased and compared across the field. **Peter, this is our opportunity to prove our strength. This is our opportunity to show Joe Biden how strong our movement is. This is our opportunity to produce historic results.** _I have the humility to know that I cannot do this alone. I am asking for your help to win this race for all of us. _ There is no substitute for victory, Peter. Let's get it done. **[https://RonDesantis.com/become-a-donor](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=123617a151af43e582362ef0696cf9b5&_e=JgCE-lvK5ft9T0h0Qn69WVcOB63utN2zgHXFK0R7XoKlFe5J1uXcLqsArswtPaD_uOP9y7kDs6EAcs_J8xASX8lZjf7j2YhgmP4QFVh6Qza13Omd2TvKAA1agE4co-QGNPxZ9-3KQs72FHbffT_2h5hH2CQVWvJE816L7K6U3OxClqNUvaKVClyJh6z1iGmZRcIIY6bsmet-iDzbL9yfg9ZhpBp8jn20gwmkJVJ8JYMPNBMfkz2LOSog6PX5IIDjc6mkQSo3x84k3BJLcRb_uWSoV3n62fvTa7JbqRGs_1_VUc5yDDtaakVM4iRXRVZw_3CKTbC9tfsDJFXNSYZoP6prbZcVksh20XaS_Gxc_fOaus4qxrhEgeyfWafXX1H3 "https://desantis.com/become-a-donor")** Yours in Freedom,

| | | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=123617a151af43e582362ef0696cf9b5&_e=JgCE-lvK5ft9T0h0Qn69WVcOB63utN2zgHXFK0R7XoKlFe5J1uXcLqsArswtPaD_uOP9y7kDs6EAcs_J8xASX8lZjf7j2YhgmP4QFVh6Qza13Omd2TvKAA1agE4co-QGNPxZ9-3KQs72FHbffT_2h5hH2CQVWvJE816L7K6U3OxClqNUvaKVClyJh6z1iGmZRcIIY6bsmet-iDzbL9yfg9ZhpBp8jn20gwmkJVJ8JYNiGS_9mgNSBlLfDIBziZ6VxuNuTA4AFIrDe8M-PDETDY4VZIyxFjv6weRDdUu54R1Dwo6ypeH9ehPQ_c73eyOg6IB3OKVV35f3AlPvY_fZ4PuIEmHOIeL4FPE6Z5ubd3PpJkJ-U5SuQxKniGtxFz0y)

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

We want these numbers to be as strong as possible, so I’m asking: Will you chip in to become a Founding Donor to help grow our campaign and make sure we're in a strong position ahead of our first FEC deadline on Friday?

Over the next few months, we're going to be focused on scaling up our organizing efforts across the country and ensuring we’re reaching voters -- sharing how Joe and Kamala have worked to build a better America for us all. But no one can win a race as big as this by themselves. Julie Julie Chavez Rodriguez Campaign Manager Biden-Harris 2024

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Their final attack on me . . .
body:
14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

| | | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zcjtdkmbus8algbghjrb6d3sbqftm0mqmk6fe3cg_rp22sh2s8i66o77c3i66o31chh2bs)
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zgeo282ef55o9jf96s0ilr5k6vkjc9vntp8qaod0_rp22sh2s8i66o77c3i66o31chh2bs)
Dear Friend,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent's home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You've seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I'm unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan's quote on leadership: "Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**."

I've been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That's why I'm writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z277ik5n81fb1nveqkp9belm7slg47m2hb54b5j0_rp22sh2s8i66o77c3i66o31chh2bs)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zimq3ooqj1uisq6d38gt0tsbdbrber41c87bsc5g_rp22sh2s8i66o77c3i66o31chh2bs)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn't my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren't cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That's where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zffe23riicfdov3p1pcbhpq4ckbd3gssc9u88g2g_rp22sh2s8i66o77c3i66o31chh2bs)?**

When you do, I'll be following up as the case progresses but I'll also keep you informed of the great work I'm doing at OMG . . . and it's exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I'll admit is thrilling. And I'm starting armed with all of the lessons I've learned to avoid the pitfalls I've experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we're more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

**[I'm asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z9v25rh3ua3tvqk4iebheg40sa00d2253q0s85h8_rp22sh2s8i66o77c3i66o31chh2bs)**. And I'll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhmce83k2m4ha46n7uqf2jsrj47vv3bl75bo5tt0_rp22sh2s8i66o77c3i66o31chh2bs)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O'Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zgbp844398drunsq3nugjru9ardb22tc6e65eafo_rp22sh2s8i66o77c3i66o31chh2bs)**.

---

Deroy Murdock
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z18uu8lma3ig5gb2gp56iiu9ad34e8u884482l6o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshi64pr4ctie48d245p25oh4cdgeeo74cdg62p324no)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zu7dlcft4tlupr84b3m2dgtlpn44hbip8j8uccq0_rp22sh2s8i66o77c3i66o31chh2bs)_

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z70k55jb3cmdb7e2a0ftocbam60rcv002d1svaug_rp22sh2s8i66o77c3i66o31chh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

subject: For Josh Hawley, it’s all the family business

body:
READ: Let’s look at Senator Josh Hawley’s connections to the abortion pill case
#
Peter,
Last year, just moments after the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, Missouri became the first state to fully outlaw abortion.
This year, activist lawyers tried to ban the most commonly used abortion pill in all 50 states. **And for Josh Hawley, it’s all the family business:**

Wade, and end these Big Brother attacks on abortion rights once and for all.** He’s on a mission to take back power from corrupt politicians like Josh Hawley and put real, working people in charge of our country. clean_body: We have to make our fundraising numbers public at the end of the month – will you chip in now? = Hey team, The end of this week marks our quarterly filing deadline, when we’re required to make our fundraising numbers public. These deadlines are huge for national groups and donors that are watching our race here in IL-13 to see if we have what it takes to hold on to this seat. That’s why we’ve set an ambitious fundraising goal – we need to raise $5,000 in the next five days to demonstrate just how strong our team is. If Democrats are going to establish a majority in the House in 2024 we can’t afford to lose a single blue district, and we already have a Republican challenger vying for Nikki’s seat. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | = = = = = Thanks for standing with us, Team Nikki Paid for by Nikki For Congress Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States Nikki has spent her life fighting for workers and working families by strengthening unions nationwide, and she was instrumental in passing a $15 minimum wage in Illinois while working as a senior advisor for Governor JB Pritzker. Team,
I know your inbox is about to be (if it already isn't) flooded with requests from other candidates and organizations talking about end-of-quarter.
**As you're thinking about where to send your support, I'm asking you to consider Team Moore-Miller.**
You see, we still have fundraising goals to hit to keep Maryland moving forward and ensure no one is left behind.

name: Indiana Dems
subject: It’s here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, It’s coming down to the wire. We’re still running almost $3,000 short of our goal and without your help, we have no chance of matching our Republican opponents. We rely on grassroots donors like you to power this operation, and we’ll be in trouble unless we make up some serious ground in the coming days. [**Chip in right now to help us close the gap. These final donations will make all the difference as we head into this important election year.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65443426/413453478/1643342139?refcode=230626-ItsHere&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODEyYzMxZS00YjE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tyM-NOO92edMZTqvdKx4I-cwTfbDwNRfqWTH36jjIAo=) We’ve seen what happens when Republicans are allowed to have unchecked control of our state government. name: Jon Tester
subject: Happy Monday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Francisco Aguilar [https://secure
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-tester-split-june23?refcode=em_fr_b1_062623_Tester-surrogate_30AC&amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-tester-split-june23?refcode=em_fr_b1_062623_Tester-surrogate_30AC&amount=10]
(Me getting a fresh cut)
Hey friend, happy Monday!
I wanted to take a moment to tell you a bit about why I’m in this fight.
I’m not the kind of guy you’d expect to see in Congress. I still get $12 flattop haircuts. And at home on the farm, I butcher my own meat.
I didn’t come to Washington to play into partisan hogwash—I came because I didn’t see anyone in our government sticking up for rural communities like mine.
I’m running to continue to deliver for Montanans, from holding our government accountable to standing up for veterans and protecting the Montana way of life.
But with Mitch McConnell and his dark money backers hellbent on taking back the Senate majority and targeting my seat to make their pipe dream a reality, I’ll need all the help I can get from my grassroots team.
Will you split a donation of any amount today between my campaign and DASS PAC to help protect our Democratic majority and keep me fighting in the Senate for hardworking Montanans and their families? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-tester-split-june23?refcode=em_fr_b1_062623_Tester-surrogate_30AC&amount=10]
Chip in $5 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-tester-split-june23?refcode=em_fr_b1_062623_Tester-surrogate_30AC&amount=5]

Chip in another amount >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-tester-split-june23?refcode=em_fr_b1_062623_Tester-surrogate_30AC&amount=5]
Thanks for chipping in. I’m grateful you’re in this fight with me.
- Jon

name: Kim Nguyen
subject: Our FEC deadline is approaching. Here’s what this means:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress
body:
| | **Our Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline is fast approaching – and all eyes are on us. Our fundraising report could make or break this grassroots campaign. So I’m asking:**

[Will you please rush a donation of $10 – or whatever you can afford – before this quarter comes to a close on June 30th? We MUST report strong numbers to the FEC.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65443600/413454243/766646889?contactdata=s+7Eqe3mm5iiZzQo/gVFHr43dwu89Mpge3vCAtCPhM8iFERzzSZ6UoeUdIeFZeQLOyxsAbjk56RxB7ySk2fwN4PlTnJojmtdydJRrJ5pyj4=&amount=10&refcode=KBN_EM_FR_WL_230626_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGQzY2Y4NDAtNGIxNC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=slkAf4dH0Kj78min7oRaqgGp_W9eunXffxSRcsP-AGg=)

When we file our FEC report, all of our fundraising totals become publicly available.

That means pundits, journalists, and yes, Republicans (we’re looking at you, Michelle Steel) will be looking at our numbers to gauge the strength of our movement. _Even our allies will be using this report to gauge whether our grassroots campaign will go the distance and flip CA-45 blue._

There’s so much at stake right now to fall short. Far-right Republicans in Congress are rapidly undoing all the progress we’ve made for working families. They’ve worked to rip away reproductive freedom from millions of women, held our economy hostage, and even tried to roll back benefits for veterans. And Michelle Steel has voted in lock-step with them.

We have no choice but to pick up the pace this week. Our fundraising has slowed down significantly this month, which is why **we’ve set an ambitious goal of raising $17,500 before the June 30th deadline.**

[Can you help? Please pitch in to help us beat Michelle Steel and deliver real leadership to Congress:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65443605/413454248/766646889?contactdata=s+7Eqe3mm5iiZzQo/gVFHr43dwu89Mpge3vCAtCPhM8iFERzzSZ6UoeUdIeFZeQLOyxsAbjk56RxB7ySk2fwN4PlTnJojmtdydJRrJ5pyj4=&amount=10&refcode=KBN_EM_FR_WL_230626_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGQzY2Y4NDAtNGIxNC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=slkAf4dH0Kj78min7oRaqgGp_W9eunXffxSRcsP-AGg=) _If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately._ | | **[DONATE $5 NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65443608/413454254/766646889?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=KBN_EM_FR_WL_230626_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGQzY2Y4NDAtNGIxNC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=slkAf4dH0Kj78min7oRaqgGp_W9eunXffxSRcsP-AGg=)**

So I’m asking: = When we file our FEC report, all of our fundraising totals become publicly available. That means pundits, journalists, and yes, Republicans (we’re looking at you, Michelle Steel) will be looking at our numbers to gauge the strength of our movement. Even our allies will be using this report to gauge whether our grassroots campaign will go the distance and flip CA-45 blue. There’s so much at stake right now to fall short. Far-right Republicans in Congress are rapidly undoing all the progress we’ve made for working families. They’ve worked to rip away reproductive freedom from millions of women, held our economy hostage, and even tried to roll back benefits for veterans. And Michelle Steel has voted in lock-step with them. We have no choice but to pick up the pace this week. name: Gov. Tim Walz via Blue Amp Action
subject: Minnesotans gained a one-seat Democratic trifecta in last year’s election. So, while Republicans in other states were banning books, bullying the LGBTQ+ community, and making child labor easier, we got to work protecting the freedoms, safety, and rights of all Minnesotans. We’ve made great progress. Stand with us to protect and build on it.
body:
Seize this moment
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T35e2aae0-f386-43b8-9c68-6eb422050884/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, When Minnesotans swept in a one-seat Democratic governing trifecta last November by a margin of 321 votes, we came together and agreed on two things: First, our mission was to make Minnesota the best place in the country to live, work, and raise a family. And second, that we would use every ounce of our power to make that vision a reality. **In other words, we realized we had a one-in-a-generation opportunity to make transformational change, and we weren’t going to let it go to waste.** So, while Republicans in other states were banning books, bullying the LGBTQ+ community, and making child labor easier, we got to work protecting the freedoms, safety, and rights of all Minnesotans. We became the first state in the country to codify abortion rights into state law since Roe v. Wade was overturned, banned the harmful practice of conversion “therapy,” made Minnesota a refuge for gender-affirming care, and enacted common sense gun reforms. We put Minnesota on the path to 100% clean energy, passed a budget to give educators the resources they need to teach our children, funded essential projects to rebuild our roads and critical infrastructure, passed universal school meals for Minnesota students, and so much more. The forces of hatred and bigotry are on the march across the country and around the world. But in Minnesota, we came together to make a clear statement: That march stops at our borders. I’m telling you this not to brag (that would be very un-Minnesotan). I’m telling you this because I believe with all my heart that if we come together and rise above the politics of fear and division, every state can be a place where no community is left behind and nobody gets told they don’t belong. [If you are ready to embark on this journey with me as we look to defend and expand on our progress over the coming year and beyond, I’m asking you to join our movement by splitting a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action today.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1ead2069-6fa0-4bd4-81dc-744d9da359ce/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te6b0a9fe-9e16-4329-acb5-99cfdfc25a55/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| I’ve always believed that the point of getting elected isn’t to bank political capital. It’s to burn political capital to improve lives. I’m damn proud of what we’re doing in our state, and not just because we’re showing the people of Minnesota that Democrats are capable of delivering on the promises we make. We’re showing people across this country just how much promise is contained in a progressive vision shared by so many. We’re drawing a roadmap for 49 other states by doing whatever it takes to be a state that works for everyone. And we’re proving that not only can you campaign on compassion and foresight and decency, you can actually govern that way, too. **[Peter](https://default.salsalabs.org/T17add065-0b2a-4c1b-b72e-98f8b348cf93/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[ , if you’re with me, split a donation that works for you between my campaign and Blue Amp Action today to help us build this movement.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3f09057b-6600-49a1-9848-cdf2d88fbdd1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** I’m grateful, Gov. Tim Walz
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T641a2ff8-4a86-43cf-97a9-ec951b667247/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

clean_body: Seize this moment | | | | | | | | | | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can . | | | | | | | | Peter, When Minnesotans swept in a one-seat Democratic governing trifecta last November by a margin of 321 votes, we came together and agreed on two things: First, our mission was to make Minnesota the best place in the country to live, work, and raise a family. And second, that we would use every ounce of our power to make that vision a reality. In other words, we realized we had a one-in-a-generation opportunity to make transformational change, and we weren’t going to let it go to waste. So, while Republicans in other states were banning books, bullying the LGBTQ+ community, and making child labor easier, we got to work protecting the freedoms, safety, and rights of all Minnesotans. We became the first state in the country to codify abortion rights into state law since Roe v. Wade was overturned, banned the harmful practice of conversion “therapy,” made Minnesota a refuge for gender-affirming care, and enacted common sense gun reforms. We put Minnesota on the path to 100% clean energy, passed a budget to give educators the resources they need to teach our children, funded essential projects to rebuild our roads and critical infrastructure, passed universal school meals for Minnesota students, and so much more. The forces of hatred and bigotry are on the march across the country and around the world. But in Minnesota, we came together to make a clear statement: That march stops at our borders. I’m telling you this not to brag (that would be very un-Minnesotan). I’m telling you this because I believe with all my heart that if we come together and rise above the politics of fear and division, every state can be a place where no community is left behind and nobody gets told they don’t belong. | | | | | | | | I’ve always believed that the point of getting elected isn’t to bank political capital. It’s to burn political capital to improve lives. I’m damn proud of what we’re doing in our state, and not just because we’re showing the people of Minnesota that Democrats are capable of delivering on the promises we make. We’re showing people across this country just how much promise is contained in a progressive vision shared by so many. We’re drawing a roadmap for 49 other states by doing whatever it takes to be a state that works for everyone. And we’re proving that not only can you campaign on compassion and foresight and decency, you can actually govern that way, too. I’m grateful, Gov. Tim Walz | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | or

body:
The key to a brighter future depends on Republicans winning Wisconsin.
| [](https://links.wisconsinrepublicanparty.com/u/click?_t=d8e9586dc433414d81114a9282924d1e&_m=5b9e4e8d4208466b83d1ce0ab6ecebd1&_e=fRgHElQPGcLdlvQ8QgyepwkCHILNWQ2YjawO3L8AzokgidTvxL1ogCPHCd8P0lsYQBdTxOXnSzaBMaroB2H2owC7LtKd3D2EsEPHpqlYzhF1qD8plMoNHmVkeG8fgCK6A-n1Ib-zyP0C8MRUzAxYQwctVQ-SV-i7ZsOgTUBRCH-wHJGWW1Rb2vLIAxomUuEySzc4Qasfbd_v0vNR5iDKOguCPD7DOWwhstmPKmVif2cv9kwvfa0raGCJtFzB8ZrHy99F_2ARPtzk0tKRiJnJvsGGeMFM2SRdN72JDy_gKeaSBW5tm24j9arpthtL5zkmSXMIYwrHhlzZesTaZRf7aNCiLfGXUKm_DflnmYbDA18%3D)

Friend,
---
The road to taking back our country starts right here when we host the FIRST Presidential debate in Milwaukee in just under two months.
---
_As Republicans prepare to share their winning message with voters, Democrats are gearing up to launch a barrage of lying attacks to dismantle Republican campaigns._
---
**They know the path to victory runs through Wisconsin and will cross any line to ensure Joe Biden and their radical candidates win these critical elections.**
---
_That’s why we have to be ready to FIGHT BACK against anything they may throw at us._
---
