name: Sen. Sherrod Brown
subject: Friend, I'll be honest with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Hi friend – before I ask you to chip in to help me win in Ohio and keep the Senate blue, I need to take a moment to explain why I'm in this fight and what your grassroots contribution would mean today. I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio, in a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. I spent summers working on my family's farm. Today, I live in Cleveland with my wife, Connie, and our two rescue dogs, Franklin and Walter. **I’ll be honest with you, friend: **The Ohio I live in now looks a lot different from the one I grew up in. Over the years, we've seen manufacturing jobs shipped overseas because of bad trade deals, prices skyrocketing as wages failed to keep up, and hopes for a comfortable retirement dashed. That's why I've devoted my life to fighting for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do.
**Every day in the Senate, I’m fighting for you. But I’m facing my toughest race yet, and I need your help to win.[Will you chip in $5 or more right now – split between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand's – so I can keep up the fight in Ohio and defend the Senate for Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65445131/413459371/-431201696?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4245-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODgwODAwZS00ZTE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3SqDsVX6Lhp2gMGz9nNor-sOT4ZIlxLtNQTtUQ41zXE=)** Right now, Mitch McConnell and the GOP need to flip only two seats to retake Senate control – and experts at Politico say it could all come down to Ohio. Last year’s Senate race here was one of the most costly in the nation, and NBC News reports this one could be “even nastier and more expensive.” That's why I simply cannot win this race – and Democrats simply cannot hold on to our narrow Senate majority – without grassroots support from folks like you. As one of the most vulnerable senators in the country, I'm personally asking: **[Will you please split $5 or more between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand's to help us hit our midnight fundraising goal, power our reelection campaigns to victory, and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65445132/413459372/-431201696?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4245-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODgwODAwZS00ZTE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3SqDsVX6Lhp2gMGz9nNor-sOT4ZIlxLtNQTtUQ41zXE=)**
This is gonna be a heck of a fight, but with you by my side, I know we can beat the odds and continue making much-needed progress for workers and families. Thanks for being on our team.

With gratitude,

Sherrod

|

subject: My stolen guitar has been FOUND!!!
body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=3e3ea286b1df4200ab2537ea220fce1d&_e=IOETl2miSD7CjtqTB-7FBGRQowMcn0F8RR_W85KHgBD9DGcDomCL1pXrwMVHEOfNDNLN5Sc_NmtMIcilcA7FLaWrBj_VxDsTWARuFtm5Ncf8Zd6xtgyVC3-3QcC2cDV_QtFzMX3WgEaGBSaBF7hOmJAbFPzH5Txsw9Mme_0GjGicEs8gdwxt8r7UsnS6wMA1GN231BqHKRIcac2QNZS5p_41Hm8zUaKwkUtpq3ao4ARNx6PojqiE-hBC0sdyB7ES7k7OJyy2LM0NQdP9dn2JHBvjE_t-eF3vp_nrzIErrnGizm6_Ly0o3p9OnTMhO3hAYnQ5EyMOfhkhW0TCyag18w%3D%3D)
---
Dear Friend,
---
A few days ago, my car window was busted out and my prized guitar was stolen in Spokane, Washington. We mobilized the prayer network and put the word out to be on the lookout! We truly believed that the guitar would be returned, and a powerful testimony would come out of the whole situation!

Well by His grace, I am OVERJOYED to report our first prayer has been answered— the guitar has been RECOVERED! An eagle-eyed Believer spotted it at a pawnshop and bought it back!! Now we wait for the second part of the story to unfold! I know God's not done working on the life of the person who stole the guitar. Stay tuned!
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=3e3ea286b1df4200ab2537ea220fce1d&_e=IOETl2miSD7CjtqTB-7FBGRQowMcn0F8RR_W85KHgBD9DGcDomCL1pXrwMVHEOfNDNLN5Sc_NmtMIcilcA7FLaWrBj_VxDsTWARuFtm5Ncf8Zd6xtgyVC3-3QcC2cDV_QtFzMX3WgEaGBSaBF7hOmJAbFPzH5Txsw9Mme_0GjGi6lHsRx1iJ3PMSfgs1BZEvHX4GG5_hYy18jctHKkun_crd4OcQKMhPqQ22XcbFRkuP_tX-0fOM3Fi6Lswjvdkzej9AhGv71sNgcrCUUPAkAiuTbbs5Tdb_9O9RL-n8Yv_EiRC8bJFc3aLvLCr0LOSmw2uogZGQW1T7Mc33tlimSA%3D%3D)
---

---
Till all hear,
---
---
Sean
---

body:
It's been a few months since Don Lemon was fired after going toe-to-toe with me, but he can't let it go...
[Unsubscribe](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=8847ce5fee984b4a9bfb26e29b98a545&_t=1E184L9Kcg6huzBnrw5FYf6aexmM48LQsV8PvvkySXiRfVhq5ynjnYwOoN0p1Nu1T90hLfEaXHURp5MTzq-qqKc4ftPruVlPmZzysHUvLPg%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=8847ce5fee984b4a9bfb26e29b98a545&_t=1E184L9Kcg6huzBnrw5FYf6aexmM48LQsV8PvvkySXiRfVhq5ynjnYwOoN0p1Nu1T90hLfEaXHURp5MTzq-qqKc4ftPruVlPmZzysHUvLPg%3D)

|
Fellow American,

A few months ago, Don Lemon tried to shut me up on air when I educated him on the 2nd amendment.

Just in case you missed it, this is what he said to me during a heated debate:

| **"When you have black skin and you live in this country, then you can disagree with me."**
---

**I dismantled his argument with facts _and that exchange catalyzed his firing from CNN._**

Now he's aggrieved and called me a **"liar, bigot, and insurrectionist."**

Moral of the story: now that the R-word ("Racist") has entirely lost its meaning, they'll just call you an insurrectionist instead.

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=8847ce5fee984b4a9bfb26e29b98a545&_e=D9iyhmfJCMIJxNLGgH9bX5KEt7oN8T1QdqMDl2-RALzaFtVVeWpjOykh1-mj9Fj7kDQczkXydjVNp3yjA7hkOE-e8ZYYoafCQuzxDcgcKgSDweRPgm9rSQDIK93oHg5_5PKQpmyaqqNJiF2alaz4Ccz2JhdDuejAB2LFOWMvLR_HMuK0aCGFhuxbxbDBcpQt6iFffjmDT_foxEO0WTau0_pxNe70-8gxDkkdpawc4fITWpcRf0wbaxUroSFmNjfElJFMqqDgVMPpV1IA0q4qf3j1DN9-1hARvYaL9G7AhTf-fcC6mbpbtss4z_BqU_7BT3dBb_rl2YuEPbRXW1mlIY97AhfdXPPV-WiJgWsx4Y4Na44r9U_oAzkmdRTITL0HKhDFACfvh0e9c1q68IlPWw%3D%3D)
Don Lemon simply cannot let it go.

He goes further and says "platforming"people like me is "a dereliction of journalistic duty."

In order to continue my campaign and fight for the values and principles that set this country into motion, **[I need your support. I can't do it alone. I need your help to continue spreading my message of freedom and progress.](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=8847ce5fee984b4a9bfb26e29b98a545&_e=D9iyhmfJCMIJxNLGgH9bX5KEt7oN8T1QdqMDl2-RALzaFtVVeWpjOykh1-mj9Fj7kDQczkXydjVNp3yjA7hkOE-e8ZYYoafCQuzxDcgcKgSDweRPgm9rSQDIK93oHg5_5PKQpmyaqqNJiF2alaz4Ccz2JhdDuejAB2LFOWMvLR_HMuK0aCGFhuxbxbDBcpQt6iFffjmDT_foxEO0WTau0_pxNe70-8gxDkkdpawc4fITWpcRf0wbaxUroSFmNjfEN-GGL-wTG5Oo2VDdmSpHb0gYkNkX7ehAz7vBt3h6qOMS7hcZbPXTd1FmNIXd9mARtl-4VhVZQqUQHvtN5bj-a1PRzcOTh5JyUaMM_UJJrsaNHauoQwi_W4uER-5snEgYVhLAY8eV9rey7lAft-8SLw%3D%3D)**

Fellow American, I am not afraid to bring the debate to anyone who is willing to talk about the important issues, but I won't back down.

I believe that we need to have honest, open discussions about the issues that matter most to Americans. _That's why I am running for office._

**[I hope you'll stand with me as I continue to call out Don Lemon and the mainstream media for their unfounded bias against conservatives.](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=8847ce5fee984b4a9bfb26e29b98a545&_e=D9iyhmfJCMIJxNLGgH9bX5KEt7oN8T1QdqMDl2-RALzaFtVVeWpjOykh1-mj9Fj7kDQczkXydjVNp3yjA7hkOE-e8ZYYoafCQuzxDcgcKgSDweRPgm9rSQDIK93oHg5_5PKQpmyaqqNJiF2alaz4Ccz2JhdDuejAB2LFOWMvLR_HMuK0aCGFhuxbxbDBcpQt6iFffjmDT_foxEO0WTau0_pxNe70-8gxDkkdpawc4fITWpcRf0wbaxUroSFmNjfEjiGBlqY4-BKZI8l4gPAGXy9Ad6LErqUmeL1LIhHQdTPfPVV-D5dWtXbHF7NBodY_Y9vpohk4UmDNnh3xSvEMzx4px9AlNPkbpVeJB-mqFUeeBhP9aPNEf1Fqw0TPrU0yRAkJXEuQugkmX4koNFuFQA%3D%3D)**

Thanks,

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=8847ce5fee984b4a9bfb26e29b98a545&_e=D9iyhmfJCMIJxNLGgH9bX5KEt7oN8T1QdqMDl2-RALzaFtVVeWpjOykh1-mj9Fj7kDQczkXydjVNp3yjA7hkOE-e8ZYYoafCQuzxDcgcKgSDweRPgm9rSQDIK93oHg5_5PKQpmyaqqNJiF2alaz4Ccz2JhdDuejAB2LFOWMvLR_HMuK0aCGFhuxbxbDBcpQt6iFffjmDT_foxEO0WTau0_pxNe70-8gxDkkdpawc4fITWpcRf0wbaxUroSFmNjfEqcC7wz5QeVhHn85a_5czUwQDQ7kNed1fyYemjcsT6UvI8UHm-jekUlmnuunBljKxOCgBlmc613lFHbGhxAEYXD3fb7d_CqIqlgAm24_qM-eRkP8BvDTUMNp4QG4lSM3f0ztlYQEjd1OieKvkWHZKng%3D%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** STAND UP TO THE MAINSTREAM MEDIA ->**](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=8847ce5fee984b4a9bfb26e29b98a545&_e=D9iyhmfJCMIJxNLGgH9bX5KEt7oN8T1QdqMDl2-RALzaFtVVeWpjOykh1-mj9Fj7kDQczkXydjVNp3yjA7hkOE-e8ZYYoafCQuzxDcgcKgSDweRPgm9rSQDIK93oHg5_5PKQpmyaqqNJiF2alaz4Ccz2JhdDuejAB2LFOWMvLR_HMuK0aCGFhuxbxbDBcpQt6iFffjmDT_foxEO0WTau0_pxNe70-8gxDkkdpawc4fITWpcRf0wbaxUroSFmNjfEit67HMpvxSMtuuimvauTWnSLepjynQJLSZgFXDsHTuFidGU04umtkff7Xm9ZhCiUCBGY4YZRPbhabZYJFRdeloWVOKcCj1Q2_eQxOz-FReTr4AP78Y-ja_YJY-RmhiixqhQR8cAvzbkvIzGq6jcCnA%3D%3D)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

body:
Thank you for making this birthday a huge success | | | | [ ](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=e5b0275750&e=292fde286a)
---
| Dear Peter,

I want to take a moment to thank everyone who supported my birthday party this year. It's always great to celebrate among friends and family in our beloved San Mateo County.
---
| [ ](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=2a7621f14f&e=292fde286a)
---
| If we missed you, I hope we'll see you at a future event!

You probably have heard that we have a critical fundraising deadline approaching this Friday, June 30th. We need to raise a lot more ahead of this deadline. Running a re-election campaign is still very expensive unfortunately, and I'm eager to get to work connecting with voters in the district again.
---
| [DONATE TO HELP KEVIN REACH HIS JUNE GOAL](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=fdf6df6bdf&e=292fde286a "DONATE TO HELP KEVIN REACH HIS JUNE GOAL")
---
| In the California State Assembly, I wrote and passed landmark legislation pioneering all vote-by-mail elections and combating dark money in state campaigns. I have always been a fierce fighter for our Democracy, and I ran for Congress to keep working on these issues at the federal level, where our Democracy is under attack daily.

[Can you help fund my reelection campaign today so that I can keep championing these issues in Congress?](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=a5e59eb72f&e=292fde286a) We need to keep strong, experienced Democracy defenders in office in the coming years as extremists will continue to try to chip away at our Democracy. [Every dollar helps in this effort, I hope I can count you in.](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=5ede5be916&e=292fde286a)

Sincerely,
Congressman Kevin Mullin

I’ll just be blunt: [**If you’re in a place where you can make a contribution to support my re-election campaign today, it will be a huge help.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65468872/413500807/63430846?refcode=EMZ14Y_EOQ_E_20230626_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzA4NzZiZS03MDE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=12ecgbHVLVcCWZjK3s8KfRQg21SlfavO1C1znJU75ck=) Let me explain: Earlier this year, I officially announced that I’m running for re-election to the Senate. Now we’re up against a big test this week: Our first official fundraising deadline after running our campaign for a full quarter. After Friday’s deadline, we’ll tally up all the donations we’ve received this quarter, and we’ll prepare our quarterly report for the Federal Election Commission (the FEC you’ve probably seen mentioned in more than a few emails). Then they’ll make our report public. The total amount raised matters, yes, but here’s the number I’ll really have my eye on: The total number of contributions. Because that’s the number that shows the breadth of our grassroots campaign. That’s the number that shows just how many people believe that we need to pass a wealth tax, Supreme Court Justices should follow a basic code of ethics, quality child care should not eat up an entire paycheck, and that the filibuster must be abolished so we can pass the laws that the majority of Americans are calling for — like protecting abortion rights and enacting gun safety laws. [**So if making a financial contribution would make sense right now, could you pitch in $20 or any amount today? Your contribution will help hit our goal so we can keep campaigning for these plans, and will demonstrate the strength of our movement to those who are trying to stop us.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65468873/413500809/-1064566392?amount=20&refcode=EMZ14Y_EOQ_E_20230626_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzA4NzZiZS03MDE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=12ecgbHVLVcCWZjK3s8KfRQg21SlfavO1C1znJU75ck=) | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

>
Now, when this report comes out, GOP strategists will dig into the numbers — so will powerful special interests and their swarms of lobbyists — to evaluate the strength of our campaign.
Why? Because I am fighting with everything I’ve got to defeat their extremism and put power into the hands of working people. And if Republicans have more support and gain more power, they’d have more ability to pass their far-right agenda and block progress on the plans this movement is fighting for.
They’ll want to use our fundraising results to see what they’re up against and gauge if our plans are popular. Let’s give them something to worry about.
**Every contribution helps show that our grassroots team for big, structural change is stronger than their push for extremist, harmful regression. And we’re building our grassroots campaign brick by brick, donation by donation.**
[**In order to hit our goals, win this campaign, and make our plans happen, we’re relying on a strong response to this email today. clean_body: If Republicans have more support and gain more power, they’d have more ability to pass their far-right agenda and block progress on the plans this movement is fighting for. | | | I’ll just be blunt: = Let me explain: Earlier this year, I officially announced that I’m running for re-election to the Senate. Now we’re up against a big test this week: Our first official fundraising deadline after running our campaign for a full quarter. After Friday’s deadline, we’ll tally up all the donations we’ve received this quarter, and we’ll prepare our quarterly report for the Federal Election Commission (the FEC you’ve probably seen mentioned in more than a few emails). Then they’ll make our report public. The total amount raised matters, yes, but here’s the number I’ll really have my eye on: The total number of contributions. Because that’s the number that shows the breadth of our grassroots campaign. That’s the number that shows just how many people believe that we need to pass a wealth tax, Supreme Court Justices should follow a basic code of ethics, quality child care should not eat up an entire paycheck, and that the filibuster must be abolished so we can pass the laws that the majority of Americans are calling for — like protecting abortion rights and enacting gun safety laws. = | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Now, when this report comes out, GOP strategists will dig into the numbers — so will powerful special interests and their swarms of lobbyists — to evaluate the strength of our campaign. Why? Because I am fighting with everything I’ve got to defeat their extremism and put power into the hands of working people. And if Republicans have more support and gain more power, they’d have more ability to pass their far-right agenda and block progress on the plans this movement is fighting for. They’ll want to use our fundraising results to see what they’re up against and gauge if our plans are popular. Let’s give them something to worry about. Every contribution helps show that our grassroots team for big, structural change is stronger than their push for extremist, harmful regression. And we’re building our grassroots campaign brick by brick, donation by donation. = Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth P.S. I want you to know that I never expect you to donate to every email, and I’m always grateful to work alongside you no matter how much, how often, or whether you’re able to contribute. Thank you. = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for Senate All content © 2023 Warren for Senate, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, five years
ago today, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez won her primary election against
entrenched incumbent Joe Crowley:

AOC took on the machine and won. We recruited her to run for Congress
after her brother nominated her to run through Justice Democrats’
recruitment efforts.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135307?refcode=em20230626-29607&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=29607%2E1203867%2ExTrEJm ]Will you help us recruit the next leader like AOC who will take on the
political establishment by chipping in $3 right now?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135307?refcode=em20230626-29607&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=29607%2E1203867%2ExTrEJm ]Contribute $3

We helped AOC manage her team, run her organizing program, and make
everything we could of our small budget. Then, she won. We toppled one of
the most powerful corporate Democrats and elected the youngest woman ever
to serve in Congress in his place.

This is what the power of grassroots organizing and campaigns can do. And
this is the power of what small-dollar contributions can accomplish.

I am personally so proud of the work Justice Democrats has accomplished
since forming after Bernie Sanders’ 2016 campaign. And I’m so thankful for
your support.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135307?refcode=em20230626-29607&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=29607%2E1203867%2ExTrEJm ]Will you make a $3 donation now to elect better
Democrats to Congress?

We’re in a fight for the soul of the Democratic Party and every single
contribution helps to power our work.

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=29607%2E1203867%2ExTrEJm ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=29607%2E1203867%2ExTrEJm ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Non-qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $2,900 for the primary election and $2,900 for the general election. Contributions from federal government contractors and corporations are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in an election cycle.

name: Bob Casey
subject: Our big deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
I’m counting on you today.
| Derek,

After I announced that I was running for re-election, national Republicans targeted me with negative ads to make it clear that flipping this seat is a top priority in their plan to retake Senate control in 2024.

Well, I’m not done fighting for Pennsylvania’s hard-working families and I won’t back down to anyone — including Republicans in the Senate working to chip away at critical programs like Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid.

The stakes of this race are high, so we can’t afford to fall short. That’s why I’m reaching out now before our end-of-quarter deadline.

[**Will you be one of the supporters to pitch in now and help us reach our critical end-of-quarter goal? Split a donation between Chris Deluzio and my campaign today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65446024/413462472/1375545625?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.26_b2_bc_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGY0MjU4Yy01MTE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xVcdgv1TVX0DsZV2MFYikUEV_skQa5LwOGOzZunp1Aw=)

No one knows better than I do that winning here in PA will be tough. That’s why we need to put this re-election campaign on the strongest footing possible.

Our deadline is nearly here. So, can you help us out, Derek?

[**Will you split a donation of $10 or any amount you can before our big end-of-quarter deadline? I’m counting your support right now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65446026/413462474/1375545625?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.26_b2_bc_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGY0MjU4Yy01MTE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xVcdgv1TVX0DsZV2MFYikUEV_skQa5LwOGOzZunp1Aw=) | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65446028/413462476/1375545625?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.26_b2_bc_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGY0MjU4Yy01MTE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xVcdgv1TVX0DsZV2MFYikUEV_skQa5LwOGOzZunp1Aw=)**

Our team is capable of great things if we work together. It’s going to take all of us to defend this seat and our Senate majority.

With gratitude,

Bob Casey

subject: IMPORTANT: California
body:
Hey Peter, we’ll get straight to the point:

Our second end-of-quarter FEC deadline is coming up and we are $20,000 short of our fundraising goal. So before you read any further, if you can quickly donate, we will leave a link here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JHCA-09-Email-June2023-FR-EOQ?&refcode=E3141-20230626-EOQ2-SL-DeadlineEOQ&amount=25] .

We can’t stress enough how important California is to Democrats taking back the House majority. And Josh’s race will be one of the most competitive races in the country.

With seven competitive congressional seats up for grabs in California, we have the opportunity to take back the House from Kevin McCarthy and MAGA extremists by winning back enough seats in California alone!

But none of this can happen if we lose Josh’s seat. That’s why Republicans are already spending five figures on negative attack ads against Josh - they know his seat is absolutely critical to flipping the House in 2024.

That's why we need your help to get us across the finish line this quarter, Peter. Every single fundraising deadline is important because we already know Kevin McCarthy and Republican extremists will be looking to see how much we’ve raised. And without taking a dime of corporate PAC money, Josh needs your help to show our grassroots strength in this next second quarter report.

So, please chip in the biggest amount you can right now. Your support will push us one step closer to protecting Josh’s seat and winning back the House in 2024. Here is a link:

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JHCA-09-Email-June2023-FR-EOQ?&refcode=E3141-20230626-EOQ2-SL-DeadlineEOQ&amount=25

Thank you, Peter.
— Team Harder

You are receiving this email because Congressman Josh Harder is one of our last lines of defense to protect our democracy against MAGA extremists like Donald Trump, Kevin McCarthy and Marjorie Taylor Greene.Your early investment and support is critical so we can build the grassroots movement we need to win in 2024. Our race will be competitive and Josh doesn't take a dime of corporate PAC money, so please chip in now to our campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JHCA-09-Email-June2023-FR-EOQ?&refcode=E3141-20230626-EOQ2-Footer-DeadlineEOQ&amount=25]

If you would like to receive fewer emails, we understand. Click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/PWvmQS5k6EyT2Cx65_SF8w2] to sign up for only the most important updates, or you can unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/7te8sxLvVUSDWs_e-jVleA2?unsubscribedata=5HHkhcLDF306sYv2uhO0BXMqS8pzNTiTUMMWauk7oRTc5MMzAPRHKdL3jLOMw3s%2Bxxes4c3xubwIv%2BpPxSQE5r7nZVn7n9aAMLlvTXAWS2yDKQDmpVVWsiLWw5yhR8za0PeXr8%2FLO9NWHMTzQY%2By62xLVaZOk9MXPb3OXVGbhQ%2BultDz4Gt53QQEss3USsBoqd5vwHgnY%2BZ%2BkY5qXS%2Bt2%2FsjzTiVm554e4CiE82Fr8mPgDZM2ZzP8hi9CmOlvl5B1rnHu6k4f2g3ZZMnwTK9J25o8LdERr46rhsmFNvdzzw7c2suSKeYyh4DnN3xeaTswUZUiR%2FLGimGz%2FKHx9C7in0%2BgoxTnUaTBMgzh5xZRtrkGiQ6yOklKaCM3gOnuHzxrrNuc4TK9lh%2Bsj3dnjqe6s%2Ff6TNg%2Bl6m6DHKhOx8eF%2F7xyJU4fJxuEVwIMAWqksn .

Josh Harder for Congress
10 N California St
Stockton, CA 95202
United States

name: Wiley [personal]
subject: early morning thoughts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
Peter –
I woke up this morning with one major thought on my mind: Bo Hines can’t flip this seat.
If we lose this race in 2024 to an extremist like Hines, we’re putting the future of the issues we care about most at risk. We’ll roll back the progress Democrats have been able to make, and we’ll be putting our most vulnerable at risk.
Hines would support partisan gerrymandering and restricting voting rights, taking away the voices of Black and Brown people.
Hines would support a total abortion ban, putting the decisions that should be made by women into the hands of elected officials.
Hines would work to end programs that help low-income families afford health care.
We simply have too much to lose.
That’s why I’m reaching out to ask if you will make a donation towards my end-of-quarter fundraising deadline so we can end Q2 in a strong position. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306-q2-wn-eoq?refcode=230626-email]
The more we raise this quarter, and every quarter leading up to November 2024, the better chance we have of defeating Bo Hines and holding on to this seat.
We can get it done, but only with your support.
Make a donation of any size right now, and help us keep up the fight. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306-q2-wn-eoq?refcode=230626-email]
Thanks,
Wiley

name: Redistricting Alert (via the NDRC)
subject: ProPublica: New maps could flip “As many as five House seats in 2024”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|
---

This is huge, team: | **_ProPublica:_
“Voting Maps Throughout the Deep South May Be Redrawn After Surprise Supreme Court Ruling”
_“As many as five House seats could flip in 2024”_

[_Help the NDRC fight for fair maps: Rush a donation before the end-of-quarter deadline >>>_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65447978/413469394/866594094?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230626_FR_6FF_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE0NTNlOGJjLTU1MTQtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pdr_IoffoulW-rmcTL0v16AX5FIKmXOaUTeL_rE6H5M=)**
---
**FIRST:** Alabama Republicans asked the Supreme Court to open the door to unchecked racial vote dilution by dismantling Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act.

**THEN:** The Court _reaffirmed_ the VRA and affirmed a lower court decision holding that Alabama Republicans engaged in unlawful vote dilution.

**NOW:** Alabama will have to draw a new, fair map before the next election – and many other states could be required to do the same!
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65447979/413469395/866594094?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230626_FR_6FF_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE0NTNlOGJjLTU1MTQtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pdr_IoffoulW-rmcTL0v16AX5FIKmXOaUTeL_rE6H5M=)
---
Ahead of last November’s elections, our grassroots movement helped secure the fairest congressional maps in a generation. Now, we have the opportunity to advocate for maps that are _even fairer_ before 2024.
**We know Republicans will be fighting tooth and nail to keep their manipulated maps in place – and that means the NDRC’s work has never been more important. Will you make a donation of any amount before the end-of-quarter deadline to help us continue fighting for fairness?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | This is huge, team: | ProPublica: “Voting Maps Throughout the Deep South May Be Redrawn After Surprise Supreme Court Ruling” “As many as five House seats could flip in 2024” = FIRST: Alabama Republicans asked the Supreme Court to open the door to unchecked racial vote dilution by dismantling Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act. THEN: The Court reaffirmed the VRA and affirmed a lower court decision holding that Alabama Republicans engaged in unlawful vote dilution. NOW: Alabama will have to draw a new, fair map before the next election – and many other states could be required to do the same! = Ahead of last November’s elections, our grassroots movement helped secure the fairest congressional maps in a generation. Now, we have the opportunity to advocate for maps that are even fairer before 2024. We know Republicans will be fighting tooth and nail to keep their manipulated maps in place – and that means the NDRC’s work has never been more important. Will you make a donation of any amount before the end-of-quarter deadline to help us continue fighting for fairness? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

Earlier this month the Supreme Court ruled that Alabama’s congressional maps discriminate against Black voters — **_and now they’ve made the same ruling in Louisiana!!_**

We only need to pick up 5 seats to take back the House, and with new Black majority districts being drawn — that’s where we come in!

In 2020, we provided **_over 70,000 rides to voters_** during the Georgia runoffs and made massive investments in GOTV efforts all over the country.

In 2022, we **_contacted 3.1 MILLION Black voters_** to get them to the polls and **_invested over one million dollars into Black Democratic candidates_**.

**In 2024, we can mobilize Black voters in these new districts and****TAKE BACK THE HOUSE.**

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | 🚨BREAKING NEWS ALERT FOR PETER 🚨 Earlier this month the Supreme Court ruled that Alabama’s congressional maps discriminate against Black voters — and now they’ve made the same ruling in Louisiana!! We only need to pick up 5 seats to take back the House, and with new Black majority districts being drawn — that’s where we come in! In 2020, we provided over 70,000 rides to voters during the Georgia runoffs and made massive investments in GOTV efforts all over the country. In 2022, we contacted 3.1 MILLION Black voters to get them to the polls and invested over one million dollars into Black Democratic candidates. In 2024, we can mobilize Black voters in these new districts andTAKE BACK THE HOUSE. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Thank you, The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. | | Peter, in my time in politics, I've learned that deadlines _**MATTER**_.

They’re critical milestones in campaigns, and they show the country where we stand.

_So if we come up with weak numbers, it will look like we can’t get our job done._

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: I’m up, I’m dressed, and I’ve got my shoes on
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
It’s going to take this full grassroots team at Joe and Kamala’s backs to finish the job. | | |
---
As a kid, my dad would wake me up every morning at 6 a.m., no matter what time of year, no matter what day of the week. "**Get up.** Get dressed. Put your shoes on, son," he'd say, "Get ready. There's something for you to do." Well, Peter... I’m up, I’m dressed, and I’ve got my shoes on. I’m ready to reelect my friends Joe and Kamala -- and I need you with me. So I’m asking: [**Can I count on you to become a Founding Donor with a $25 donation today so Joe and Kamala’s campaign can make the early investments it’ll take to win?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZ8EpBhSoCSR6nWCi480zzD65xaidrOmC_r1wX84ffE_14LTKHRoXMxERYXvcEmR_3jjYQfe22Us9CghBFZuVd79GpXqcDkynkTjwbUI6p8-wTfVnmFLAn6dvawNli71qR9oIHSIKDiuA_i84oN24xV3FLPuLO9vvfaaRoE2i9Uitc9o_i0ux3WZf8XOYtqPLwI8AP9lDX-UaVJzGKKgPQkAwTbRp6EaiQuUPWe8zuEaGHRDiIXAmwGtq4p-BQuMc0L459gXl7tGnwO09XSlBMQDhaIDqte2trZKAl4v9uPSHXaSa0F1FDMH8tqhrt5w_phgIhA4SwNZN4oi5KXWwZiJKZXJiZP-a5DhvvyC2meu_1nngfnjvB8mlrFk_1h_EK5TEQYrtPzfjAkTLEstdPmEpRwRccM8lH7pGR0HvLuQW14waseDZB6YxO6c7u_PIHWi5_9y2S-is0D249QzuvNaw3E9SrPfeKNDF_yvBaKudw-uky0Y4A8YHtY-tHfyLn/3xd/LAOleiLbSQiD7gdBkN4JlA/h0/OWZvSMQ499mdeVoD8qJu-JyzrVON0dgz7ytSYqjSnz8)

From passing once-in-a-generation infrastructure legislation to bringing down costs for working people, Joe and Kamala are working each and every day to build a better future for all of us.
It’s why I was proud to join the Biden-Harris campaign’s National Advisory Board, and why I’m going to do everything in my power to reelect Joe and Kamala next November.

**This isn’t one of those arbitrary fundraising deadlines that some campaigns create to get you to chip in.** We are __required__ to publish our fundraising data, dating back all the way to April 1st.

And since OH-01 is one of the most competitive seats in the country, everyone will be looking at our report to see if we have what it takes to win again next November.

[**That’s why I’m coming to you. Bottom line - our working families deserve a Member of Congress fighting to raise wages, lower costs, and protect their fundamental freedoms. They can’t afford for the MAGA Republican agenda to succeed.

**Team, our Q2 end-of-quarter report is a unique opportunity to show the strength of our grassroots team. Thanks to you, I’m confident we’ll meet _and exceed_ our goal.**

This Friday at midnight, we’re facing the biggest deadline of our re-election campaign to date – our second end-of-quarter deadline – and I need your help before then. | = Hey there – I’ll cut to the chase. = This isn’t one of those arbitrary fundraising deadlines that some campaigns create to get you to chip in. We are required to publish our fundraising data, dating back all the way to April 1st. And since OH-01 is one of the most competitive seats in the country, everyone will be looking at our report to see if we have what it takes to win again next November. = | = Delivering another win for Southwest Ohio won’t be easy, especially not when far-right Washington Republicans are already running dishonest attack ads against me. And we know it’s just beginning. Bottom line - our working families deserve a Member of Congress fighting to raise wages, lower costs, and protect their fundamental freedoms. They can’t afford for the MAGA Republican agenda to succeed. Team, our Q2 end-of-quarter report is a unique opportunity to show the strength of our grassroots team. | Peter,

One of Abigail’s top priorities in Congress is to ban Members of Congress, their spouses, and their dependent children from trading stocks.

Members of Congress must always focus on the needs of their constituents, not their own financial portfolios. It’s not a radical idea, and the American people agree. Take a look:

_\- The Washington Post_

clean_body: Members of Congress must always focus on the needs of their constituents, not their own financial portfolios. | = | Peter, One of Abigail’s top priorities in Congress is to ban Members of Congress, their spouses, and their dependent children from trading stocks. Members of Congress must always focus on the needs of their constituents, not their own financial portfolios. It’s not a radical idea, and the American people agree. Take a look: | | = “While insider trading is already illegal, banning members of Congress — as well as their immediate family members or staff members — from trading stocks has found broad bipartisan support nationally with a ... poll finding70 percent of voters favoring a ban. ” \- The Washington Post | = Abigail’s bill has massive bipartisan support. We need your help to ensure she can usher it across the finish line in Congress. Our quarterly FEC deadline is in just four days. = | = Abigail believes that as representatives, Congress has a duty to their constituents above all else, and they have an obligation to demonstrate that they can be trusted. Her common-sense reform ought to become law, and recently it gained two key endorsements thanks to Abigail’s tireless advocacy. But we need your support so Abigail can continue serving our community. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Team Abigail * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. Hi, it's Kirsten.
While we're still over a year away from Election Day, I'm proud that our campaign has hit the ground running.
One of my favorite things to do on the trail is talk to AZ-06 voters. We're a grassroots operation, and nothing is more important than hearing firsthand from the people I'm running to represent.
Voters in Southern Arizona want leadership who will stand up for them and their needs. They want an economy that works for everyone, access to affordable, quality healthcare, protected reproductive choice, and stronger Social Security & Medicare.
They're fed up with our opponent, who is a rubber stamp for McCarthy and extremist MAGA Republicans in the House.
My campaign has a massive fundraising deadline this Friday. It's the first time our fundraising numbers will be public — and hitting our goal could not be more important. Will you rush a donation now so we can flip this seat and bring real representation for AZ-06 to Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_062623_EOQ_C]

Let's make a difference together.
Thanks again,
— Kirsten

name: Katie Porter
subject: 🏳️‍🌈 I’ll fight like hell to overturn the filibuster so we can protect LGBTQ+ Americans from discrimination
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=25508%2E3422442%2EE1__qL)
Every American should be free to live their truth and take pride in who they are. Yesterday, I celebrated Pride Month alongside San Francisco activists and community leaders in what was a joyful and inspiring day.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230626-1?refcode=EMAI26_1_PRI_20230626_V1_F&refcode2=25508_3422442_E1__qL&akid=25508%2E3422442%2EE1__qL)
I’ll always stand with the LGBTQ+ community, and that requires more than just attending Pride events. I was a proud YES vote on the Equality Act, to prevent discrimination based on sexual orientation and gender identity. This bill passed the House in 2021, but stalled in the Senate—thanks to the filibuster.
**In the Senate I’ll fight like hell to overturn the filibuster so we can pass protections for LGBTQ+ Americans into federal law. But nobody gets elected alone, and I need your support to get there.** This Friday is our end of quarter fundraising deadline and now is one of the most useful times you can make a contribution. [**Can you pitch in today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230626-1?refcode=EMAI26_1_PRI_20230626_V1_F&refcode2=25508_3422442_E1__qL&akid=25508%2E3422442%2EE1__qL)
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230626-1?refcode=EMAI26_1_PRI_20230626_V1_F&refcode2=25508_3422442_E1__qL&akid=25508%2E3422442%2EE1__qL)**
Thanks, team.
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAI26_1_PRI_20230626_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=25508_3422442_E1__qL&akid=25508%2E3422442%2EE1__qL)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=25508%2E3422442%2EE1__qL)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=25508%2E3422442%2EE1__qL)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

name: Team Swalwell
subject: Blurred lines
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
It’s time to stop the assault on the truth |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65449458/413473226/-662322978?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODZmOWIzMS01YTE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F5FESaButzuY17RFONouxioIjyaLdhB55fOjBOk-ECI=)
**The GOP is doing what they are best at — blurring the lines between reality and conspiracy theories for political gain.** Over the last few months, the MAGA circus has spent more effort on downplaying Trump’s legal woes and going back and forth on their chaotic agenda than passing legislation that would benefit their constituents. **_And they want us to take their leadership seriously?!_** **Ringleader McCarthy and his extremist followers are harmful and dangerous.** Their continued lies, corruption, and dabbling in misinformation can only lead to dismantling our democracy — **_and friend, that’s a risk we can’t afford to take._** | [DEMAND TRUTH + ACCOUNTABILITY »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65449460/413473227/-1733728394?&refcode=E3129-20230626-BlurredLines-SB-Corruption&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODZmOWIzMS01YTE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F5FESaButzuY17RFONouxioIjyaLdhB55fOjBOk-ECI=)
---

subject: The day it happened…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EMILY BUSCH FOR CONGRESS
body:
We all hear about school shootings, but I guess I never imagined my school would be next. We’ve been doing active shooter drills at school since X grade but I never really thought I’d put it to use. | | | [](http://links.emilyformichigan.com/u/click?_t=e92c5e294c1440b880a7ffdf88c24a48&_m=e80fca7c6806416ca9b723af597a7d5a&_e=DODshOTxLxB-scLssRQ8_NPT5tuzLayUMZJ0gYvtb-jVp72ixXm2PVssZmRVnsh_nnGu6RR3QP_JtYID9jY8G0xAA7sWPQL39FebgAgsk0nBw8v9LAsCPaIn1rK7tziRNy7vncXLgz5eTDbYUhvtbqamE4egBKpp8kzwOwcYjCMZzIQ9zIVIbCda31BVOtdCJAZZ0xCdAI8wuAGnTekRx49ImaasvCD8YRf20PmtmCHn8IVzCcrkaTSb7lozUTjIw8k_rFbf1cP5Pxmpz9XWP_lF0p-zRspTr7TrTveeYkDJR8B6pm6dk3U0sWhI-QNjYsXgloDHCFP7V4wCL_jGhHuMrXWvOigUQb8O6_TGeKYSQnZs9EXy7ZC29B8nVSKRfa7c3O98txFW1eVHdMqZqJQVw2-zuA8Fkgfci3Xv2u8%3D) We all hear about school shootings, but I guess I never imagined my school would be next. We’ve been doing active shooter drills at school since elementary school, but I never really thought I’d put it to use.But on November 30, 2021, it happened. I was in music class at Oxford High School when a 15-year-old schoolmate opened fire in the hallway. A warning came over the PA system, but no one really knew what was happening. But I was sitting next to a friend who got a text message right then, and I knew from the look on her face that it was an active shooter. My teacher hid us in an empty classroom, then rushed us out a back door and to the Meijer parking lot, where we were safe.**I was one of the lucky ones that day.** Ten students and a teacher were shot. Four of them were killed.In the chaos that followed,**my mom, Emily Busch, jumped into action.** She went to school board meetings, rallied teachers and parents, and advocated for historic common-sense gun safety legislation at the state level in the Michigan Legislature.In the worst, most confusing time possible, my mom stepped up and led. That's exactly what we need in Washington - and that’s why she’s running for Congress. **[Help make sure my mom gets there by making a donation of any size today!](http://links.emilyformichigan.com/u/click?_t=e92c5e294c1440b880a7ffdf88c24a48&_m=e80fca7c6806416ca9b723af597a7d5a&_e=DODshOTxLxB-scLssRQ8_NPT5tuzLayUMZJ0gYvtb-jVp72ixXm2PVssZmRVnsh_nnGu6RR3QP_JtYID9jY8G0xAA7sWPQL39FebgAgsk0nBw8v9LAsCPaIn1rK7tziRNy7vncXLgz5eTDbYUhvtbqamE4egBKpp8kzwOwcYjCMZzIQ9zIVIbCda31BVOtdCJAZZ0xCdAI8wuAGnTekRx49ImaasvCD8YRf20PmtmCHn8IVzCcrkaTSb7lozUTjIw8k_rFbf1cP5Pxmpz9XWP4wZPIIOyMnXM1Xid5j1HIqQfVckYsqrRBQZHXeKrCEzuVpqOKjzvyHzqgMtO5k54xEbUK95lOOhFTn3TZsL4zn-ybDXCAN3eb8vIs_82qsPnH5Gc6ai1RTlrm0w8XEJ7URi4A19XB0sNDbTmWTvFq4%3D)**_If Emily Busch,
clean_body: We all hear about school shootings, but I guess I never imagined my school would be next. We’ve been doing active shooter drills at school since X grade but I never really thought I’d put it to use. | | | We all hear about school shootings, but I guess I never imagined my school would be next. We’ve been doing active shooter drills at school since elementary school, but I never really thought I’d put it to use.But on November 30, 2021, it happened. I was in music class at Oxford High School when a 15-year-old schoolmate opened fire in the hallway. A warning came over the PA system, but no one really knew what was happening. But I was sitting next to a friend who got a text message right then, and I knew from the look on her face that it was an active shooter. My teacher hid us in an empty classroom, then rushed us out a back door and to the Meijer parking lot, where we were safe.I was one of the lucky ones that day. Ten students and a teacher were shot. Four of them were killed.In the chaos that followed,my mom, Emily Busch, jumped into action. She went to school board meetings, rallied teachers and parents, and advocated for historic common-sense gun safety legislation at the state level in the Michigan Legislature.In the worst, most confusing time possible, my mom stepped up and led. That's exactly what we need in Washington - and that’s why she’s running for Congress. you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ---|--- | | It never occurred to my mom to run for office before the shooting – but she cares so much about keeping kids safe and strengthening communities like ours that she won’t stop till we get meaningful reforms passed. Her opponent has done nothing to keep us safe, and he will never, ever stand up to the gun lobby. My mom has accomplished so much as an advocate, and I know she’ll do even more in Congress. But she can’t get there by herself. I appreciate it. – Andrew PAID FOR BY EMILY BUSCH FOR CONGRESS

name: Debby Burnett, Democrat for Congress
subject: No corporate PACs, no self-funding.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burnett for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306_q2_eoq?refcode2=img_logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306_q2_eoq?refcode2=img_logo]
Peter, this is important news about our people-powered campaign to flip this seat blue and replace extremist conservative Lauren Boebert. Because I think our government should work for people, not big corporations with ultra-wealthy CEOs, I’m announcing today that I’m refusing donations from corporate PACs.
Right now, we have less than four days until we have to wrap up our end-of-quarter fundraising report, and I’m counting on folks like you to show the growing strength of our grassroots movement. It may not seem like $10, $50, or $100 will matter, but when lots of people do what they can, we can achieve amazing things. Will you do what you can right now to fuel our people-powered movement and help meet our critical June 30 goal? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306_q2_eoq?refcode2=link_CTA]
DONATE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306_q2_eoq?refcode2=btn_CTA]
I know the decision to refuse corporate PAC donations puts me at a disadvantage, especially since I don’t have a personal fortune to use to prop up my campaign.
But leaders have to make tough choices when it comes to doing what is right, and making sure I’m not beholden to anyone but the people of Western and Southern Colorado is the right choice.
There’s a lot on the line in this election, from accessing safe abortions and protecting our vital natural resources to keeping our kids safe in schools and defending our democracy.
Campaigns like mine need lots of passionate people to step up and do their part. If we work together, we can win this and replace Boebert once and for all. But right now, we’ve got to meet our June 30 goal. Will you give $10, $50, $100, or the most generous amount you can now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306_q2_eoq?refcode2=link_CTA2]
For the people,
Debby
Dr. Debby Burnett is running to represent Colorado’s 3rd District in Congress. As a veterinarian of 20+ years, she’s worked with farmers and ranchers across our district to improve their lives and their livelihoods. As the mother of a 16-year-old, she knows how to get 20 things done at once. And as a rural Coloradan who owns a small agricultural business, she understands what the people of Western and Southern Colorado need — and that’s why she’s stepping up to give them a real voice in Congress.
DONATE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306_q2_eoq?refcode2=btn_biobox]
Paid for by Burnett for Colorado
Burnett for Colorado
PO Box 1761
Gunnison, CO 81230
United States

Peter,

The end of _this week_ marks our quarterly fundraising deadline with the FEC.

We're pacing a bit behind where we need to be and could use some help closing the gap. But first, we want to explain why Friday's deadline is much more important than usual.

**As you know, we’re legally required to report our fundraising numbers to FEC after the deadline hits. Shortly after, our numbers will go public and this will be the _first time_ our numbers are compared side-by-side against our new Republican opponent.**

Now that we officially have a race in IL-17, our fundraising performance will be an important signal of strength. The last thing we need is to show weakness as a new opponent enters the race. Unfortunately, we're coming up short of where we should be at this point and could use some help picking up the pace.

Hi friend, Earlier this month, Bill and House Democrats passed legislation to raise the debt ceiling and save America’s economy from total collapse. This could’ve been done weeks prior if not for Kevin McCarthy and his House Republican colleagues deciding to manufacture a crisis just to get a few headlines. But as this most recent budget crisis made clear, making headlines - not good policy - is all they are doing in the House. It was President Biden who put forward a budget to boost opportunity for working Americans, increase access to health care and improve tax fairness. President Biden’s plan would have reduced the deficit by about $3 trillion by requiring the wealthiest households and profitable corporations to pay a fairer amount of taxes. Thanks to the Inflation Reduction Act, we finally enacted historic investments for the IRS to more fairly enforce our tax code. Time and time again, Democrats save our nation from crises manufactured by GOP chaos. The leadership of the House Republican Party and the radical elements controlling their plans represents a continuing and growing threat to democracy and our economy. [**That’s why Bill is working everyday to take back the House, and get America back on track. clean_body: and helped make Kevin McCarthy look foolish along the way | | = Hi friend, Earlier this month, Bill and House Democrats passed legislation to raise the debt ceiling and save America’s economy from total collapse. This could’ve been done weeks prior if not for Kevin McCarthy and his House Republican colleagues deciding to manufacture a crisis just to get a few headlines. But as this most recent budget crisis made clear, making headlines - not good policy - is all they are doing in the House. It was President Biden who put forward a budget to boost opportunity for working Americans, increase access to health care and improve tax fairness. President Biden’s plan would have reduced the deficit by about $3 trillion by requiring the wealthiest households and profitable corporations to pay a fairer amount of taxes. Thanks to the Inflation Reduction Act, we finally enacted historic investments for the IRS to more fairly enforce our tax code. Time and time again, Democrats save our nation from crises manufactured by GOP chaos. The leadership of the House Republican Party and the radical elements controlling their plans represents a continuing and growing threat to democracy and our economy. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: = = = = Thank you for your support, friend, we’re going to win this together. \- Team Pascrell | The toughest member of Congress is progressive New Jersey fighter Bill Pascrell. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=74462b9a06274bb9b3dfff8ed696ddf8&_e=M1A3uSrEgCdwOr4r2YBxLW6DVEfG81irHn4GWoKbctXEjngFar4t48TjM2pysiMVgk7o8GaLr5Qgblpv4YyEImh5Y94hSown8IAN3ypqD4Xu_sa7M-t24riO4sJOgsfVrrDoVPYDjcB4H42Hbwi0eR1oWXrHw2iM0FuyVon1f3btsMwMovcqEuxt65jhaRLnItUmdukpKLON1P4IbrSv9xebjjdcz7VZ0OMjmMWXFotfrb44eQhaiWdxKGJbTPLdq2w7dOPcuhJGfVO5UgQU-KQR28dRyPMi80YBWEbxcBuTF7yMmLVYwvU20mdYBWOlG_OTSZhJdxYuFfCn2-9Y8KDkxkWC1iHBAKmuPwGLCWAPpHDyTdCIgqPU2zFWaUpYknOmmx6kKeDZuwgJg158b47l6NLq5Xb6KP-gXd0CqTM%3D)

| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=74462b9a06274bb9b3dfff8ed696ddf8&_e=M1A3uSrEgCdwOr4r2YBxLW6DVEfG81irHn4GWoKbctXEjngFar4t48TjM2pysiMVgk7o8GaLr5Qgblpv4YyEImh5Y94hSown8IAN3ypqD4Xu_sa7M-t24riO4sJOgsfVrrDoVPYDjcB4H42Hbwi0eR1oWXrHw2iM0FuyVon1f3btsMwMovcqEuxt65jhaRLnItUmdukpKLON1P4IbrSv9xebjjdcz7VZ0OMjmMWXFotfrb44eQhaiWdxKGJbTPLdq2w7dOPcuhJGfVO5UgQU-K7PQKqrgea03X5v_oKdHwl5PzBc1TvGUyLz41r-vrorF6p4R9EglePvbMkBrpjsgCCTqeX9T0espwXbBj399lVYrdgDlHSKGHdyNusXqy7TBn-UQL9PSBZSfGA8k1gFl12RXEqu1TR3VVapYbifGJ4%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=74462b9a06274bb9b3dfff8ed696ddf8&_e=M1A3uSrEgCdwOr4r2YBxLW6DVEfG81irHn4GWoKbctXEjngFar4t48TjM2pysiMVgk7o8GaLr5Qgblpv4YyEImh5Y94hSown8IAN3ypqD4Xu_sa7M-t24riO4sJOgsfVrrDoVPYDjcB4H42Hbwi0eR1oWXrHw2iM0FuyVon1f3btsMwMovcqEuxt65jhaRLnItUmdukpKLON1P4IbrSv9xebjjdcz7VZ0OMjmMWXFotfrb44eQhaiWdxKGJbTPLdq2w7dOPcuhJGfVO5UgQU-Mui1WEyEXzsrseS0n6rNbLOmjiWk_ajCl3WkDkdyesNyc5MkDE50ptnBqdigzaLMog35bDKWcDSTQhd-21x5dKKBAB6BWtWZWs1aNuSYxn-h9dAAU4T_PsQ8NB2Apt2XD3K7ir6OjjBflloyTlFMZs%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=74462b9a06274bb9b3dfff8ed696ddf8&_e=M1A3uSrEgCdwOr4r2YBxLW6DVEfG81irHn4GWoKbctXEjngFar4t48TjM2pysiMVgk7o8GaLr5Qgblpv4YyEImh5Y94hSown8IAN3ypqD4Xu_sa7M-t24riO4sJOgsfVrrDoVPYDjcB4H42Hbwi0eR1oWXrHw2iM0FuyVon1f3btsMwMovcqEuxt65jhaRLnItUmdukpKLON1P4IbrSv9xebjjdcz7VZ0OMjmMWXFotfrb44eQhaiWdxKGJbTPLdq2w7dOPcuhJGfVO5UgQU-H1WQPCkNr_2pbtJTn8f8FqDtfRXIeOSFTpW00gDnPGynivsE-corz5aKcpyI6PnEODnUnltUC4cvVpeJkDywPWJMN1vKr7hzIvEbWC1w1yxREcjgqo3xoYwOaQcXbv1PzGyfqeP3zrQs4XUk0ptFak%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

Peter,
It’s hard to believe that the 2022 election, _an election that you helped me win with just 51.1% of the vote_ , was just 6 short months ago.

In those 6 months, I’ve been hard at work to make life better for all Oregonians.

But since I refuse to play partisan games in Washington, I’ve been under relentless attack.

I don’t mind these attacks, because, at the end of the day, I don’t work for other politicians or political operatives – **I work for you, the American People.
**
_So as long as I have your support, I know I’ll be okay.
_
That’s why I’m inviting you to join my team as a _**2023 Sustaining Member.**_
_With you on my side, I’ll be able to fight back against the attacks and ensure I’m reelected in 2024 to continue my work for the people of Oregon. _

Standing up for you, standing up for Oregon, and standing up for what’s right is in my blood.

It’s what I was raised on and it’s something I’ve worked hard every day to teach my daughters.

_That’s why when I see all the fighting and all the drama happening all around me in Congress, I just can’t understand it.
_
It seems so simple to me – let’s just use some common sense and do what’s right!

_Like fully funding Medicare and Social Security...

Like prioritizing American Citizens by securing our borders...

Like fighting for parental rights in Oregon Schools..._

If you agree with me, and you’re ready to fight on the side of commonsense solutions, I hope you’ll accept my invitation to become a 2023 Sustaining Member.

clean_body: | | | | You’re invited, | Peter, It’s hard to believe that the 2022 election, an election that you helped me win with just 51.1% of the vote , was just 6 short months ago. In those 6 months, I’ve been hard at work to make life better for all Oregonians. But since I refuse to play partisan games in Washington, I’ve been under relentless attack. I don’t mind these attacks, because, at the end of the day, I don’t work for other politicians or political operatives – I work for you, the American People. So as long as I have your support, I know I’ll be okay. That’s why I’m inviting you to join my team as a 2023 Sustaining Member. With you on my side, I’ll be able to fight back against the attacks and ensure I’m reelected in 2024 to continue my work for the people of Oregon. | | | | | Standing up for you, standing up for Oregon, and standing up for what’s right is in my blood. It’s what I was raised on and it’s something I’ve worked hard every day to teach my daughters. That’s why when I see all the fighting and all the drama happening all around me in Congress, I just can’t understand it. It seems so simple to me – let’s just use some common sense and do what’s right! Like fully funding Medicare and Social Security... Like prioritizing American Citizens by securing our borders... Like fighting for parental rights in Oregon Schools... If you agree with me, and you’re ready to fight on the side of commonsense solutions, I hope you’ll accept my invitation to become a 2023 Sustaining Member. It would mean a lot to me, and go a long way in helping us prepare for 2024. Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086

name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: Why I first ran
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
This is a long one, but I hope you’ll read it [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65450168/413476081/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGNkNzEwNC01YzE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7RG5wGwcM1XAJRNt3k3T1ikudZ70-9TQdcTaxMN9Az0=&emci=9c8399bf-1112-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=30cd7104-5c14-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter, In a moment, I'm going to ask you to **[contribute to my campaign before our end-of-quarter deadline](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65450169/413476082/-1267552183?refcode=em23_230626_eoq2_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230626_eoq2_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=30cd7104-5c14-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGNkNzEwNC01YzE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7RG5wGwcM1XAJRNt3k3T1ikudZ70-9TQdcTaxMN9Az0=)** , but first, I want to let you know why I chose to run for Congress. When I was sixteen years old, I was diagnosed with type 1 diabetes. I always had a love for science (here I am winning an academic decathlon when I was in high school!), and my experience managing my diabetes and all the time I spent in doctors’ offices helped lead me to a career as a pediatrician. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65450170/413476083/-1267552183?refcode=em23_230626_eoq2_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230626_eoq2_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=30cd7104-5c14-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGNkNzEwNC01YzE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7RG5wGwcM1XAJRNt3k3T1ikudZ70-9TQdcTaxMN9Az0=) For sixteen years, I served thousands of families in Issaquah as a pediatrician. I loved my patients and my work. Running for office was never in my "life plan." [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65450171/413476084/-1267552183?refcode=em23_230626_eoq2_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230626_eoq2_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=30cd7104-5c14-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGNkNzEwNC01YzE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7RG5wGwcM1XAJRNt3k3T1ikudZ70-9TQdcTaxMN9Az0=) Throughout my career, I saw firsthand how important access to quality, affordable health care was for my patients. That's why when my own representative voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act, that was the final straw for me.

So, I packed up my office and left the job I love to run for Congress. I had a sense that I could do more good for more children and families in Washington's 8th District from a seat in the House of Representatives than I ever could in the four walls of my exam room. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65450172/413476085/-1267552183?refcode=em23_230626_eoq2_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230626_eoq2_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=30cd7104-5c14-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGNkNzEwNC01YzE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7RG5wGwcM1XAJRNt3k3T1ikudZ70-9TQdcTaxMN9Az0=) Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, we flipped **Washington's 8th District blue for the first time ever in 2018 and kept it blue in 2020 and 2022 after hard-fought races.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65450173/413476086/-1267552183?refcode=em23_230626_eoq2_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230626_eoq2_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=30cd7104-5c14-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGNkNzEwNC01YzE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7RG5wGwcM1XAJRNt3k3T1ikudZ70-9TQdcTaxMN9Az0=) Since coming to Congress in 2019, I have been focused on fighting for the issues that matter most to you, me, and all the families I served as a pediatrician. But we’re in for another tough race.

National Republicans already named me a top target for 2024, and I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to help me keep WA-08 blue.

clean_body: This is a long one, but I hope you’ll read it Peter, In a moment, I'm going to ask you to = , but first, I want to let you know why I chose to run for Congress. When I was sixteen years old, I was diagnosed with type 1 diabetes. I always had a love for science (here I am winning an academic decathlon when I was in high school!), and my experience managing my diabetes and all the time I spent in doctors’ offices helped lead me to a career as a pediatrician. = For sixteen years, I served thousands of families in Issaquah as a pediatrician. I loved my patients and my work. Running for office was never in my "life plan." = Throughout my career, I saw firsthand how important access to quality, affordable health care was for my patients. That's why when my own representative voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act, that was the final straw for me. So, I packed up my office and left the job I love to run for Congress. I had a sense that I could do more good for more children and families in Washington's 8th District from a seat in the House of Representatives than I ever could in the four walls of my exam room. = Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, we flipped Washington's 8th District blue for the first time ever in 2018 and kept it blue in 2020 and 2022 after hard-fought races. = Since coming to Congress in 2019, I have been focused on fighting for the issues that matter most to you, me, and all the families I served as a pediatrician. But we’re in for another tough race. National Republicans already named me a top target for 2024, and I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to help me keep WA-08 blue. = Thank you, Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat in 2024. | = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

**Here’s the truth: Americans _demand_ the right to abortion.** When abortion was directly on the ballot in 2022, voters resoundingly voted to protect and save access to care. Voters across the country – from California to Vermont – supported abortion rights with abortion-related ballot measures: In California, voters said YES to enshrine abortion rights and access to contraception in the state constitution. In Kentucky, voters said NO to a constitutional amendment that would have eliminated abortion rights. In Michigan, voters said YES to amend the state constitution to guarantee abortion rights and access to contraception. In Vermont, voters said YES to codify abortion rights in their state constitution. **And we say YES to fighting like hell every single day until _every_ person has access to safe, legal abortions regardless of their income and zip code. ** _But we cannot do it without your voice and your support, so we’re asking:_ ****[Will you make a donation to Fight Like Hell PAC today to ensure that more abortion access champions are elected across the country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65450251/413476239/-802841213?refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230626_PM1_T1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2NjZDcxMDQtNWMxNC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_U39sBgFK91bc6vU3-sAxvqQTVeSQmjxtgbAdRcfseU=)**** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65450252/413476242/-802841213?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230626_PM1_T1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2NjZDcxMDQtNWMxNC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_U39sBgFK91bc6vU3-sAxvqQTVeSQmjxtgbAdRcfseU=)**

body:
| Hey Peter, it’s Heather from Team UniteDemocrats.

I just looked at our donation numbers for May, and it looks like you started a contribution but didn’t finish the donation process.

Peter, I can’t stress enough how important your donation is:
* Donald Trump, the biggest and most vile threat to our democracy, is running for President **_again_**
* Experts are calling the path to defending our Democratic Senate Majority in 2024 **_“perilous”_**

name: Pramila Jayapal HQ
subject: Add your name: Support the LIFT BAR Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
If we want to be a country that leads with compassion, love, and unity — we need to start by removing harmful barriers to benefits for immigrants.
#
Peter,
If we want to be a country that leads with compassion, love, and unity — **we need to start by removing harmful barriers to benefits for immigrants.**
Pramila's Lifting Immigrant Families Through Benefits Access Restoration Act (LIFT the BAR Act) will finally eliminate the arbitrary and cruel five-year waiting period for access to critical resources like Medicaid, the Children's Health Insurance Program (CHIP), and much more.
[**If you stand with Pramila and believe we must treat immigrants with the respect they deserve, please add your name in support of the LIFT the BAR Act today.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/lift-the-bar-act-petition/?source=em20230626-2644&t=1&akid=2644%2E420207%2EuaeKhu)
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/lift-the-bar-act-petition/?source=em20230626-2644&t=2&akid=2644%2E420207%2EuaeKhu)**
As an immigrant who came to this country alone at 16, Pramila knows the importance of passing this bill to finally eliminate xenophobic, and unreasonable barriers to health care, food assistance, and other life changing benefits. Immigrants and families should not have to wait to access basic, life-saving services.
In 1996, Congress passed restrictive legislation that created an arbitrary five-year waiting period for immigrants with lawful status to access crucial benefits and services. During this time, immigrants are significantly more likely to be uninsured, placing them at higher risk for adverse health and financial consequences.
To put this into numbers, in 2024, non-elderly immigrants will account for an estimated 8 percent of the population. **Yet they will have made up nearly 31 percent of the non-elderly uninsured population.**
**Every year, this arbitrary barrier denies millions of families, especially families of color, the basics that every family should have.** All of us, regardless of our immigration status should have this access. [**If you stand with Pramila and our movement, please add your name to support the LIFT the BAR Act and work to finally end this 25 year reign of injustice towards immigrants.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/lift-the-bar-act-petition/?source=em20230626-2644&t=3&akid=2644%2E420207%2EuaeKhu)
Together,
Pramila Jayapal HQ

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230626-2644-footer&t=4&refcode2=2644_420207_uaeKhu&akid=2644%2E420207%2EuaeKhu)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=5&akid=2644%2E420207%2EuaeKhu)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=2644%2E420207%2EuaeKhu)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress
