name: Jacky Rosen via Alex-Padilla.com
subject: I'm one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
_Hi there, we wanted to share this request from Sen. Jacky Rosen of Nevada. She’s one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country, and making sure she wins is**critical** to maintaining our Democratic majority in the Senate. Thanks - Team Padilla_
* * *

**Friend – I'm one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection, and right now, I need your help.**
**FIRST:** Experts at _FiveThirtyEight_ said that Nevada could once again decide Senate control.
**THEN:** Mitch McConnell and the GOP started coming after me as a top target for defeat.
NOW: **A recent poll shows me 2 points down** , just as I'm falling short of my critical end-of-quarter goal. The only way I can get back on track is with your immediate grassroots support.
Nevada's last Senate race came down to less than 1 point, and this race is shaping up to be just as close. With Senate control at stake here, the GOP is set to spend whatever it takes to flip our battleground red.
**That's why I'm reaching out today. I'm no stranger to tough fights, but I simply cannot win this one alone.[Please, will you give $3 or more now – split between my campaign and Alex Padilla's – so we can stop the GOP from gaining more ground, reach our end-of-quarter goal, and keep the Senate blue? **](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-rosen.o5-2qW&refcode=em230626-1-30&t=1&akid=1374%2E159979%2E-obRZe)

name: Full Mag News

name: Andy Beshear
subject: Why I'm asking for your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
We're less than one week away from our first quarterly fundraising goal since we learned I'll be facing Daniel Cameron in November. | Derek,

In just a few days, the first financial quarter of the general election comes to a close. [** In a moment, I'm going to ask you to split a donation between my campaign and Tony Evers' team before the quarter ends so that we can protect the progress we're making for Kentucky.**](https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2087?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20230626_FR_EOQ_0_3MO_AndyBeshear_AndyBeshear_NA_BeshearSplit&t=5&akid=6294%2E1827488%2E3aKODB) But first, I want to catch you up on this race and share why your support is so critical.

In 2019, I won the race for Kentucky governor by just over 5,000 votes. Since then, we've restored voting rights to 180,000 Kentuckians, expanded health care access, legalized medical marijuana and sports gaming, created tens of thousands of jobs, and achieved the lowest unemployment rate in the history of the Commonwealth.

We're on the right path, but if we want to progress further, we must win in November. It won't be easy – I'm up against Mitch McConnell's protégé, and this race is being called the most competitive in the nation. In fact, a Republican firm released a poll claiming **my opponent and I are neck-and-neck.**

Outside groups have already begun pouring money into Kentucky to attack me, and we know more is on the way. The only way I can fight back and win this tough race is with the support of this grassroots team.

[** So, Derek: Will you split a donation between my campaign and Tony's team before the quarter ends? With your support, we can continue moving Kentucky forward.**](https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2087?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20230626_FR_EOQ_0_3MO_AndyBeshear_AndyBeshear_NA_BeshearSplit&t=6&akid=6294%2E1827488%2E3aKODB)

Thank you,

Andy

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: I've met with grassroots conservatives across America and never once experienced the kind of bigotry that I regularly see from the Left. | | The mainstream media thinks you are a racist, Fellow American. They think you are a xenophobe. They think any America First conservative is small-minded - but the Left should take a deeper look in the mirror. I've been all over the country since announcing my campaign for President of the United States. I've met with grassroots conservatives across America and never once experienced the kind of bigotry that I regularly see from the Left. It's shameful. That's why it's so important for me to secure a prominent spot on the debate stage this August. We need to prove to the mainstream media that their bias won't stop us from speaking the TRUTH. Peter, do you have a minute? It’s important.

At the end of this week, we’ll close the books on the second fiscal quarter of our re-election campaign – meaning we’ll have to report all of our internal fundraising data to the Federal Election Commission.

**And as you may remember, that means all of our fundraising numbers for the last three months will be made _publicly available_ for everyone – including our opponents – to scrutinize.**

[**I’ll explain more in a moment, but I really need your help. To ensure that we can finish the quarter off strong, my team set an ambitious goal of raising an additional $10,000 before June 30. I know $10,000 may seem like a lot to raise before Friday, but when everyone chips in, the money adds up in a big way. So is there any amount you can chip in before our numbers go public?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65454176/413482866/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.26_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDg1ZmU3Yi02MDE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=82_O3FBycK2mdCSCUjU6wx7iI68DXjlXvasB55Xycyc=)

_Allow me to explain..._

When our FEC report is made publicly available, all eyes will be on us.

Everyone from Democratic political strategists to the MAGA Republican establishment will be looking at our FEC report to see how we stack up against our potential opponents and determine whether we have what it takes to win again.

Falling short on our fundraising goals and posting a weak FEC report could mean we run the risk of people counting us out of this race. _Peter, it's never been more important to showcase the strength of our campaign._

**So over the next few days, we have to come together to prove that our grassroots team – composed of hard-working folks who chip in what they can, when they can because they know Ohio is worth fighting for – is more powerful than any amount of Republican dark-money.**

[**I can’t do this without you. Please, will you make a grassroots donation to help us reach our $10,000 goal before the quarter ends on June 30th? At the end of this week, we’ll close the books on the second fiscal quarter of our re-election campaign – meaning we’ll have to report all of our internal fundraising data to the Federal Election Commission. And as you may remember, that means all of our fundraising numbers for the last three months will be made publicly available for everyone – including our opponents – to scrutinize. = | = Allow me to explain... When our FEC report is made publicly available, all eyes will be on us. Everyone from Democratic political strategists to the MAGA Republican establishment will be looking at our FEC report to see how we stack up against our potential opponents and determine whether we have what it takes to win again. Falling short on our fundraising goals and posting a weak FEC report could mean we run the risk of people counting us out of this race. name: Lisa Blunt Rochester
subject: this is a big deal.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Tina and I are hustling to close our fundraising gaps. |
#
May I have just a second of your time, please? My name is Lisa Blunt Rochester, and I'm running for Senate in Delaware. In just a few days, campaigns like mine and Tina’s will be hustling to close fundraising gaps for our end-of-quarter deadlines. **This is a big deal for my Senate campaign – it’s the FIRST public number we’ll report since we launched a few short days ago.** I’d be the first Black person elected to the Senate from Delaware. Pundits understand that our race is historic and they’ll use our fundraising number as a bellwether of our viability. With experts predicting a tough cycle for Democrats, it’s _imperative_ that we show strength at every single deadline. This is especially true for a historic campaign like ours. **Here’s why I’m reaching out:[we pulled the numbers and to be blunt, we are a bit behind. We can close the gap, but I do need to ask you to split $10 today between my campaign and Tina’s before this hole gets worse. clean_body: Tina and I are hustling to close our fundraising gaps. | May I have just a second of your time, please? My name is Lisa Blunt Rochester, and I'm running for Senate in Delaware. In just a few days, campaigns like mine and Tina’s will be hustling to close fundraising gaps for our end-of-quarter deadlines. This is a big deal for my Senate campaign – it’s the FIRST public number we’ll report since we launched a few short days ago. I’d be the first Black person elected to the Senate from Delaware. Pundits understand that our race is historic and they’ll use our fundraising number as a bellwether of our viability. With experts predicting a tough cycle for Democrats, it’s imperative that we show strength at every single deadline. This is especially true for a historic campaign like ours. Here’s why I’m reaching out:= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Lisa Blunt Rochester and Tina Smith will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = I know your money is hard-earned, and I don’t make this ask lightly. I’m so grateful for anything you can give. All my best, Lisa = Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

body:
We need to know where you stand:
| | **_NEW:_ Republicans Threaten Future of Public Libraries with Extremist Book Bans** MAGA Republicans all over the country — _including presidential candidate Ron DeSantis_ — are doing everything in their power to BAN books they don’t like.

From erasing our country’s history of racism and slavery, to outlawing LGBTQ+ representation, the GOP is waging a culture war against our public libraries.

**_If we don’t demonstrate MASSIVE support for public libraries, we won’t stand a chance of defending them from MAGA madness!_** [**So we need to know:**

name: Will Rollins
subject: Are you free for a call? I’d like to say thanks.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Will Rollins for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65455080/413483525/1321783056?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTkxYzMzYi02MTE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2S-uvB6DXiHrN0E2Wa-HoyagByV_FkRCkhphybvmm3U=)
Peter,

This probably won't shock you, but my _least_ favorite part about running for Congress is fundraising. Regardless of how I feel about it, it's a critical piece of our winning strategy. If we're going to turn out Democrats and persuade swing voters, we’ll need to compete with Calvert's special interest and corporate PAC donors.

The good news is that nearly **3,500** people have contributed since our launch, and I couldn't be more thankful for your support. Whether you've given $5, $50, or even more -- every donation makes a huge difference for our people-powered, corporate PAC-free campaign.

**The end of this week marks our first public reporting deadline with the FEC, and to kick off our fundraising push, I want to call some of our online donors to say thank you.**

**[My team will randomly select a handful of people who contribute through this email for me to call. Can you chip in today? I'd love to give you a ring to say thanks!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65455081/413483526/533784509?refcode=em-6.26.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTkxYzMzYi02MTE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2S-uvB6DXiHrN0E2Wa-HoyagByV_FkRCkhphybvmm3U=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65455082/413483527/533784509?refcode=em-6.26.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTkxYzMzYi02MTE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2S-uvB6DXiHrN0E2Wa-HoyagByV_FkRCkhphybvmm3U=)
Here's something you may not know: the *vast majority* of our contributions come in online and through emails like this one. With your help, our campaign is gaining incredible momentum, and I really need your support this week to post a big number on our first FEC report.

**[Help us reach our goal by donating whatever you can today. After you chip in, keep your ringer on -- I might be the one calling from an unknown number to say thanks.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65455083/413483528/533784509?refcode=em-6.26.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTkxYzMzYi02MTE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2S-uvB6DXiHrN0E2Wa-HoyagByV_FkRCkhphybvmm3U=)**

All my best,

Will

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: Hey 👋
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS
body:
I know we haven’t met, but keep reading because it’s important for you.

| |
---
Peter, Congressman Gabe Vasquez here. I know we haven’t met, but keep reading because it’s important for you. 🤝 As a first-generation Mexican American, I grew up knowing countless hardworking families who even after working one or multiple jobs, struggled to make ends meet. In 2022, with rising costs and a lack of investment in rural communities, **that only worsened while our U.S. Representative wasn’t doing anything about it.** So I ran against her. And won. 🎯 I’m doing good, bipartisan work in Congress, but because there’s a (D) behind my name, the Republicans have named me a TOP TARGET. **I only flipped New Mexico’s 2nd District blue by 1,350 votes last year** , and pundits are already saying this will be one of the most competitive TOSS UP House races in the country. ⚠️ There’s a lot on the line. **My far-right extremist opponent from last time is running again.** She sponsored a total abortion ban, objected to certifying the 2020 presidential election, and called for deporting DACA Dreamers. [**_Peter, the End-of-Quarter fundraising deadline is coming up quickly on June 30 and we’re behind on our goal. With so much on the line, we can’t afford to come up short. Can you split a donation between United Rural Democrats and my campaign today to help protect this TOSS UP seat?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65457117/413484541/-377362710?refcode=230626_gv_split_l1&refcode2=d9b90ade-6214-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ms=230626_gv_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU3MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDliOTBhZGUtNjIxNC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GMnA00SUKPUaCbs3o3OpOc-WmBhH61DmgjrKW1jFEc8=) **[DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65457120/413484542/-377362710?refcode=230626_gv_split_b1&refcode2=d9b90ade-6214-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ms=230626_gv_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU3MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDliOTBhZGUtNjIxNC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GMnA00SUKPUaCbs3o3OpOc-WmBhH61DmgjrKW1jFEc8=)** Thanks for your attention. It takes all of us staying engaged to combat extremism and elect real leaders to Congress who stand up for working families. Sincerely, Gabe Vasquez

clean_body: I know we haven’t met, but keep reading because it’s important for you. | | Peter, Congressman Gabe Vasquez here. I know we haven’t met, but keep reading because it’s important for you. 🤝 As a first-generation Mexican American, I grew up knowing countless hardworking families who even after working one or multiple jobs, struggled to make ends meet. In 2022, with rising costs and a lack of investment in rural communities, that only worsened while our U.S. Representative wasn’t doing anything about it. So I ran against her. And won. 🎯 I’m doing good, bipartisan work in Congress, but because there’s a (D) behind my name, the Republicans have named me a TOP TARGET. I only flipped New Mexico’s 2nd District blue by 1,350 votes last year , and pundits are already saying this will be one of the most competitive TOSS UP House races in the country. ⚠️ There’s a lot on the line. My far-right extremist opponent from last time is running again. She sponsored a total abortion ban, objected to certifying the 2020 presidential election, and called for deporting DACA Dreamers. = = Thanks for your attention. It takes all of us staying engaged to combat extremism and elect real leaders to Congress who stand up for working families. Sincerely, Gabe Vasquez Congressman for New Mexico’s 2nd District | United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: SIGN NOW: Stop plastic from killing baby sea turtles
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1844476?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Time is running out to STOP plastic from completely destroying our planet! ** Baby sea turtles hurry their way through mounds of sand to the ocean shore to increase their chance of survival from predators. What they do not know is that the _most dangerous predator_ awaiting them is not birds or crabs... but _**PLASTIC!**_ These young vulnerable marine animals get their flippers**CAUGHT** in plastic debris and mistake floating plastic for food like jellyfish. Even if they manage to get the toxic plastic into their tiny stomachs, it can _**RUPTURE**_ their internal organs or cause severe damage to their digestive systems. **Just ONE single piece of plastic has a 20% chance of killing a sea turtle. ** Aquatic life like sea turtles are in a losing battle against plastics, Friend. Plastic pollution is taking over their home, their food system, and their ability to survive! If we do not stop the irreparable harm from plastic to our marine ecosystems, scientists predict there will be**more plastic than fish in the sea by 2050. [Will you join the fight to protect our planet today? Add your name now and DEMAND government intervention to END plastic pollution! >>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1844477?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1844478?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_**PLASTIC CAN TAKE 500 YEARS TO DISAPPEAR FROM THE PLANET.**_ Because it’s non-biodegradable, it just keeps breaking into smaller microplastics that are _**contaminating our water, food, and air supply.**_ Without even knowing it, the average human consumes a _credit card’s worth of plastic every week!_
But greedy Big Plastic corporations just keep increasing production. Their massive industrial-sized factories spew pollution into nearby communities -- largely communities of color. The people who live in those communities face an increased risk of**_cancer, respiratory diseases, and other illnesses. _**
We need environmentalists like you, Friend, to address the plastics crisis _TODAY!_ [**Help pressure the Biden administration to take bold action immediately! It takes less than 60 seconds to defend our oceans, marine life, and communities against corporate pollution and destruction. ACT NOW! >**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1844479?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1844478?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

clean_body: | | | | | == ---|---|--- | | URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Time is running out to STOP plastic from completely destroying our planet! Baby sea turtles hurry their way through mounds of sand to the ocean shore to increase their chance of survival from predators. What they do not know is that the most dangerous predator awaiting them is not birds or crabs... but PLASTIC! These young vulnerable marine animals get their flippersCAUGHT in plastic debris and mistake floating plastic for food like jellyfish. Even if they manage to get the toxic plastic into their tiny stomachs, it can RUPTURE their internal organs or cause severe damage to their digestive systems. Just ONE single piece of plastic has a 20% chance of killing a sea turtle. Aquatic life like sea turtles are in a losing battle against plastics, Friend. Plastic pollution is taking over their home, their food system, and their ability to survive! If we do not stop the irreparable harm from plastic to our marine ecosystems, scientists predict there will bemore plastic than fish in the sea by 2050. == | == PLASTIC CAN TAKE 500 YEARS TO DISAPPEAR FROM THE PLANET. Because it’s non-biodegradable, it just keeps breaking into smaller microplastics that are contaminating our water, food, and air supply. Without even knowing it, the average human consumes a credit card’s worth of plastic every week! But greedy Big Plastic corporations just keep increasing production. Their massive industrial-sized factories spew pollution into nearby communities -- largely communities of color. The people who live in those communities face an increased risk ofcancer, respiratory diseases, and other illnesses. We need environmentalists like you, Friend, to address the plastics crisis TODAY! == == Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 foe.org/about-us/contact/

[**June 26, 1963:** The "Ich bin ein Berliner" speech is a famous address by President John F. Kennedy in West Berlin when Berlin was divided. Kennedy emphasized the United States' commitment to the people of West Berlin and their struggle for freedom. It is remembered as one of the most iconic speeches of the Cold War era and a symbol of American support for the people of Berlin during a time of division and struggle.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=4de475b143184a45a681cc0f8ff861bd&_e=7_ZZWt4dhlSACjRtpDd6VkoO4GmurVsm7rYSwr0L5gTUXs-GDlVkuTYcNx6aj6FZtI1Ql0pQ4r3BJp0wL0K2vTgBYYt1NO4mwceplDpSlBR0j9xEbtrzUFqDYJ9zKU9A1viqEDSRGgLDTnRwIL7btJvaxWYS9oU8w4F0te2TeaFIg6k9JrZ12pNcFWgXBC9U_Oco2cmyeIdHV6WEol3YZ8KIzZ8NIEXyHdr8v_74lnWylDdWYmfMkllCfnDDFVSE) **Source -[wikipedia.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=4de475b143184a45a681cc0f8ff861bd&_e=7_ZZWt4dhlSACjRtpDd6VkoO4GmurVsm7rYSwr0L5gTUXs-GDlVkuTYcNx6aj6FZtI1Ql0pQ4r3BJp0wL0K2vedllNZzUjKK7H9DULT62NOjUlpKvrMoFJCwHfXyen4fzsgYjnGQxexRSSCCbiPhRyv7yUBUOxfhUI37YmnxV1ryVSK3rWrqfVnmSc-okmCOgPy683TwCIOFJMmkmj6MgNDYBv8N-IuY1KadMpmcRH3mUKX0kVRzSI2VwgBK9QBW)**

[**June 26, 1997:** Harry Potter and the Philosopher’s Stone was first published in the United Kingdom. J.K. Rowling’s book was published by Bloomsbury (UK) and was her debut novel. The book kicked off the world-famous Harry Potter series and is the third best selling book of all time.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=4de475b143184a45a681cc0f8ff861bd&_e=7_ZZWt4dhlSACjRtpDd6VkoO4GmurVsm7rYSwr0L5gR1uEZjW4tm1__gx4mbMRWuvuqjO_2VlylDSqJ9QTlrI39wBKOQK016aFxGEdNjtjQ42i4EcaDlsZQkm4l3XYxSVS-ggyB_8fnhXpEDoF10cnKIdVpypSTJFbHBoPlTuPqAbjlaK-mPjTkLwEv97lBoPZM7fSqxu5NI8WN-m8WYORtBWIWh1BARXFE10oQRVV5ViVpEYVFJo_k4-tGO5-msO1peAdjKT4j-gFJbTa3TbA%3D%3D) **Source -[wikipedia.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=4de475b143184a45a681cc0f8ff861bd&_e=7_ZZWt4dhlSACjRtpDd6VkoO4GmurVsm7rYSwr0L5gR1uEZjW4tm1__gx4mbMRWuvuqjO_2VlylDSqJ9QTlrI39wBKOQK016aFxGEdNjtjQ42i4EcaDlsZQkm4l3XYxSJQ7dpxsFUGs_fxybBPRsf-qrrBwSZcSEhicl584b7V5_mUz8DDnwxcPzFjk54dBXz9fV7_PdBOblLF3P7XOf__xX1gP0EY1IMfmj_qX7LnB86GFVAonnIv542uxoatX5rzrLkY_JsZzMkCqDgYfWww%3D%3D)**

name: Kirsten Gillibrand via Blue Amp Action
subject: Republicans have a “clear path” to retaking Senate control in 2024.
body:
Democrats are defending 23 seats next year
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T97d55936-8608-4bd6-92c4-e38ce24ccd4c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | It’s Cliff, here. I wanted to make sure you heard that pro-choice champion, Kirsten Gillibrand, is running for reelection. Her message is below: Peter, it’s been a year since the conservative majority on the Supreme Court ruled to officially overturn Roe v. Wade. In the year since then, we’ve watched state after state pass increasingly extreme abortion bans. Now, the future of our reproductive rights will be on the ballot again in 2024 – and the odds are stacked against us. Democrats are defending 23 Senate seats. Republicans only have to defend 10. That means they’ll have more resources to go on the offensive and target incumbents like me. And election experts at FiveThirtyEight are already saying that Mitch McConnell has a “clear path” to retaking Senate control in 2024. Protecting our pro-choice majority has never been more important – and to do that we have to win every single seat up for election. The only way to do that is with early, strong investments in Democrats. [So please, Peter, will you split a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action to help us hit our $25,000 fundraising goal? We’re not backing down in this fight, but we need you by our side.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6ada474d-b496-4dfb-bd85-5a8e21ee7555/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you, Kirsten
---

---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

Dear Friend,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You’ve seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I’m unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan’s quote on leadership: “Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**.”

I’ve been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That’s why I’m writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxskcGOnDAMhp_G3EDEyUA4cGhL6amtVu1ujytPYoZ0EkAhaMrbV6BtD1Wvnz_7t2wKi3fD3kL9HhBHZ1dABPkOELckX-j5-XPc80f3I_90ecHbUcQPgJj2hf-ab0MKDuT8Qesus61CEoPJuBWVrrWQSqhsbC9Ua5LSNtQI3ZBGpRpN2lh1vQihbeZaLFGWFVYoSom6YENCNGRKqyxXwoIqz6BiiMxpdNOdoyXn98LMIfPtmNKynov1gP3KZotc0MR2TocB2Ht35Zj2_LZRtID9Twq85vOdeeCcUiJzz8M1nwPIfkvhdZ23aBhk9x8RsDqUwNZtAWR3BJzEUFjI3SaQXbi-scTxcIZkJWBFYd6mBLLDy5-eeUp8osn43Gz68eXb09B_B6xeJ-8syO4feH5Mdh9_hR6_iqcstnZ5OO_dWtWgytt5KDOH3wEAAP__TlGbMQ)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxskcGOnDAMhp_G3EDEyYbhwKEtS6VKbdXD7hxXJjFMOgmgELSlT1-Btj1Ue_382b9lU1i8G_YGqo-AeHN2BUSQHwBxS_KZnp6-xj1_ba_554dnHI8ifgLEtC_8z3wbUnAg5w9atZltFJIYTMaN0JfqIqQSKrs1tUBhsDa1FUIMqraabUk9l8rovlIycw2WKEuNGkUp8VKwISFqMqVVlrWwoMozqBgic7q56c7RkvN7YeaQ-eaW0rKei3WA3cpmi1zQxHZOhwHYeddzTHs-bhQtYPeTAq_5fGceOKeUyNzz0OdzANltKbys8xYNg2zfEQH1oQS2bgsg2yPgJIbCQm6cQLahf2OJ4-EMyUpATWHepgSyxYe_PfOU-EST8fljt9a_v43XL1dA_TJ5Z0G2_8HzY7J9_BU6_C5-ZLGxy6vz3q26AlWO56HMHP4EAAD__6Bcm0I)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn’t my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren’t cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That’s where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxskcGOnDAMhp_G3EDEYQJz4NCW0krVqqrU3T2uTOIM6SSAQtCWt69A2x6qvX7-7N-yKSze2b2F-iMgjs6sgAjyAyBuST7R4-ND3PPX7jn_cnnC21HET4CY9oX_mW9DCg7k_EHrLjNthSSszrgVqqkbIStRZWNbVqq-kGjYGnshI_jaSLLSWhqUGa4icy2WKEuFCkUpsSlYkxBX0qWpDCthoCrPoMJG5jS66c7RkPN7oeeQ-XZMaVnPxXrAfmW9RS5oYjOnwwDsvRs4pj2_bRQNYP-LAq_5fGe2nFNKpO95GPI5gOy3FF7WeYuaQXbviIDqUAIbtwWQ3RFwEk1hIXebQHZheGOJ4-HYZCSgojBvUwLZ4eVvzzwlPtGkfb5W3bf4_HV8-AmoXibvDMjuP3h-THaff4cev4sfWWzN8uq8d6uqoSpv56H0HP4EAAD__7oVm_U)?**

Having known Wesley for years, I know he isn't your typical politician. He's the son of a police officer and county civil servant. **Public service is in his DNA** , and from a young age, his family taught him that he had a responsibility to make a difference when he could.

When faced with chaos in Ferguson, Wesley worked calmly to ease tensions between police and protestors, starkly contrasting Hawley's history of causing chaos and inflaming culture wars. When he noticed a lack of leadership in St. Louis County, he took the initiative to change it by running for office and defeating an incumbent, despite the odds stacked against him.

body:
| | |
---
This is outrageous, friend. I just read a _Politico_ article, and well, the headline says it all: _"Republicans are looking for Senate candidates who are filthy rich."_
**Yep, you read that right. Not candidates who are dedicated to doing the right thing for workers and families. Not even qualified. "Filthy rich."**
Here's why this matters: the past few election cycles have shown the sheer strength of grassroots movements like ours, and the GOP has failed to keep up. Now, national Republicans are running scared – actively recruiting right-wing billionaires who can fund their own campaigns and help take back the Senate for Mitch McConnell.
Well, friend, unlike those filthy rich opponents, I am 100% committed to fighting for every worker’s right to fair wages, affordable health care, and economic opportunity.
This is one of the many reasons that this will be the toughest reelection campaign of my life – and experts say I'm a top GOP target for defeat. Even worse, analysts at _NBC News_ say this race could be "even nastier and more expensive" than last year's $120 million battle.

**The filthy rich shouldn't be able to buy our elections and I need grassroots supporters like you, friend, to make sure that doesn't happen.**
**[That's why I'm asking for your help before my midnight fundraising deadline. clean_body: | | | This is outrageous, friend. I just read a Politico article, and well, the headline says it all: "Republicans are looking for Senate candidates who are filthy rich." Yep, you read that right. Not candidates who are dedicated to doing the right thing for workers and families. Not even qualified. "Filthy rich." Here's why this matters: the past few election cycles have shown the sheer strength of grassroots movements like ours, and the GOP has failed to keep up. Now, national Republicans are running scared – actively recruiting right-wing billionaires who can fund their own campaigns and help take back the Senate for Mitch McConnell. Well, friend, unlike those filthy rich opponents, I am 100% committed to fighting for every worker’s right to fair wages, affordable health care, and economic opportunity. This is one of the many reasons that this will be the toughest reelection campaign of my life – and experts say I'm a top GOP target for defeat. Even worse, analysts at NBC News say this race could be "even nastier and more expensive" than last year's $120 million battle. The filthy rich shouldn't be able to buy our elections and I need grassroots supporters like you, friend, to make sure that doesn't happen. = With gratitude, = | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Friends of Sherrod Brown 3867 West Market Street Ste. 289 Akron, OH 44333 United States | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN

| | Nice to meet you, Peter! I’m Gina, Angela’s Communications Director and I’ve been working alongside Angela for 10 years. My job is, in a nutshell, helping Angela share her story and her ideas with folks across Maryland. Most of the time, she makes my job pretty easy. However, this Senate race is a whole different beast. With our multi-millionaire opponent already up on TV, it’s all too easy for our core message to be drowned out before voters get a chance to hear it. The issue is this: From digital ads to TV ads to knocking on doors, communicating directly with people requires resources. If we reach **_our very first End-of-Quarter goal_** on Friday, we’ll have the resources to help Angela rise above the noise and build a meaningful connection with folks across Maryland at this crucial stage of the race. But that’s a big “if.” **Because if we fall short, Angela could lose her strong standing in this race to the candidate with the deepest pockets.** **So, I’m hoping you can help me out with this, Peter:** **[Can you show Angela that you’ve got her back by pitching in $25 (or more) towards our End-of-Quarter goal right now?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2931?t=9&amount=25&akid=188%2E52803%2EzJz35d)** | | | [Chip in $25](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2931?t=10&amount=25&akid=188%2E52803%2EzJz35d)

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Exposing the Great Reset
body:

name: Greg Casar
subject: This one is important
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREG CASAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
Clock is ticking.

Peter,

I know you get a lot of emails from lawmakers asking for help. So I wanted to take a second to explain why I’m reaching out personally today.

**_This Friday at midnight is the mid-year fundraising deadline._ **Our fundraising numbers are public—so my future opponents and pundits in the media will be checking our fundraising numbers for strength.

This is my first re-election campaign. And as a progressive running in Texas, it’s critical we show any future opponents the power of our people-driven movement. That’s where you come in. Our work isn’t powered by corporate PACs—it’s powered by supporters like you reading emails like this. We use our campaign dollars to spread the truth, get out the vote, and improve lives.

**Team Casar has set a goal of raising $7,000 by midnight on Friday when we hit the mid-year fundraising deadline.** If we hit our goal, my team is confident we’ll send the message to our opponents that Team Casar means business.

**[So I wanted to ask you personally: Can you chip in $5, $10, or anything you can afford to help us reach our mid-year fundraising goal? clean_body: | | | Peter, you've been selected to answer our Pride-themed poll ❤️🧡💛💚💙💜 Peter, Every June, millions of Americans celebrate Pride month — an opportunity to support LGBTQ+ Americans, commemorate the progress we've made in the fight for LGBTQ+ rights, and remember that there is still so much left to be done. This Pride month, we're doing something a little different, Peter. EMILYs List was founded on creating a truly representative government, and this community has helped elect LGBTQ+ groundbreakers and history-makers up and down the ballot. So today, we want to celebrate them. **So, Peter, will you take a moment to tell us: Who are your LGBTQ+ heroes? Join us in showing your pride for incredible LGBTQ+ pro-choice activists, leaders, and elected officials by letting us know. Take the survey here: ** Thank you, the EMILYs List team | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | | **Team, we’re days away from our biggest deadline of the cycle 2024 so far.**

At the end of the quarter, we have to submit our fundraising numbers to the FEC, where they are publicly posted. That means that anyone – **_including the NRCC_** – can see them. If we show any sign of weakness, the NRCC will charge into NJ-05 with one goal in mind: **beating me.**

That’s why I need to raise **$15,000 before this critical deadline.** New Jersey will be a battleground state in 2024, and if we don’t send a strong and clear message about the strength of our bipartisan movement, NJ-05 will rocket to the top of the NRCC’s target list.

Matt Dolan’s [ad launch](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=1f664a4da32246559b04a8958c96d476&_e=sV2ceBkWNWy4Bcqxe57mFSijJQdCzesG5pV2urAYhcrByIL47MyuidCc15JpNW6SM9CM-p6R1FIDqb3OyGWC9ivA2xfjX1wtmVe6Wkg9IYGj9SY_ao_yjRjZLgyY2kVbP1xR9b0c8xfKPNwp1tPRmYCjJEPXtv29G3z9_Qv4-jHrmlFkohNHCQfSO8b07Bd4Zes7ud9U1VGJS_bILjC-6ViRWDqV4M8_MLrjDs2F6Rg%3D) continues to receive statewide and national attention!
* Last week, Matt Dolan became the first candidate for U.S. Senate in Ohio to launch a statewide ad buy. Dolan is taking the fight right to Sherrod Brown, using the out of touch Senator’s own words against him in an ad that features Matt’s trip to the border with Ohio Law Enforcement
* Fox News: _“As he runs for re-election in a crucial 2024 Senate showdown that may determine if Republicans win back the chamber's majority, longtime Democratic Sen. Sherrod Brown is coming under a new attack over border security, the drug crisis, and crime. Former prosecutor and Republican state lawmaker Matt Dolan, who's one of the two major Republican candidates running to challenge Brown next year, is launching a major ad blitz in Ohio targeting the incumbent senator.”_
* The Washington Times: _“Republican Matt Dolan is looking to soften up Democratic Sen. Sherrod Brown’s support in Ohio by taking him to task on immigration. In the first statewide ad of his 2024 Senate campaign, Mr. Dolan says Mr. Brown’s consistent support for Mr. Biden’s agenda has ‘opened our borders, created the worst violent crime in decades and allowed fentanyl to pour into Ohio communities.’ The ad then turns to video footage of Mr. Brown saying the issue of immigration is not front and center in a lot of voters’ minds — ‘except people on the far right.’” _
* NBC News: _“Republican state Sen. Matt Dolan announced a new statewide ad campaign on Tuesday, releasing a minute-long ad targeting Brown on immigration, which will air on TV, radio and digital platforms, according to a press release from Dolan's campaign. The ad features footage of Brown's interview on Meet the Press in December, where he said, ‘I don’t hear a lot about immigration from voters except people on the far right that always want to gain political advantage by talking about it.’ The ad then cuts to Dolan standing along the southern border and he says, ‘I'm at our southern border today because Sherrod Brown is dead wrong. From violent crime to sex trafficking and deadly fentanyl, open borders are a direct threat to Ohio families.’”_

The Senate budget produced by Matt Dolan and the Senate Finance Committee earns strong conservative accolades.
* The balanced budget produced in the State Senate includes more than $3 billion in tax relief for Ohio taxpayers, families and businesses. It expands school choice, funds police, reduces spending and even provides much-needed investments in mental health services.
* The budgets has been praised by Americans for Tax Reform, Americans for Prosperity, the Buckeye Institute and conservative groups across Ohio.

clean_body: | | | June 26th, 2023 Bringing you the latest news, updates and what you need to know about the race for U.S. Senate in Ohio | Three Things to Know This Week: 1\. Matt Dolan’s ad launch continues to receive statewide and national attention! 2\. The budget produced by Matt Dolan and the Senate Finance Committee earns strong conservative accolades. 3\. Dolan door knocking is coming to your community! Get up to speed... | | | Matt Dolan’s continues to receive statewide and national attention! Last week, Matt Dolan became the first candidate for U.S. Senate in Ohio to launch a statewide ad buy. Dolan is taking the fight right to Sherrod Brown, using the out of touch Senator’s own words against him in an ad that features Matt’s trip to the border with Ohio Law Enforcement Fox News: “As he runs for re-election in a crucial 2024 Senate showdown that may determine if Republicans win back the chamber's majority, longtime Democratic Sen. Sherrod Brown is coming under a new attack over border security, the drug crisis, and crime. Former prosecutor and Republican state lawmaker Matt Dolan, who's one of the two major Republican candidates running to challenge Brown next year, is launching a major ad blitz in Ohio targeting the incumbent senator.” The Washington Times: “Republican Matt Dolan is looking to soften up Democratic Sen. Sherrod Brown’s support in Ohio by taking him to task on immigration. In the first statewide ad of his 2024 Senate campaign, Mr. Dolan says Mr. Brown’s consistent support for Mr. Biden’s agenda has ‘opened our borders, created the worst violent crime in decades and allowed fentanyl to pour into Ohio communities.’ The ad then turns to video footage of Mr. Brown saying the issue of immigration is not front and center in a lot of voters’ minds — ‘except people on the far right.’” NBC News: “Republican state Sen. Matt Dolan announced a new statewide ad campaign on Tuesday, releasing a minute-long ad targeting Brown on immigration, which will air on TV, radio and digital platforms, according to a press release from Dolan's campaign. The ad features footage of Brown's interview on Meet the Press in December, where he said, ‘I don’t hear a lot about immigration from voters except people on the far right that always want to gain political advantage by talking about it.’ The ad then cuts to Dolan standing along the southern border and he says, ‘I'm at our southern border today because Sherrod Brown is dead wrong. From violent crime to sex trafficking and deadly fentanyl, open borders are a direct threat to Ohio families.’” The Senate budget produced by Matt Dolan and the Senate Finance Committee earns strong conservative accolades. The balanced budget produced in the State Senate includes more than $3 billion in tax relief for Ohio taxpayers, families and businesses. It expands school choice, funds police, reduces spending and even provides much-needed investments in mental health services. The budgets has been praised by Americans for Tax Reform, Americans for Prosperity, the Buckeye Institute and conservative groups across Ohio. | | | | | This weekend, the #OhioFirst team was knocking on doors in Southwest Ohio. State Senator Steve Wilson kicked off the canvassing launch in Lebanon Ohio. * We’re conducting door knocking in support of Matt every weekend and most week nights. If you’re interested in supporting Matt, please sign-up on our website or email nick@dolanforOhio and we’ll provide you with literature and a walk list for your community or county! Matt is the leading candidate for U.S. Senate, help us defeat Sherrod Brown! Important news you can use! : First on Fox: Vulnerable Democrat targeted over border security, crime, in crucial 2024 Senate race : Ohio Sen. Sherrod Brown ‘dead wrong’ on immigration, warns candidate Matt Dolan : Ohio Senate race ad wars begin with new spot aimed at Sherrod Brown : Bernie Moreno campaign erred in announcing endorsement : Sixteen Ohio Law Enforcement officials endorse Dolan for U.S. Senate : Top Dem senator slams lobbyist influence while hiring his own stable of ex-lobbyist staffers Here are some photos from the trail from last week. | | | | | | | | | Interested in joining Team Dolan? Matt Dolan needs your help to bring our conservative voices to the U.S. Senate, consider contributing below to help us WIN in Ohio! | | | Forward this email to a friend! Visit DolanforOhio.com for more information on Matt Dolan’s campaign. | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

...it makes the dough rise |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65464451/413491800/-1695430967?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzQ0ZDIzZTMtNjgxNC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wz30ZZiNZdgwZZbBvI0SvMyL8Yi5SdtxrFOfQkW90fo=)
There’s a saying we love that we wanted to share with you, Peter.

EMILYs List, the leading organization for electing Democratic pro-choice women that we're proud to have earned an endorsement from, is actually an acronym.

**EMILY stands for “early money is like yeast” because it makes the dough rise.** It’s a clever way of saying that when a campaign is able to raise money early on, they project strength. It helps power campaigns for the long haul, and it can go a long way in deterring special interests from pouring dark money into the district.

We’ve been thinking about this concept a lot ahead of this week’s FEC filing deadline. When our finances go public at the end of the month, our opponents will use the numbers to make snap judgments about us – and decide how much they want to invest in attacking us in the future.

Let’s prove how strong our campaign really is, Peter!

## Why Chris Christie:

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4c70c8d42a3a45949087aef413640faa&_e=C8PzZkrRzMm4GzVHEOr_ys-fkS42NQBXgodwxd0io5NEjQEHW9U6vCjiTWkZyZrHVekjoT70b9OWszM_AOo5J2JabHn_K67863jzcX4Sp-2TZRdi_-6Ko5EpqI4jYkS0F5e9cOPFz_PCveF7npWnH1aJYCMEDOCimTUZ9nFHxKlt3FBXJ7kzMOH-ypdbU5Nitasl7nhmuM0-0kpjEJ7oD0EdbS-1MoM61Rq_DVaVozG5nagcAf6HpmWuTNmEdtINa3kINeEVcy8HawoJ6ReO1bxSazhtq_8Sm7wMpra9Ul7TzJZV5g_V4VxDe5YPqZw6Aj7DHgmsPOsjtrEMnWV0fnuSteqOYhmiyMM6Pl0QLN1ChA8KDNb8VADwnd3qPKfqazPWuBrHQzl0LqvDMu6WDvVZqYwqBZH1hf4l3U8Ff_A%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous Americans, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That's why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled ["](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4c70c8d42a3a45949087aef413640faa&_e=C8PzZkrRzMm4GzVHEOr_ys-fkS42NQBXgodwxd0io5NEjQEHW9U6vCjiTWkZyZrHVekjoT70b9OWszM_AOo5J2JabHn_K67863jzcX4Sp-2TZRdi_-6Ko5EpqI4jYkS0F5e9cOPFz_PCveF7npWnH1aJYCMEDOCimTUZ9nFHxKlt3FBXJ7kzMOH-ypdbU5Nitasl7nhmuM0-0kpjEJ7oD0EdbS-1MoM61Rq_DVaVozG5nagcAf6HpmWuTNmEdtINa3kINeEVcy8HawoJ6ReO1QLtJiUEd2mTjs_sPwtsxmDvouQ-ZKI1yWSAWw3Y8u4aFhjprhT50SBuKjTaGH0y8qBzKTkgrP7Mt70S841-AQQF9Ep_AhYcVS9qaNwzE30DY-bcNMWUToWYQxzJtjhfOY1SdQ5E49RZKcwrnJ0QYiE%3D)**[The Second World Wars."](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4c70c8d42a3a45949087aef413640faa&_e=C8PzZkrRzMm4GzVHEOr_ys-fkS42NQBXgodwxd0io5NEjQEHW9U6vCjiTWkZyZrHVekjoT70b9OWszM_AOo5J2JabHn_K67863jzcX4Sp-2TZRdi_-6Ko5EpqI4jYkS0F5e9cOPFz_PCveF7npWnH1aJYCMEDOCimTUZ9nFHxKlt3FBXJ7kzMOH-ypdbU5Nitasl7nhmuM0-0kpjEJ7oD0EdbS-1MoM61Rq_DVaVozG5nagcAf6HpmWuTNmEdtINa3kINeEVcy8HawoJ6ReO1QS8mYoCSYK3TX0I9PPT2J2608oNgIMbOfLjuj1J7ITiyd3V6oQ_pzqbbfCld90jzmbcHwZN6MXbYrsrwpTJXI7k7iERaCIRJ4OEdj5TNn-KGiyfr6ynmj5VfGyohdQ3OZipvVwyUyZEcmucvfI-yp8%3D) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies' victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. clean_body: Only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous Americans, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war. | | That's why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian Victor Davis Hanson of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies' victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. | | | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of " The Second World Wars" on DVD today: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! name: Mark Kelly
subject: One of the biggest Senate races coming up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Hi Peter, it’s Senator Mark Kelly.
Hi Peter, it’s Senator Mark Kelly.
I’m no stranger to tough Senate races. My races in 2020 and 2022 in Arizona were key to helping Democrats win and hold our Senate majority. I also know that next year, Mitch McConnell and the GOP are going to do everything they can to take back Senate control by trying to defeat Bob and flip Pennsylvania red.
They’re already targeting Bob’s seat, so take it from me — we have NO time to waste before we fight back.
In just a few days, Bob’s coming up on the first FEC deadline since he launched his re-election campaign, so I’m reaching out to ask you directly, Peter:
**[Will you pitch in a donation to Bob before his campaign’s FEC deadline on June 30? It’s critical that we put all our grassroots strength into defending this competitive seat.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230626-2?refcode=em20230626-2&refcode2=188_552475_RhwkXa&akid=188%2E552475%2ERhwkXa)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230626-2?amount=5&refcode=em20230626-2&refcode2=188_552475_RhwkXa&akid=188%2E552475%2ERhwkXa)**
I know the importance of building a strong grassroots team. Grassroots donations were critical to winning my battleground race in Arizona in 2020 and in 2022, and I know they’ll make all the difference as we fight to keep PA blue in 2024.
Thanks for doing your part,
Mark Kelly

clean_body: Hi Peter, it’s Senator Mark Kelly. Hi Peter, it’s Senator Mark Kelly. I’m no stranger to tough Senate races. My races in 2020 and 2022 in Arizona were key to helping Democrats win and hold our Senate majority. I also know that next year, Mitch McConnell and the GOP are going to do everything they can to take back Senate control by trying to defeat Bob and flip Pennsylvania red. They’re already targeting Bob’s seat, so take it from me — we have NO time to waste before we fight back. In just a few days, Bob’s coming up on the first FEC deadline since he launched his re-election campaign, so I’m reaching out to ask you directly, Peter: I know the importance of building a strong grassroots team. Grassroots donations were critical to winning my battleground race in Arizona in 2020 and in 2022, and I know they’ll make all the difference as we fight to keep PA blue in 2024. Thanks for doing your part, Mark Kelly

I fight everyday in Congress to advocate for the people of mid-Michigan. I’m working to lower costs and to create good-paying jobs. I’m working to improve infrastructure, make prescription drugs and health care more affordable, and protect Social Security and Medicare.

**And, one year after the Supreme Court decision to overturn Roe v. Wade, I’m still fighting in Congress for federal protections for abortion and to protect your right to make your own health care decisions.**

While some of my colleagues seemingly are constantly distracted by petty politics and hoping for news airtime, I’m in Congress to lower the temperature of politics and to get _results_ for Michiganders.

**_That’s what Michiganders need: results, not extremist rhetoric and partisan games._

[Can you chip in $15 before our deadline so we can prove our grassroots strength when our numbers go public?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65466846/413493293/-630748219?amount=15&source=EM_NBI_DK_20230626_FR_1.1_0_6MO_T_candidate_NA_NA_eoq&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjFkNTFkZi02YTE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vDQoLM-NcWFZsEcqNzI3xG6JRPvNhXinx5OyWRoGjnk=)**

Thank you for standing with me,

Dan

* * *

As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. **[The future of our schools and the direction of our country is at stake. Will you donate to Emerge to empower Democratic women to run for office and defeat GOP extremists in school board elections and beyond?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65467773/413496846/-1986725773?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1226-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJiOWM4NjdiLTZkMTQtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=he46SD7qLJpkaafIEeHFD4j4NJX_149IGl6ByHzCCps=)**
Peter, last year, far-right groups went all-in on hundreds of school board elections. **Prominent Republicans like Ron DeSantis personally endorsed school board candidates, drawing more attention and investment from GOP PACS into these crucial but overlooked races.

That’s a problem. **
The GOP’s push to dominate school boards across the country is not slowing down.**Worse, thousands of school board races still go completely uncontested!** That means full slates of far-right candidates can swoop in and claim these vital seats – with often disastrous consequences for students and the direction of our country.
**Book ban attempts have skyrocketed more than 700% since 2020, **and marginalized communities are always the target. Meanwhile, 22 states have bans preventing transgender students from participating in school sports, and the wave of anti-LGBTQ+ legislation continues to rise. None of these policies are about quality education or students’ well-being. Instead, they’re part of a regressive and hateful agenda that threatens to drive our country backward.
**The good news** is that Emerge women are fighting back against the GOP’s cynical takeover. Twenty-eight of our Emerge alums just WON in school board races in Kentucky, Pennsylvania, and Oregon!**But if far-right Republicans aren’t slowing down, then neither can we.**

**That’s why Emerge is building a new program focused entirely on school board races to help Democratic women replace and face down regressive candidates to win these critical seats. But with the GOP doubling down on packing our school boards, we urgently need your help to get this new program off the ground. **
**[With the future of our schools and the direction of our country at stake, will you donate $5 – or as much as you can – to Emerge now? Every dollar helps expand our proven effective programs to help Democratic women run and WIN at every level of office.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65467774/413496847/-1986725773?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1226-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJiOWM4NjdiLTZkMTQtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=he46SD7qLJpkaafIEeHFD4j4NJX_149IGl6ByHzCCps=)**
Thank you for your crucial support,
Team Emerge

subject: The path to taking back the House runs through New York
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | |
---
Hey friend, it’s Zak Malamed — the Democrat running against George Santos.

**Last year, Republicans reclaimed the House majority. This year, we are going to take it back.**

I am going to break down how we plan to do that and why this hinges on winning races across New York, but especially here in NY-03.
**[But before I do that, I am going to ask you to make a split donation to me and American Bridge. We expect Republicans to spend millions to defend MAGA Republicans like George Santos and hold onto the House, so we need the resources to go toe-to-toe with them, flip this seat blue, and take back the House. So, can I and my friends at American Bridge count on your $15 now?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65467798/413497041/-1572480541?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2734-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI5OWM4NjdiLTZkMTQtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1D1cmXFH6l4xpO0xKmpfvl6YpgEQkxiHEnZA__hX514=)**
In 2022, New York saw an unprecedented number of House seats flip red — tipping the scales for Republicans to reclaim the House majority.

Since then, they have used their power to push an extreme, MAGA agenda through Congress that ignores the needs of everyday Americans and attempts to roll back any progress we’ve made over the last few years.

**The good news** is many of these same seats are considered toss-ups in 2024, including our district, NY-03. The way we move this seat from a toss-up to a victory for Democrats is by hitting the ground running.
For us, that means launching our voter outreach program, sharing my priorities with community members across the district, and ensuring voters know the truth about George Santos and the stakes of this race. That is why I have been showing up at events from Bayside, Queens to Bayville, Nassau County. To do that, we need the cash on hand to cover the costs of all these tools.

**Here is how you can help, friend.** George Santos and MAGA Republicans have deep-pocketed donors they can lean on — **but we have you**. We are the only campaign that is not in a position to self-fund, which means every dollar you have helps me build the grassroots campaign we need to win.
**[So I am personally asking: will you make a split donation of $15 to my campaign and American Bridge to power our work, flip NY-03 blue, and help Democrats take back the House?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65467800/413497043/-1572480541?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2734-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI5OWM4NjdiLTZkMTQtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1D1cmXFH6l4xpO0xKmpfvl6YpgEQkxiHEnZA__hX514=)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairwoman=20Kristina=20Karamo?=
subject: What is the Michigan Republican Party Doing?
body:
Important update from the Michigan Republican Party. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1e3734e5a249/what-is-the-michigan-republican-party-doing?e=a2af77507c)
---
| |
---
| | Building and sustaining a strong infrastructure at the Michigan Republican Party is necessary for our success. To accomplish this goal, it will include a strong community organizing program. This is why we have developed "The Good Neighbor Program". Our goal is that Republican delegates and activists are the most dedicated neighbors. We know that the media and education system has deceived the public about who we are and what we believe, and Big Tech manipulates the algorithms, to keep us in bubbles, to thwart our efforts of getting our message out. This is why it is up to us to engage our community directly with our message. There is no replacement for human-to-human interaction. As a Good Neighbors, you will be the political experts of your precinct. There is also something else "The Good Neighbor Program" will restore, a sense of community that is missing from American society. Our goal isn’t to simply win elections, but to advance our vision of what Michigan should be. One of the reasons the Democrat Party is so successful is that they are a machine with the goal of deconstructing the United States of America to the point our Republic implodes. We cannot stop their agenda if we are thinking about the short term of just election cycles. We must do the work of political engagement all year long. This program is our solution. This is our unique program where we will upload content and trainings to transform our delegates from political activists to political operatives. We are beginning the program with basic information everyone should know about the political offices and boundaries of their community, and elected officials. We will be constantly adding more content. Click on the video below, and I will explain the vision behind this program: [](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=fda3ab6fdf&e=a2af77507c) We will use The Good Neighbor Program’s infrastructure to fight systemic election corruption, which is a top priority of this administration. We want people to be engaged in a manner that will remedy the problem. With the help of the folks at CheckMyVote.org, we will roll out our QVF clean-up program AND focus on the deletion of voter histories. Also, we will train you on how to engage people. We can’t always be a hammer, sometimes we must be a scalpel. As more MIGOP programs and initiatives roll out, "The Good Neighbor Program" will be the conduit to assist in organizing and facilitating those programs. The beauty of the platform we are using is that it is secure, and free of Big Tech censorship. MIGOP can also communicate directly with you, without having to deal with emails going to spam. Information from MIGOP will be organized in your portal. Each delegate will have their own login credentials. As counties and district parties sign up, they will be able to add their own content, and you will receive information uniquely from your county and district parties. Within in the next few days, you will receive an email from Playbook Builder with a link for you to enroll and create your username password. We will also have trainings to help you get familiar with the program and ask any questions you may have. The first training will be virtually Monday July 10th, at 7pm. More details to come. There also be in person trainings. We are very excited about this program. It will transform Michigan, and it can’t be done without you.

In Liberty,

**Kristina Karamo**
Chairwoman
Michigan Republican Party
---

clean_body: Important update from the Michigan Republican Party. | | | | | | | Building and sustaining a strong infrastructure at the Michigan Republican Party is necessary for our success. To accomplish this goal, it will include a strong community organizing program. This is why we have developed "The Good Neighbor Program". Our goal is that Republican delegates and activists are the most dedicated neighbors. We know that the media and education system has deceived the public about who we are and what we believe, and Big Tech manipulates the algorithms, to keep us in bubbles, to thwart our efforts of getting our message out. This is why it is up to us to engage our community directly with our message. There is no replacement for human-to-human interaction. As a Good Neighbors, you will be the political experts of your precinct. There is also something else "The Good Neighbor Program" will restore, a sense of community that is missing from American society. Our goal isn’t to simply win elections, but to advance our vision of what Michigan should be. One of the reasons the Democrat Party is so successful is that they are a machine with the goal of deconstructing the United States of America to the point our Republic implodes. We cannot stop their agenda if we are thinking about the short term of just election cycles. We must do the work of political engagement all year long. This program is our solution. This is our unique program where we will upload content and trainings to transform our delegates from political activists to political operatives. We are beginning the program with basic information everyone should know about the political offices and boundaries of their community, and elected officials. We will be constantly adding more content. Click on the video below, and I will explain the vision behind this program: We will use The Good Neighbor Program’s infrastructure to fight systemic election corruption, which is a top priority of this administration. We want people to be engaged in a manner that will remedy the problem. With the help of the folks at CheckMyVote.org, we will roll out our QVF clean-up program AND focus on the deletion of voter histories. Also, we will train you on how to engage people. We can’t always be a hammer, sometimes we must be a scalpel. As more MIGOP programs and initiatives roll out, "The Good Neighbor Program" will be the conduit to assist in organizing and facilitating those programs. The beauty of the platform we are using is that it is secure, and free of Big Tech censorship. MIGOP can also communicate directly with you, without having to deal with emails going to spam. Information from MIGOP will be organized in your portal. Each delegate will have their own login credentials. As counties and district parties sign up, they will be able to add their own content, and you will receive information uniquely from your county and district parties. Within in the next few days, you will receive an email from Playbook Builder with a link for you to enroll and create your username password. We will also have trainings to help you get familiar with the program and ask any questions you may have. The first training will be virtually Monday July 10th, at 7pm. More details to come. There also be in person trainings. We are very excited about this program. It will transform Michigan, and it can’t be done without you. In Liberty, Kristina Karamo Chairwoman Michigan Republican Party | | "DONATE HERE" | | | | | | | | | | | | Our mailing address is: 3450 Alpine Ave. NW Box 332 Grand Rapids, MI 49544 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or . | | Contributions can be made digitally or by mail. Paid for with regulated funds by the Michigan Republican Party www.migop.org

Peter -
I am proud of Ruben.
I am proud of the man he has become, and most of all I am proud of his fierce and unwavering commitment to making life better for everyone regardless of their background.
As you may know, Ruben and I are expecting our first child together. It can happen any day now. I can't wait for all of the adventures our growing family has in store.
But right now, Ruben not only has one eye on me and the pending birth of our baby, but the other eye on the upcoming fundraising deadline and making sure he has the money to run a winning race so he can represent all Arizonans.
It's a big deadline. And because Ruben is going to be taking some time off to spend with our growing family, it means a lot less time making fundraising phone calls.
So I am writing to ask for your help. Especially before this deadline. If you could contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can afford today it'd help Ruben reach his fundraising goals and give him some peace of mind about the campaign as he transitions to time with family for a few weeks.

| | I have a simple request: **Help us kickstart our grassroots organizing effort.** People always talk about grassroots organizing, but no one ever explains exactly what that means. So, here's how it works:
1. **Reach out to our community.** We need to text, call, knock on doors. We search high and low for every local Democratic volunteer we can find. _(And yes, it is really hard to get folks to answer the phone in 2023)._
2. **Give volunteers the coaching and tools they need to build this movement.** Behind every great volunteer is a great team of organizers. Our organizers plan our actions, train volunteers, and make sure everyone has the information (and coffee) they need to make phone calls, texts, register new voters, and re-register folks who've fallen off the rolls.
3. **Get out the vote!** Once ballots drop, our team hits the streets to ensure every Democrat in their community gets their ballot in the mail or to an official drop box on time.

**This work is challenging, but so meaningful — and most importantly — effective.** And the sooner we start, the more volunteers we can mobilize to drive the progressive change our country needs. But while volunteers are free, the infrastructure to support them isn't. That's why we are starting now, and we need your support. **[Can we count on you to join this movement and start building our grassroots infrastructure today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65468847/413500236/319733220?refcode=2023-06-26-eoq-bvf&recurring=0&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=5fc350ac-6f14-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmMzNTBhYy02ZjE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_UKBhSsPT3GIUiZT84xYFSIU_CQxe_czhCnpLQbT0_s=)** [Heck Yeah!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65468848/413500237/319733220?refcode=2023-06-26-eoq-bvf&recurring=0&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=5fc350ac-6f14-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmMzNTBhYy02ZjE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_UKBhSsPT3GIUiZT84xYFSIU_CQxe_czhCnpLQbT0_s=) Grassroots organizing is what drives Democratic campaigning, and it's what drives our movement. **Without all of our volunteers, organizers, and grassroots supporters, MAGA Republicans and their authoritarian friends would still be in the White House.** And it's the only thing that can keep them out. Together, we can ensure that reproductive rights are upheld and guaranteed for all Ohioans.

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Ohio Democratic Party
Date: Jun 24, 2023
Subject: One year ago today, the extremist Supreme Court took away our right to bodily autonomy
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65468969/413500924/-1720848229?refcode=em23_230626_roekic_fnd_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230626_roekic_fnd_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=d28d38fb-7014-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&noskip=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjhkMzhmYi03MDE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c_7I2TfaOpHg3ZWoVjatyvh2E_h6gE30PCGWAoKJM-w=)
Team,

Today marks one year since the far-right Supreme Court's decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade._ The consequences of this ruling are far-reaching and have jeopardized the fundamental rights, autonomy, and **lives** of individuals across Ohio.

**Like the majority of Ohioans, we firmly believe that reproductive care IS healthcare. No lawmaker or judge should have the power to dictate the most intimate decisions concerning our bodies and futures. That's why Ohio Democrats have been working tirelessly to put a reproductive rights initiative on the ballot, and THIS WEEK, we turned in over 100,000 signatures from every county in Ohio.**

But, anti-choice politicians in our state are ready to fight us every step of the way, and make sure this is THE issue on the ballot. Threatened by the power of the people, they've forced "Issue 1" on the August 8 ballot to try and sabotage the initiative petition process. We need your help fighting back, and that's why on today's anniversary, I'm coming to you with two requests:

**ONE:[If you're able, will you please consider chipping in $5 or more to help us mobilize voters across the state? With your help, we can defend the initiative petition process and protect reproductive rights in Ohio.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65468970/413500925/-1720848229?refcode=em23_230626_roekic_fnd_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230626_roekic_fnd_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=d28d38fb-7014-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&noskip=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjhkMzhmYi03MDE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c_7I2TfaOpHg3ZWoVjatyvh2E_h6gE30PCGWAoKJM-w=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65468971/413500926/-1720848229?refcode=em23_230626_roekic_fnd_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230626_roekic_fnd_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=d28d38fb-7014-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&noskip=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjhkMzhmYi03MDE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c_7I2TfaOpHg3ZWoVjatyvh2E_h6gE30PCGWAoKJM-w=)
