clean_body: We are looking for volunteers all across Ohio, can we count on you, team? | Have you seen this yet, team? Join the Ohio Democrats in the fight to protect reproductive rights and our Democratic process! Volunteer with Ohio Democrats to help reach voters across the state and mobilize them to vote "NO" on Issue 1, which threatens citizen-led ballot initiatives: | To fuel our voter engagement efforts, = Together, we can ensure that reproductive rights are upheld and guaranteed for all Ohioans. \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Ohio Democratic Party Date: Jun 24, 2023 Subject: One year ago today, the extremist Supreme Court took away our right to bodily autonomy = Team, Today marks one year since the far-right Supreme Court's decision to overturn Roe v. Wade. The consequences of this ruling are far-reaching and have jeopardized the fundamental rights, autonomy, and lives of individuals across Ohio. Like the majority of Ohioans, we firmly believe that reproductive care IS healthcare. No lawmaker or judge should have the power to dictate the most intimate decisions concerning our bodies and futures. That's why Ohio Democrats have been working tirelessly to put a reproductive rights initiative on the ballot, and THIS WEEK, we turned in over 100,000 signatures from every county in Ohio. But, anti-choice politicians in our state are ready to fight us every step of the way, and make sure this is THE issue on the ballot. Threatened by the power of the people, they've forced "Issue 1" on the August 8 ballot to try and sabotage the initiative petition process. We need your help fighting back, and that's why on today's anniversary, I'm coming to you with two requests: ONE:= = TWO: If you're ready to get involved, will you sign up to volunteer with Ohio Democrats to help turn out voters for the August 8 special election? With your help, we can ensure that the 60% threshold to pass a citizen-led constitutional amendment never, ever becomes Ohio law. Ohio Democrats are making it clear every single day that we will NOT go back. We're grateful to have you by our side as we fight to protect reproductive rights in our state. Together, we will defend the values we all hold dear! Onwards and upwards, Liz Walters Chair Ohio Democratic Party The Ohio Democratic Party is working year-round to elect Democrats who will fight for working families all over the Buckeye State. Will you pitch in $10 or more right away? Every dollar you give helps build a blue Ohio. = = | 697 East Broad Street Suite 101 Columbus, Ohio 43215 | Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | Click here to from the Ohio Democratic Party's email list.

| | We know we can take back the House majority in 2024. Here's why: [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65469046/413501067/-1524463920?sourceid=1050343&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZThkMzhmYi03MDE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zp16bk7Ds7fBe8SvLhrzFMwqnUCgYFTUZ7hBSsBno6M=&emci=363fa119-6914-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=ce8d38fb-7014-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Make no mistake, Peter: Republicans may have won the majority last year, but **the House is back in play this cycle**.

An example of just how winnable the House is? No fewer than **18** House Republicans represent districts that Joe Biden won in 2020. As a reminder, we only need to flip six seats to take back the House majority. And with **President Joe Biden** and **Vice President Kamala Harris** back on the ballot in 2024, Republicans will have to fight even harder to keep their seats.

But we've got some tough seats to defend too, Peter: Reps. **Jahana Hayes (CT-05)** , **Susan Wild (PA-07)** , **Yadira Caraveo (CO-08)** , and **Marie Gluesenkamp Perez (WA-03)** all won their races last year by less than one point — and Marie won by just over 2,600 votes in what was _the biggest upset of the 2022 cycle_.

There's no denying that we've got our work cut out for us. But we know that, with the support of this community, we can take back the House in 2024. **Donate now to support the incredible Democratic pro-choice women who can help make it happen:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Elect-Women-This-June](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65469053/413501074/-1524463920?sourceid=1050343&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZThkMzhmYi03MDE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zp16bk7Ds7fBe8SvLhrzFMwqnUCgYFTUZ7hBSsBno6M=&emci=363fa119-6914-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=ce8d38fb-7014-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** Thank you,

name: All On The Line
subject: 🚨BREAKING NEWS🚨
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

**Breaking news, team!** The US Supreme Court has dismissed a petition to appeal voters’ success in challenging Louisiana’s congressional map and lifted a stay that had been standing in the way of a lower court’s order for a new, fair map. [**This means that Black Louisianans may have the opportunity to gain additional representation in Congress where they can elect a candidate of their choice. This victory for voters underscores the growing significance of recent fair map wins, like the triumph in Alabama.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65469059/413501082/679814613?refcode=20230626_AOTL_F_LASCOTUS_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjOGQzOGZiLTcwMTQtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JWLaFwT0bPUPz8CgGmDLREUDJsxjgsq5_IgmIVcmWPg=)
[**Rush a donation to All On The Line and help us end gerrymandering and protect voting rights. >>**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65469060/413501083/679814613?refcode=20230626_AOTL_F_LASCOTUS_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjOGQzOGZiLTcwMTQtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JWLaFwT0bPUPz8CgGmDLREUDJsxjgsq5_IgmIVcmWPg=)

The dismissal of the Louisiana petition signifies a significant step forward in the ongoing battle to protect and preserve voting rights. With the case now resuming at the 5th Circuit and the district court, and the process for a new map re-engaged, the spotlight remains on working to ensure fairness for all voters.
**Today’s win validates the importance of continuing the fight for voters’ rights, and the importance of never giving up on our fight for fair maps.** [**Will you make a donation to All On The Line to help us keep up the fight forward for fairness?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65469062/413501085/679814613?refcode=20230626_AOTL_F_LASCOTUS_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjOGQzOGZiLTcwMTQtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JWLaFwT0bPUPz8CgGmDLREUDJsxjgsq5_IgmIVcmWPg=)

clean_body: | Breaking news, team! The US Supreme Court has dismissed a petition to appeal voters’ success in challenging Louisiana’s congressional map and lifted a stay that had been standing in the way of a lower court’s order for a new, fair map. = = = The dismissal of the Louisiana petition signifies a significant step forward in the ongoing battle to protect and preserve voting rights. With the case now resuming at the 5th Circuit and the district court, and the process for a new map re-engaged, the spotlight remains on working to ensure fairness for all voters. Today’s win validates the importance of continuing the fight for voters’ rights, and the importance of never giving up on our fight for fair maps. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Let’s continue championing principles of our democracy and fight for fairness across the nation. In solidarity, All On The Line All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. TextFAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. and | = | PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND. The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

name: Adam Frisch
subject: Lauren Boebert and me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
Last year, our race was the closest race in the country. After the recount was finished, I lost to Boebert by just 546 votes.

| Peter,

In just 4 days, Lauren Boebert and I are facing a federally-mandated fundraising deadline. **After midnight Friday, we’ll both be required by law to file a report with the Federal Election Commission (FEC) saying how much we’ve raised and from how many donors.**

This is our most important FEC report of the campaign so far, and our fundraising numbers will be closely compared with Boebert’s. It’s also our first opportunity to once again out-raise Lauren Boebert – purely with the help of grassroots donors like you – and shock everyone.

**Last year, our race was the closest race in the country. After the recount was finished, I lost to Boebert by just 546 votes.** But with Lauren Boebert now on notice, her Super PACs are going to raise millions to attack me – and their lie-filled ads are sure to follow.

This is our opportunity to show Boebert, every political pundit, and the Democratic and Republican establishment that we _will_ send Lauren Boebert packing in 2024.

**We’ve set a huge goal of raising $1.5 million online before this important end-of-quarter FEC fundraising deadline, but I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give now if we’re going to hit it.**

[_**I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money, so I’m counting on you to give $10 or more right now between my campaign and Fight for Progress – every dollar you can afford before my federally-mandated FEC fundraising deadline – to help me defeat Lauren Boebert and restore some sanity to Congress.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65469539/413502474/2053616000?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230626-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFmMzI0ZDI2LTczMTQtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dbXgh4bCO7iWv5OogFr65f1YPiwoHqp7X0DpzdAVsCE=)

After this FEC filing deadline, all of our fundraising numbers will become public. We cannot afford to fall short now.

Truly, thank you for being a part of this team.

With gratitude -
Adam

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: Who I am and where I come from
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65469575/413502574/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230626_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODU5MmI0Yy03MzE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ffrFx5ISu6ua7WfIRkIEuSLQFq2vhWW4itu9JMiWj7U=&emci=ef592b4c-7314-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=f8592b4c-7314-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)
---
I grew up in a working-class family as the granddaughter of immigrants and the daughter of a World War II veteran. I was the first in my family to graduate from college, and I worked multiple jobs – including as a cocktail waitress at Caesars Palace – and took out student loans to make ends meet. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65469576/413502575/-982647225?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230626_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODU5MmI0Yy03MzE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ffrFx5ISu6ua7WfIRkIEuSLQFq2vhWW4itu9JMiWj7U=) Now, I'm humbled to serve Nevada in the U.S. Senate. As a former union member, I'm especially honored to represent the hardworking families and union workers who have helped build our great state. **Who I am and where I come from is why I've always fought to strengthen our middle class, create good-paying jobs, and lower everyday costs.** But right now, I need your help. I'm back on the ballot next year, and CNN reports that I'm one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection. clean_body: I grew up in a working-class family as the granddaughter of immigrants and the daughter of a World War II veteran. I was the first in my family to graduate from college, and I worked multiple jobs – including as a cocktail waitress at Caesars Palace – and took out student loans to make ends meet. = Now, I'm humbled to serve Nevada in the U.S. Senate. As a former union member, I'm especially honored to represent the hardworking families and union workers who have helped build our great state. name: Working Families Party
subject: We support Starbucks workers on strike
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
Workers are fighting to negotiate a contract that protects LGBTQ+ workers and puts an end to Starbucks’ unfair labor practices, illegal union-busting, and more. | | | **Thousands of Starbucks baristas at more than 150 stores across the U.S. are striking this week, Peter.** The strike comes weeks after Starbucks refused to sit at the bargaining table over a policy change that saw workers in some states ordered to either remove existing LGBTQ+ Pride flags and symbols, or told they would not be allowed to decorate stores for Pride month. Now, in what’s to be a week-long strike, workers are fighting to negotiate a contract that protects LGBTQ+ workers and puts an end to Starbucks’ unfair labor practices, illegal union-busting, and more. [**If you stand in solidarity with Starbucks workers as they fight for what they deserve, sign our petition now. We'll share your signatures and messages of solidarity with Starbucks workers.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXdJUvH8Ygu3R43gD0WUPlZ7g42mZEHAhnbBTfMrlONpnzVHL4jMp9QkV15-kNHuiDOEAQdL8rR9TVFi1g4vwgj0I39jkrZyLymwfcqpA6r0WvpohkEOHr-bL_Yo6G7BMqKwQn_WAHJYsMFPb5OIygMyLY4HtIoH237VyZ7p9uYGWagNn5ZtqzTr3jxCGfiyfuOkZgfIXlTs1CQ31I_ag1p8RLgDLm46rWZm52iabZpSHvtMVP38sKdfFp7N9uMITdS-pVuiI10Q8Shj4jyHTXfwfwQYm7L6pNe0AbKfZbs832zXwsxuhF87ZyRVHoukSZQ/3xd/dIPt8mSWRnOVc-_y2NT92w/h0/xuePtBRaTYxtWxFliWde_gAYSsV48o2HsgJUUNlWIWI) [****](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXdJUvH8Ygu3R43gD0WUPlZ7g42mZEHAhnbBTfMrlONpnzVHL4jMp9QkV15-kNHuiDOEAQdL8rR9TVFi1g4vwgj0I39jkrZyLymwfcqpA6r0WvpohkEOHr-bL_Yo6G7BMqHUxgadUQ5HgTryGB2eooRX_SYNNPeRGtMSm8wsyH7fa49o05N_9RTsDZvTTwnvZ6wrZLk92Lhq0mP_dHCmT8sqwYKf7ODEMT_4KFammpbI0KUCjK60_8tHYUQssMXSTWeh6KML1FQ0fAFDZTgU62fp0Nw7c4vP_hdh7VqrRkUsXB-6R98Ijw1Jmn2J2Nu3V7w/3xd/dIPt8mSWRnOVc-_y2NT92w/h1/vbZGn6pK6HJ0HNVSBurs4BJGcySzt_5f2bnzJKyHmt4)**[Sign our petition »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXdJUvH8Ygu3R43gD0WUPlZ7g42mZEHAhnbBTfMrlONpnzVHL4jMp9QkV15-kNHuiDOEAQdL8rR9TVFi1g4vwgj0I39jkrZyLymwfcqpA6r0WvpohkEOHr-bL_Yo6G7BMqLGuozH2mdLVpCSG3whrmcsdLwIRpTTlZY8nXFq3_odGJ7PjQttKVx1zoSRlwNTCibHOOSX7JSI02wNcRrL5DZ3KkjzUZKtnLyZxms8C_VF-KXFd3iktRQyiei0-m5xt06a3cjUGpmjMXecQpkYJpW496S2G0HWswXuwCjCSmjj2V0ClWCD-to9XvkP2WujK7A/3xd/dIPt8mSWRnOVc-_y2NT92w/h2/ZOchVEM4xkPJuvsTZdQCMg40T2Ru0vM3pLMd5snGE-s)** The new policy prohibiting workers from decorating stores for Pride month is a stark departure from previous years — back when Pride was considered “profitable” by corporate America, and Starbucks had no problem cashing in, providing Pride pins and apparel for workers to wear. But with the ongoing right-wing backlash and boycott of major brands like Target and Bud Light over Pride merchandise and promotions, Starbucks has decided to appease anti-LGBTQ+ extremists, and put profits over the workers and communities they claim to care about. **Starbucks has**** _been_****doing this, though — way before this year’s Pride month.** As part of its anti-union push, Starbucks has intimidated and threatened its baristas — many of whom are queer or trans — for their efforts to unionize. They’ve made calculated cuts to workers’ hours to block them from accessing benefits, including life-saving gender-affirming care; withheld credit card tipping at select stores; and refused to bargain with union representatives to guarantee workers their rights. **Strikers are saying enough of the performative progressivism, and demanding that Starbucks come to the table to bargain for a contract that legally guarantees their rights.** [**Sign our petition now to show your support for Starbucks baristas striking this week as they fight to win protections for LGBTQ+ workers, and demand an end to unfair labor practices, illegal union-busting, and more.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXdJUvH8Ygu3R43gD0WUPlZ7g42mZEHAhnbBTfMrlONpnzVHL4jMp9QkV15-kNHuiDOEAQdL8rR9TVFi1g4vwgj0I39jkrZyLymwfcqpA6r0WvpohkEOHr-bL_Yo6G7BMqDfzFX2oDd2_myQYIiH6PJvEhw6BnRuePSE3rERNC-BKhYq21BD44fS3lMFqUvqdOZCBf5LZ0vBaIf6BRk0DuX-CwR8ltjS2l9QfOVnqhXm9LDHskPoLKQPbqBF-H5BbRmo1JbXA60VmcQBMvgDpWhxM0RpDFVzQt2z83fggcoN_wBBYPgPpgmxd3OCk6cElag/3xd/dIPt8mSWRnOVc-_y2NT92w/h3/e2EAprjIJ13SUFsRLCVi66Ozj6bazZnIpARIYXp-3eQ) In solidarity, always, Working Families Party clean_body: Workers are fighting to negotiate a contract that protects LGBTQ+ workers and puts an end to Starbucks’ unfair labor practices, illegal union-busting, and more. | | | Thousands of Starbucks baristas at more than 150 stores across the U.S. are striking this week, Peter. The strike comes weeks after Starbucks refused to sit at the bargaining table over a policy change that saw workers in some states ordered to either remove existing LGBTQ+ Pride flags and symbols, or told they would not be allowed to decorate stores for Pride month. Now, in what’s to be a week-long strike, workers are fighting to negotiate a contract that protects LGBTQ+ workers and puts an end to Starbucks’ unfair labor practices, illegal union-busting, and more. The new policy prohibiting workers from decorating stores for Pride month is a stark departure from previous years — back when Pride was considered “profitable” by corporate America, and Starbucks had no problem cashing in, providing Pride pins and apparel for workers to wear. But with the ongoing right-wing backlash and boycott of major brands like Target and Bud Light over Pride merchandise and promotions, Starbucks has decided to appease anti-LGBTQ+ extremists, and put profits over the workers and communities they claim to care about. Starbucks has beendoing this, though — way before this year’s Pride month. As part of its anti-union push, Starbucks has intimidated and threatened its baristas — many of whom are queer or trans — for their efforts to unionize. They’ve made calculated cuts to workers’ hours to block them from accessing benefits, including life-saving gender-affirming care; withheld credit card tipping at select stores; and refused to bargain with union representatives to guarantee workers their rights. Strikers are saying enough of the performative progressivism, and demanding that Starbucks come to the table to bargain for a contract that legally guarantees their rights. In solidarity, always, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. "And Biden regime sweetheart plea deal with Hunter is announced. Joe Biden's response? Bring Hunter to WH for a State Dinner and then off to Camp David for the weekend with him." | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Jun 26, 2023 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | "This week, federal government whistleblowers allege massive DOJ/FBI corrupt obstruction to protect Hunter and Biden family," tweeted Tom Fitton, president of Judicial Watch. "And Biden regime sweetheart plea deal with Hunter is announced. Joe Biden's response? Bring Hunter to WH for a State Dinner and then off to Camp David for the weekend with him." ---|--- | | | | | Tom Fitton, who founded Judicial Watch, a conservative advocacy group in Washington, called the plea deal and diversion agreement “a miscarriage of justice whose chief beneficiary is President Biden.” He questioned why Mr. Garland had not appointed a special counsel who might have produced a public report explaining why prosecutors did not seek a harsher penalty, as did John Durham, the special counsel who investigated the origins of the inquiry into the Trump campaign’s ties to Russia. ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton told Secrets that Biden’s plea agreement was “outrageous” but “not surprising.” He said that in cutting a deal, Attorney General Merrick Garland has pushed aside Biden family scandals to make reelection easier. ---|--- | | | | | Tom Fitton, one of Trump’s most vocal supporters, said the judge’s order was so vague as to virtually guarantee a confrontation between Trump, the Justice Department and the judge who ultimately oversees the case.“When Trump starts talking about the case, which he has every right to do on the campaign trail, what are Nauta and all of the other people around Trump every day supposed to do: Cover their ears so they can’t hear it?” asked Fitton, president of the conservative public interest group Judicial Watch. ---|--- | | | USA Today Tom Fitton, one of Trump’s most vocal supporters, said the judge’s order was so vague as to virtually guarantee a confrontation between Trump, the Justice Department and the judge who ultimately oversees the case. The Wall Street Journal Although the indictment against Donald Trump doesn’t cite the Presidential Records Act, the charges are predicated on the law. The indictment came about only because the government thought Mr. Trump took records that didn’t belong to him, and the government raided his house to find any such records. subject: Uncensored Take on RFK Jr. + New Short Film + Celebrating Independence Day
body:
Uncensored Take on RFK Jr. + New Short Film + Celebrating Independence Day | | |
---
| | |
# My Uncensored Take on RFK Jr.
---
Despite the fact that he is a Kennedy, the son of a respected US Senator and the nephew of a revered US president, Robert Kennedy Jr. is an outsider to the upside-down world of American politics. The Democratic Party is terrified of the man, and for good reason – he is as honest as sunshine.

Bobby is my dear friend and ally in the fight for truth and freedom. He is a good man. A humble, brave and brilliant man. As an environmental lawyer, he has singlehandedly done more to preserve our natural resources than most of the largest environmental NGOs combined. As a David against the Goliath known as Big Pharma, no man has done more to protect the health of children than RFK Jr.

Despite decades of smears and slander from mainstream media, his own political party and even members of his own family, Robert Kennedy Jr. has never wavered from honoring the respected legacy of his beloved father and uncle. In my opinion, RFK Jr. is a true American hero, and...

HE DOES NOT HAVE MY VOTE. Not yet.

Perhaps that will change once I’m able to ask him a few burning questions during our live roundtable discussion. Join me, RKF Jr., Dr. Joseph Mercola, Dr. Sherri Tenpenny, Dr. Pierre Kory, Dr. Patrick Gentempo, Maureen McDonnell, Del Bigtree, Sayer Ji and others,** this Tuesday, June 27th. ** **It starts at 4pm PT / 6pm CT / 7pm ET. Be sure to register for this free webinar here:**
---
| [REGISTER FOR ROUNDTABLE](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=08d6ff4209&e=3a42edfdc4 "REGISTER FOR ROUNDTABLE")
---
| | On a related note, our new short film created with Global Health Project (GHP) about the lack of integrity in public health, "The Oath," has just launched! **Scroll down to learn more and watch ** Thank you,
---
[](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=a35915fdc6&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
**Mikki Willis**
Father / Filmmaker P.S. Believe it or not, we've successfully uploaded The Great Awakening to YouTube! So far, the movie hasn't been taken down, though it's not easy to find via search. To help it reach more people, please share [this direct link to The Great Awakening's official upload on YouTube](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=156518d0ae&e=3a42edfdc4), as well as like and comment on it.
---
| [ ](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=64dd531dde&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
| |
## THE OATH
---
We recently teamed up with Global Health Project (GHP) to produce a series of emotionally moving short films around the current lack of integrity in public health.

The video series titled “The Oath” asks the question, “Why are so many doctors having second thoughts about COVID?” and answers by featuring multiple real-world docs who are willing to step up and recognize the many mistakes that were made. The brave doctors encourage the public to take ownership of their own health as the only viable path forward.

More broadly, GHP demands honest conversations between doctors and their patients to reconcile the flaws in the healthcare system and regain the trust lost during COVID-19.** Visit their website to watch the short film & join the movement:**
---

clean_body: Uncensored Take on RFK Jr. + New Short Film + Celebrating Independence Day | | | | | | My Uncensored Take on RFK Jr. Despite the fact that he is a Kennedy, the son of a respected US Senator and the nephew of a revered US president, Robert Kennedy Jr. is an outsider to the upside-down world of American politics. The Democratic Party is terrified of the man, and for good reason – he is as honest as sunshine. Bobby is my dear friend and ally in the fight for truth and freedom. He is a good man. A humble, brave and brilliant man. As an environmental lawyer, he has singlehandedly done more to preserve our natural resources than most of the largest environmental NGOs combined. As a David against the Goliath known as Big Pharma, no man has done more to protect the health of children than RFK Jr. Despite decades of smears and slander from mainstream media, his own political party and even members of his own family, Robert Kennedy Jr. has never wavered from honoring the respected legacy of his beloved father and uncle. In my opinion, RFK Jr. is a true American hero, and... HE DOES NOT HAVE MY VOTE. Not yet. Perhaps that will change once I’m able to ask him a few burning questions during our live roundtable discussion. Join me, RKF Jr., Dr. Joseph Mercola, Dr. Sherri Tenpenny, Dr. Pierre Kory, Dr. Patrick Gentempo, Maureen McDonnell, Del Bigtree, Sayer Ji and others, this Tuesday, June 27th. name: Alexander Vindman
subject: re: Trump’s first impeachment
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2727%2E5257348%2EPAkoZ1 ]Adam Schiff for Senate

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230626_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2727%2E5257348%2EPAkoZ1 ]headshot of Lieutenant Colonel (Retired) Alexander Vindman

Hello Derek,

I wanted to take a moment to reach out to you on behalf of Adam Schiff and
explain why he deserves our support in his Senate race.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230626_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2727%2E5257348%2EPAkoZ1 ]If you, like me, believe we need a leader like Adam in the Senate,
please don’t hesitate to rush a donation.

But let me tell you why I think we need Adam in the Senate:

On July 25, 2019, as a United States Army lieutenant colonel detailed to
the National Security Council, I witnessed a telephone call between
then-President Donald Trump and Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky.

During that call, President Trump pressured President Zelensky to
investigate then-former Vice President Joe Biden as a quid pro quo to
continue receiving United States military aid. I was shocked.

I saw this for what it was: a blatant abuse of power, and political
blackmail to aid President Trump in the 2020 election. As the White
House’s Russia and Ukraine expert I was also disturbed by what Russian
dictator Vladimir Putin might attempt if the United States were no longer
a Ukraine ally and defense partner.

I alerted my superiors and eventually testified before a closed session of
the House Intelligence Committee, on which Rep. Adam Schiff served as
chair.

During the public hearing, I remember one moment vividly. I was asked why
I had the confidence to tell my dad to not worry about retribution for
testifying publicly.

And I remember answering without hesitation, because this is the country
that I have served and defended, and here, right matters. Right matters.

Rep. Schiff did his duty. He conducted a thorough investigation.
Interviewed witnesses. Subpoenaed the relevant information and testimony.
And secured the first bipartisan vote in a Senate impeachment trial to
convict a U.S. president in the history of our country.

Trump and the Republican Party have spent every day since seeking to
punish Adam Schiff for his dutiful oversight — for his fidelity to the
Constitution and the principle of co-equal branches of government, where
the legislative branch provides a check and balance on the executive.

GOP House Speaker Kevin McCarthy removed him from the Intelligence
Committee.

Trump attacks Adam at every MAGA rally he holds.

And their allies in Congress and the media launch relentless attacks
against Adam. To censure him. And to expel him from Congress entirely.

I know what it means to be the target of MAGA Republicans’ retribution.
And it’s more important than ever that we meet their attacks head-on.

That’s why I’m supporting Adam Schiff to represent California in the U.S.
Senate. No matter how hard Trump and his cronies may try, we cannot afford
to lose Adam’s voice in Congress. His leadership in defending our
democracy has been one of the most consequential fights in recent memory.

He needs our help to keep up that fight. [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230626_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=2727%2E5257348%2EPAkoZ1 ]So please, if you’re able, I’m
respectfully asking you to make a contribution in support of Adam Schiff’s
Senate campaign. Let’s stand with him today — chip in now:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1072?c0=jun2023_abs_em.0Agatv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230626_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=2727%2E5257348%2EPAkoZ1 ]EXPRESS DONATE $3

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=jun2023_abs_em.9HINAX&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230626_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=2727%2E5257348%2EPAkoZ1 ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=jun2023_abs_em.5j4Bsc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230626_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=2727%2E5257348%2EPAkoZ1 ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=jun2023_abs_em.RWa6IA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230626_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=2727%2E5257348%2EPAkoZ1 ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=jun2023_abs_em.9Bj7kB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230626_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=2727%2E5257348%2EPAkoZ1 ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230626_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=2727%2E5257348%2EPAkoZ1 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thanks for reading, and for being an active participant in the defense of
our democracy and the United States’ constitutional order.

— Lieutenant Colonel (Retired) Alexander Vindman

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=jun2023_abs_em.hzT4iC&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230626_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=2727%2E5257348%2EPAkoZ1 ]DONATE MONTHLY

name: Sepi Shyne
subject: Reflecting on June
body:
Hi team,

This month I’ve been reminded over and over again all the reasons I’m running to represent CA-30 in Congress:

From joining my LGBTQ+ community as we celebrate Pride and resist hateful extremism, to the remembrance of Juneteenth and the ongoing fight for racial justice, to one year since the overturning of _Roe,_ the month has got me fired up for each and every battle that lies ahead.

But I can’t do it alone, and if we’re going to ensure our country fulfills its promise of opportunity for all, _especially_ for women, people of color, our LGBTQ+ community, and all marginalized people — **I need you in this fight with me.**

clean_body: Hi team, This month I’ve been reminded over and over again all the reasons I’m running to represent CA-30 in Congress: From joining my LGBTQ+ community as we celebrate Pride and resist hateful extremism, to the remembrance of Juneteenth and the ongoing fight for racial justice, to one year since the overturning of Roe, the month has got me fired up for each and every battle that lies ahead. But I can’t do it alone, and if we’re going to ensure our country fulfills its promise of opportunity for all, especially for women, people of color, our LGBTQ+ community, and all marginalized people — I need you in this fight with me. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- As I reflect on this month, I’m also reminded that change has never come from the bottom down. Change happens through persistent, ongoing, and collective action that refuses to concede or give up hope. From the Stonewall uprising to trans resistance, from the Civil Rights movement to the ongoing battle to protect our right to vote, from the #WomanLifeFreedom movement in Iran, to the Women’s Marches to today — there are so many movements where we can draw inspiration. These movements have guided my activism for the past two decades, and I’m ready to bring their message to Congress, but it doesn’t happen without all of us coming together to get it done. =** = With gratitude, Sepi Shyne #WomanLifeFreedom Mayor Sepi Shyne has taken on WeHo's biggest issues and delivered results. From raising the minimum wage to the highest in the nation to significantly reducing homelessness – she's running for Congress to fight for all of us. As the first out Iranian LGBTQ+ woman elected anywhere in the world, Sepi is committed to making the American dream a reality for everyone: For immigrants, the LGBTQ+ community, women, and anyone trying to make ends meet. It's our time to Shyne, make a donation today. = = ** Sepi Shyne For Congress 8149 Santa Monica Blvd #280 West Hollywood, CA 90046 United States

Growing up, my world was pretty small. I used to treat our local bookstore like a library, sitting there for hours, reading books cover to cover because I didn't have the money to buy them.

Reading opened my eyes to new perspectives, far-off places, and different career opportunities – it helped me dream big. Our kids deserve the same opportunity to learn and grow through books, but Ted Cruz and the GOP are fighting to ban books about anything that doesn't align with their far-right agenda.

**That's part of why I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz – to stop the Republicans' outrageous censorship and attacks on our kids' education. name: Fred Guttenberg
subject: My friend, Jared.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P
body:
| Team – it's always hard to tell this story, but I know it’s necessary to keep sharing my daughter’s memory.

5 years ago, my beautiful daughter, Jaime, was shot at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School. My wife was protecting Jared’s young son, who was on lockdown in his preschool. My wife put Jared’s 4-year old son in a closet to keep him safe.

Jared’s speech on the Florida House floor three weeks later discussing that moment guaranteed the passage of historic gun violence prevention measures in Florida. Jared took immediate action for me, my family, and the families of all of the victims.

And now in Congress, he’s fighting every single day to ensure the GOP can never turn a blind eye to gun violence in this country.

From demanding a hearing on gun violence reduction to telling Marjorie Taylor Greene to her face “dead kids can’t read”, my family and Jaime’s memory is protected with Jared in the halls of Congress.

[**We need gun violence prevention leaders in Congress, now more than ever. And I know that, with your support, he’ll continue to fight for important gun violence prevention policies in Congress. Jared has a serious end of quarter deadline coming up and he could use your help — can you donate $7 today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65470828/413507146/-349209686?amount=7&refcode=JMFC_20230626_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjFiNjQ1ZC03OTE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rF393GS08rrSJYA-yq_EY9WKurHPSdxHkPmLuPeDZzg=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65470830/413507147/-349209686?amount=7&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&refcode=JMFC_20230626_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjFiNjQ1ZC03OTE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rF393GS08rrSJYA-yq_EY9WKurHPSdxHkPmLuPeDZzg=)

Team -- House Republicans just revealed their _dangerous_ new plan to **_GUT_ Social Security!**

President Obama is right: Social Security is a promise -- one this nation has kept to **_generations_** of American seniors -- and we can't let far-right, ultra-MAGA Republicans destroy it!

**We need to prove that we'll NEVER let House Republicans cut Americans' Social Security benefits.** We’ve launched an urgent Democratic petition to demand that Republicans uphold this CRITICAL obligation -- _but we’re still short 147 signatures in Pennsylvania!_

**Please, sign on before midnight:**[**Add your name now to tell us you'll defend Social Security from Republican cuts >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/14264?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230626-BREAKING-HouseSocialSecuritySignOnRF-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230626-BREAKING-HouseSocialSecuritySignOnRF-ETG-sl1&akid=11158%2E9716520%2EKyZ0dq)

body:

Hola Peter,
With our first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline coming up this Friday, we are hosting a virtual happy hour on Wednesday at 5:30PM. We’d love it if you are able to come support Team Terán for our most important public deadline since we launched our campaign.
RSVP HAPPY HOUR [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eoq223?refcode=X_062623_TeranEOQ1]
While the last few months have flown by, we still have a long wait to go until Election Day. However, we know it’s important to stop and celebrate the milestones!
That’s why we’d love for you to join us as we celebrate our progress so far, discuss how the campaign is going and what our strategy is moving forward in this primary.
If you aren’t able to make it, you can still help us reach our end-of-quarter fundraising goals by chipping in a few dollars today >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_062623_TeranEOQ1&amount=25]
Sí se puede,
Team Terán
RSVP HAPPY HOUR [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eoq223?refcode=X_062623_TeranEOQ1]

She's helped build broad and diverse coalitions that have beaten Republicans like Donald Trump, Joe Arpaio, and Kari Lake.
Now she's ready to take the fight to Congress, but we'll need your support to win. Chip in today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=x_subheader]

I’ll be honest, this isn’t what we wanted to hear. We only have four days left until we officially close the books, so we need to give it our all to finish the quarter strong.

This isn't just another deadline. It's also a public filing deadline, which means reporters and national pundits will be watching closely to see how much we've raised since the start of this campaign. This is a major test for us. If we fall short, Tate Reeves will take it as a sign of weakness. And we can't let that happen.

name: Will Rollins
subject: I need your help to defeat Ken Calvert, a staunch opponent of the LGBTQ community
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65470979/413507399/-1368678326?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20230626_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTE1N2RhNC03OTE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hggvx2qLgT0oN08v6BGJzXoVpTtyf9TvOswyPJQtunY=) Happy Pride Month, Peter. I’m Will Rollins, a former federal prosecutor and gay Democrat running to flip California’s 41st Congressional District from red to blue.

**[**In a moment, I’m going to ask you to split a $3 contribution between Mark Takano and our campaign to help us win this race and expand LGBTQ+ representation in Congress, but first I’ll explain why this particular seat is so important. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65470980/413507400/-1368678326?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20230626_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTE1N2RhNC03OTE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hggvx2qLgT0oN08v6BGJzXoVpTtyf9TvOswyPJQtunY=)** California’s 41st District is home to Palm Springs, and last fall, we made national headlines for going head-to-head in this district against a staunch opponent of LGTBQ+ rights, Ken Calvert. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65470981/413507401/-1368678326?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20230626_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTE1N2RhNC03OTE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hggvx2qLgT0oN08v6BGJzXoVpTtyf9TvOswyPJQtunY=) When it comes to LGBTQ issues, Calvert’s as bad as it gets:
* He opposed gay marriage.
* He voted against allowing gay adoptions.
* He voted down the Equality Act.
* He voted to allow employers to fire employees for being LGBTQ+.
* He voted against the repeal of “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell.”

And if all of that isn’t bad enough, his first electoral victory came in 1994 after **he sent out bright pink mailers outing Mark Takano, his then political opponent and accused him of harboring a “secret” homosexual agenda.**

Now Peter, the good news is Ken Calvert’s political career is _more vulnerable than ever before._

In 2022, I ran against him as a first-time candidate with 0% name ID, and we handed him the closest midterm election he’s ever faced (just 4 points!). National experts say that our campaign was the #3 over-performing Democratic challenger campaign in the nation.

Now, in 2024, national Democrats are already calling our district one of 33 initial “offensive targets” to take back the House Majority.

So let’s make a strong statement this Pride Month, Peter. Let’s send a staunch anti-LGBTQ+ Republican packing, flip this swing seat, and take back the House.

****[**Pitch split a contribution of $3 or more between Mark Takano and our campaign if you’re with me »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65470982/413507402/-1368678326?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20230626_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTE1N2RhNC03OTE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hggvx2qLgT0oN08v6BGJzXoVpTtyf9TvOswyPJQtunY=)**** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Will Rollins and Mark Takano will go through immediately: ** | **[CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65470989/413507409/-1368678326?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=MTFC_20230626_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTE1N2RhNC03OTE0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hggvx2qLgT0oN08v6BGJzXoVpTtyf9TvOswyPJQtunY=)**

www.marktakano.com

Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. clean_body: | = Happy Pride Month, Peter. I’m Will Rollins, a former federal prosecutor and gay Democrat running to flip California’s 41st Congressional District from red to blue. = California’s 41st District is home to Palm Springs, and last fall, we made national headlines for going head-to-head in this district against a staunch opponent of LGTBQ+ rights, Ken Calvert. = When it comes to LGBTQ issues, Calvert’s as bad as it gets: He opposed gay marriage. He voted against allowing gay adoptions. He voted down the Equality Act. He voted to allow employers to fire employees for being LGBTQ+. He voted against the repeal of “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell.” And if all of that isn’t bad enough, his first electoral victory came in 1994 after he sent out bright pink mailers outing Mark Takano, his then political opponent and accused him of harboring a “secret” homosexual agenda. Now Peter, the good news is Ken Calvert’s political career is more vulnerable than ever before. In 2022, I ran against him as a first-time candidate with 0% name ID, and we handed him the closest midterm election he’s ever faced (just 4 points!). National experts say that our campaign was the #3 over-performing Democratic challenger campaign in the nation. Now, in 2024, national Democrats are already calling our district one of 33 initial “offensive targets” to take back the House Majority. So let’s make a strong statement this Pride Month, Peter. Let’s send a staunch anti-LGBTQ+ Republican packing, flip this swing seat, and take back the House. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Will Rollins and Mark Takano will go through immediately: | = = = Thank you for your support, Will Rollins | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. **War with China is NOT inevitable. It** _**CAN**_**be prevented.**

| | **_Globalist Democrats and Neocons have us inching closer to war with China. It 's because they're ignoring our strategic decision not to tell Xi Jinping our plans if war should take place._** Every week, there's some sort of bill involving Taiwan and China, usually with harsher language directed at China and a war plan. Here's the thing my colleagues seem to forget... The more you talk about America's response in specific scenarios, the less leverage you'll have down the road. **Being strategically ambiguous isn 't the greatest solution to avoiding war with China, but it's kept the peace for at least the last 50 years.**
---
[**KEEP THE PEACE >>**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37c67fd6cf18419cbeaa227a9df3cbb7&_e=8EiZoWHe2nhkn65t202s_Rj9l8bDyVRKm2z91lniBM4BT-Q-wilTnNVG-Fc8o3EGhHR3LpWghTE9tIVDXBuPqGqrwQtttQRvfIyNHFvhO3S2pTh8pM-_5tUwgeSF20ERfnT05p4nN2gAjiQ1oo1Ic_5G7w03xiWi3PBBLInLCdtwOGFfM-3BsM_nfdT9HkiEE2R0aASuaZ2LNPCZr1eS4Bsiq9WUkE_W1L_7AncZN1Iumn1bLPoAyPwAyQNinEaLrekHuU-2NleJYCQy449jVWIzcq7Cx7psQMYPLGVTQtsbKeVCYr0UbLs3tf8JlSl0a2I284wwhW7bpZTf3GyAzEFkR8H2zKJvRI4_d3f-W3nDtgKCRn-k5LomAl7jin_A)

clean_body: Recently, I met with military folks in Hawaii, and a high-ranking official said to take this message back to my colleagues in the Senate... | | | Friend, Recently, I met with military folks in Hawaii, and a high-ranking official said to take this message back to my colleagues in the Senate... War with China is NOT inevitable. It CANbe prevented. My goodness, friend. - | | Globalist Democrats and Neocons have us inching closer to war with China. It 's because they're ignoring our strategic decision not to tell Xi Jinping our plans if war should take place. Every week, there's some sort of bill involving Taiwan and China, usually with harsher language directed at China and a war plan. Here's the thing my colleagues seem to forget... The more you talk about America's response in specific scenarios, the less leverage you'll have down the road. Being strategically ambiguous isn 't the greatest solution to avoiding war with China, but it's kept the peace for at least the last 50 years. Even though Globalist Democrats and Neocons have us inching toward war with China, I'm going to continue to be a thorn in their side and a voice of reason in this insanity. We can't afford a war with China - financially or troop-wise, friend. In liberty, Rand Paul | | . | | | | Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate | | | | | Contribution rules: I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). name: Rep. Lauren Underwood
subject: The promise I made
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Our work is just getting started. But to keep building on the progress we’ve made, we need to win back the House majority and we must reelect President Biden and Vice President Harris. | | |
---
Hi Peter -- it’s Lauren Underwood. In 2018, I became the youngest Black woman __ever__ elected to serve in Congress -- almost 50 years to the day that Shirley Chisholm became the first Black woman ever elected to Congress. In my speech that night, I made a promise to my community and to myself that like Congresswoman Chisholm, I’d be “unbought and unbossed.” More than four years later, I’m proud to have kept that promise. In my first two terms, I've had 14 pieces of legislation signed into law focused on improving the lives of people in Illinois and across the country. Over these last few years, we’ve passed historic legislation to lower the cost of insulin, reduce health care costs and premiums, improve maternal health care for our veterans, and help save moms' lives. Our work is just getting started. But to keep building on the progress we’ve made, we need to win back the House majority, and we _must_ reelect President Biden and Vice President Harris to keep leading our country forward. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Peter. I’m so proud to serve as a member of the Biden-Harris campaign’s National Advisory Board -- because sending President Biden and Vice President Harris back to the White House is going to take _all of us_ working together. ** **[Will you join me in supporting them today by becoming a Founding Donor to their campaign?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZ8EpBhSoCSR6nWCi480zzD65xaidrOmC_r1wX84ffE_2WCHz5rHineM0PuJ4Yyfgiz5N1PXVeTUmBv070_jef3YlP8M6VuFNrSNQIm_B-0Nei7Qs3yJg-iqCuIzWe4qRHYTWR5GuDQjziqX9bI8rKUWsyH4X7ey_iHI9m6GUDhLJWkpebF9LpZq0HqcT4LRjiNas4IUnEoJo0AGdnsUxRu7PETPt3RC1evW2d4E0P76Ti6ak_tc4L-1zpx1CKtNcFlSZJfifCErcLaJbLy19YdUSoF0V4sd2cauF31EeJ6NB1aKP7jzkNMWO97zXawXg89RUbzZ21LodPLoaFtEiVEg/3xd/kA_LJLLSSqOsbNTV1RbA3w/h0/lqhmXcaXdQ-OEMy9x8nopjFAoO1sIlI59F39Z_pnyUU) **

The work ahead of us is not going to be easy, but my focus will always remain on helping working families everywhere: fighting for an economy where everyone has access to the opportunities they deserve; for an end to the gun violence epidemic; and for every person’s right to quality, affordable health care.
I know President Biden and Vice President Harris share those priorities, and that’s why it’s critical we reelect them and ensure they can keep fighting for progress over these next four years.
[If you’re with me, I hope you’ll consider becoming a Founding Donor today to show your support for their campaign. ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZ8EpBhSoCSR6nWCi480zzD65xaidrOmC_r1wX84ffE_2WCHz5rHineM0PuJ4Yyfgiz5N1PXVeTUmBv070_jef3Wvfgw4MsJN2ZZLcpSicjBu5BlU3_S5-wBNfA9wYf6xmhzVEWChCVp95lXyRU49YZ9xdBMOXGHhim4cHJ3kpQw89Rs2hI8yJpntJ1hLnJwqDxfbsoWaDvgoj5Ctt3k-MqiBOUk1Rr3fppvvx2CZKOh1U25BxbLdbtGRksD7JlwB3qsmPgXw4Wz-lhBkmY0Uy8xqlWKdtPN5cmNynyzz42mmVcPUA7GICIEo-Xs-pZahMm6FBD4naksJ39iA_z5jLWg/3xd/kA_LJLLSSqOsbNTV1RbA3w/h7/uuIG_lV58_IJg-YrQCurYup-MBezDjlU9waFOg2eB0g)
Thank you for everything, and for taking the time to read this message.
Lauren
Lauren Underwood
U.S. Representative, IL-14

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: I’m the granddaughter of Jewish immigrants and the daughter of a World War II veteran
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] Friend, [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
I grew up in a working-class family as the granddaughter of immigrants and the daughter of a World War II veteran. I was the first in my family to graduate from college, and I worked multiple jobs – including as a cocktail waitress at Caesars Palace – and took out student loans to make ends meet.
Sen. Jackie Rosen's family [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP19/1/72722/images/Screenshot%202023-06-23%20at%209.50.56%20PM.png]
My dad, grandmother and uncle
Now, I'm humbled to serve Nevada in the U.S. Senate. As a former union member, I'm especially honored to represent the hardworking families and union workers who have helped build our great state.
Who I am and where I come from is why I've always fought to strengthen our middle class, create good-paying jobs, and lower everyday costs.
But right now, I need your help. I'm back on the ballot next year, and CNN reports that I'm one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection. The only way I can keep Nevada blue is with the support of people like you.
So please, friend, will you chip in $5 or more now – [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_rosen?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5] split between between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand's – before our crucial midnight deadline – so we can win in Nevada, defend the Senate, and continue delivering progress to working families nationwide? [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_rosen?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5]
I am grateful to have you on my team.
Thank you,
Jacky
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_footer] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
A note from Kirsten:
Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever.
While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority.
As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_footer] And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, text JOIN to 60708. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_footer]
Thank you,
Kirsten Gillibrand

Peter,
Whether or not you’ve been to a circus before, we doubt you’ve ever witnessed the types of clowns working for the GOP in Congress.
As the ringmaster himself, Kevin McCarthy has helped all of America see the true colors of the MAGA agenda in Washington. And Peter, it’s not only embarrassing, it's a threat to our democratic institutions.
CANCEL THE CIRCUS [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-June2023-FR-SwalwellSplitEOQ?&refcode=E3136-20230626-SwalwellSplitEOQ-SB-Surrogate&amount=25]
From Marjorie Taylor Greene using a House hearing to spread anti-vax misinformation to demands of defunding the Department of Justice, the FBI, and other crucial government institutions — MAGA Republicans are lining up to catch the next headline (and a circus near you).
But after all, when you elect clowns, you can expect a circus.
Look, it's clear the MAGA agenda has been full of circus behavior this month. I'm fighting every day to stand up to the clowns who would rather conduct a circus instead of business for the American people.
In anticipation of their next act in 2024, we need to meet critical fundraising goals to cancel the MAGA circus and resume progress on the real issues facing Americans. Will you split a donation between me and Future Forum PAC today, so we can reach our end-of-quarter fundraising goals, cancel the MAGA circus once and for all, and help me continue the fight in Congress? Wade and now, on Friday night, we’re facing our public FEC filing deadline. This deadline is the first big event for our campaign ahead of 2024.

One year after Dobbs, it’s never been more essential to keep anti-choice, extreme politicians out of power. Our FEC report needs to show that, one year on, our supporters aren’t backing down as anti-choice extremists plot to ban abortions nationwide.

Many of my Republican colleagues are continuing their all-out, nationwide assault on reproductive rights, threatening benefits like Social Security, and holding partisan political hearings that waste taxpayer money.

Meanwhile, I’m working hard to continue lowering costs for working families, pass a new Farm Bill, strengthen our economy, and safeguard our rights. On the Dobbs anniversary, I joined my colleagues in standing up for choice, fighting back against those who refuse to take action.

We need to continue the fight against every extremist politician who wants to attack our individual freedoms. This starts with grassroots supporters like you.

Will you chip in now to make sure I can keep my work up?

clean_body: | Did you see Sharice’s message? She’s asking for your support before this FEC deadline to show our campaign is strong enough to fend off our brand new challengers. = Original message from Sharice: Hi there — I know you’re busy, but it’s essential I hear from you right at the start of this week. Last weekend marked one year since the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade and now, on Friday night, we’re facing our public FEC filing deadline. This deadline is the first big event for our campaign ahead of 2024. It’s also the first public fundraising deadline since our two brand new opponents jumped into the race. How much money is spent against us in the run up to 2024 will be decided with this report. Reproductive freedom and every other major issue is at stake, so falling short is not an option. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = One year after Dobbs, it’s never been more essential to keep anti-choice, extreme politicians out of power. Our FEC report needs to show that, one year on, our supporters aren’t backing down as anti-choice extremists plot to ban abortions nationwide. Many of my Republican colleagues are continuing their all-out, nationwide assault on reproductive rights, threatening benefits like Social Security, and holding partisan political hearings that waste taxpayer money. Meanwhile, I’m working hard to continue lowering costs for working families, pass a new Farm Bill, strengthen our economy, and safeguard our rights. On the Dobbs anniversary, I joined my colleagues in standing up for choice, fighting back against those who refuse to take action. We need to continue the fight against every extremist politician who wants to attack our individual freedoms. This starts with grassroots supporters like you. Will you chip in now to make sure I can keep my work up? = Thank you, Sharice | = | Click here to from Sharice Davids' email list. PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS Sharice for Congress 13851 W. 63rd St. #303 Shawnee, KS 66216 United States

| Hi there,

This isn’t the news I was hoping to share today, but it’s important to me to be honest with my supporters, and also because I need my team: **if our numbers don’t pick up, we won’t hit our critical quarterly fundraising goal ahead of the FEC filing deadline, which is in just four days.**

I know this team gives it their all, and when we set ambitious goals, we run the risk of coming up short. But with the House majority at stake in this district, we need serious resources to fight off Republican efforts to unseat me before the end of this quarter.
